Transcriptions

Of Adano Ley Satsangs

Current Transcription

(January 9, 2021):

(continued from last post)
Now at the death bed, they do give holy communion to the dying individual as to insure that bond between the Soul and the Master Consciousness, that the Master Consciousness will pull it out of the levels of desire into that state of desireless in order to achieve Resurrection and into Ascension. You see we not only must Resurrect, but we must Ascend, “To him that overcometh I will not send forth a second time, but I will make him a pillar in the house of My Lord.” That is a permanent fixture in creation and a permanent fixture in creation is Beingness, we have to be some being in creation permanently established at that level. So communion is that locking in to lift you out of the desire levels which involve time and space, which is Consciousness acting on Energy, it pulls you up via the Christ awareness, which is Consciousness acting on Consciousness “in remembrance of me,” into Beingness acting on Consciousness, which is a permanency of your being. So we have what is called a tremendous gift of God via the communion in which man can be lifted up by God’s grace, not by God’s compassion, by God’s compassion is not what we want, we want His grace, to be lifted by His grace via these levels. By ourselves we cannot make it, it’s difficult for us to make it, there is too much pain and agony, yet by the grace impinging upon us by the Christ intelligence, we are pulled through from Consciousness acting on Energy, which is the highest level of human desire in this mechanism, into the Christ state, which is Consciousness acting Consciousness where there is no desire within the human mechanism, into the Beingness acting on Consciousness which is the ascended state which is the conclusion of the being.
– Adano Ley (Origins - October 1972 - 1:22)

Adano Ley DRAFT Transcriptions 1960s

Revised 1/11/2021 - DRAFT (some of these notes are direct transcriptions and some are loose outlines)

Adano65_1RecordedfromVisitQ2RRNW6 - 4 You see the whole thing is each one of us is like a little spark and then as the spark gets bigger by exposure to other sparks before you know it, it becomes a flame. Now eight or ten years ago I don’t think anyone was ready for these men, they wouldn’t comprehend what they were going to teach, but then again you need sort of a movement prior to their presence or prior to their coming to sort of lay the groundwork, lay sort of a challenge in ourselves. So we had what we call a beatnik movement, we had the hippie movement, and now we have what is called gelling of this consciousness. We find all of the students in the universities are all reaching out to really explore themselves for the first time. As long as you have these men living and demonstrating this capacity, you find being exposed to that prior movement, you have something now to compare, before you had nothing to compare, you see? 10 Story of the monk who had to quit and met Adano. They meditated on the reservations. He had three comparisons: walking up and down due to his original training, exposure to people on the reservation who resort to peyote (psychedelic), he saw the devotion / simplicity and the disadvantage which was the extrasensory awareness would not stay after the “meetings.” 13 Symbology of Peter crucified upside down. Jesus is the symbolism of pure intuition, direct perception from within oneself, free from repercussion of thinking. Peter was a demonstration of dogged will. It is upon concentrated will that intuitive consciousness has an opportunity to regulate life. 15 Will is a combination of desire plus energy because your are a living model of consciousness and congealed energy in the form of matter. The trick of it, what we call Maya or the relativity of it is how to recognize it. The only way to recognize this is when you can stop the feeling. If you have the power to regulate your will, you control feeling. We want to develop will first, so the true feeling can come out. Peter preferred to be crucified upside down because Will contains some Ego in it, it is never free because it requires a desire pattern to drive it. Until we surrender this Will and accept Divine Will, “not my will but the Cosmic Will be done.” 20 As long as there is ego in the will, intuition cannot control our life. Drugs create a suspension, a helpless being, semi-paralysis of the organs. If you surrender to Cosmic Will, then you are relaxing and things are falling into place, you feel upside down. Then you have performed symbolically the upside down crucifixion of Peter. We can’t be free until this occurs, but we need Will to enforce a certain level of understanding, but then we need to tear it down to get to the next level of understanding. You never really crash. What really feels like crashing is inwardly we feel the futility of struggle. Not to know what you are doing or why you are doing it builds up such a tremendous anxiety in us that automatically we are starting to collapse. That is the core of fear. There is no reason to fear, but it is the unknown quantity X that keeps us agitated. Why are we not getting results? Why can’t we eat the seed right away? Why do I have to plant it? 25 We are trying to “stick out” the value of human life as a human being. We have to work with the consciousness even under the hustle and bustle of everyday existence. You are proving the other half of your nature, the universe was made for man, not man for the universe. The Saints know that and go back to live with people. 30 People are grasping for offspring to have something better than them. If we were living in the etheric body, we wouldn’t choose this planet with all these problems and sickness. The Masters are masters of life engineering, the art of behavior. Origins of all religions. All Masters teach one basic truth that is exposed by the human form and by the human form it is adulterated. Jesus demonstrated Masterhood to a particular group of people in a particular culture at a particular time. The 12 disciples didn’t even get realization until he left the body, only one got it when he was in the body (the thief on the cross). We don’t know how to swim the river of life through conscious feeling and conscious will, therefore we are stuck in the mud of resistance. Yet if we can swim through it, we are free. The only real place you are going is HERE and the only real feeling is NOW. The only true action is Joy of Awareness, being alive. If you are aware of your existence, you want Joy. You can feel and taste texture, it is pulsating. Then you know you are truly experiencing, “I have come that you may have life more abundantly.” 40 Self awareness is opening up in your for you to experience the reality of life vibration around you full for the first time. Alive to the point of bursting. Joy is aliveness. Joy is now and here. Whatever you are doing, you are doing it with the fullness of Joy. You are building a bank account of Joy. It is more the understanding of happiness than the pursuit of happiness. Happiness IS. Happiness exists as a feeling in the contents of mind. You use mind to perceive. When you perceive you retain the perceptions in the reservoir of mind. You get the happiness from this reservoir. Seeing existence as a movie. All these things come to pass, but not to stay. 45 Questions and answers: Sita. Ram Ram Sita Ram. Ram or Rama was the personification of God in Man as the ideal husband. Sita was the personification of God in woman as the ideal wife. Adano tells the entire story of the Ramayana in modern terms including explaining Hanuman, the Monkey god.

Adano65_2RecordedfromVisitQ2RRNW6 - Adano explaining the story of King Janaka testing his disciple. 6 Once we realize that this power is in us, we have to do back in the world and live in it. Karma is only a Sanskrit word meaning cause and effect, action and reaction. It is not bad. Accidents are not happening to us, they are caused by us. There is no such thing as bad in the universe, only levels of goodness. It all depends on the relationship, the involvement and the understanding. When you go inside, you are trying to realize the consciousness of your existence and how to bring this into the waking state. You can only achieve this through meditation. Hypnosis is suggestion, a powerful law that can control. That’s why we have psychosomatic diseases through power of the mind. You are responding to sound waves setup by the environment which consider your actions as being clumsy. Everyone has an ability, but we may not have enough opportunities to apply that ability. 13 Questions and Answers. We are all brothers and sisters of light because the human body is a manifestation of light, it is energy. We migrate from planet to planet. We are nomads not YESmads. If you run into a YESmad, run away from him. We are wanderers of light. Adano gives an experiment of how to demonstrate the human being as light with a wheel with slits turning on a motor, etc. The first thing created in the Universe out of antimatter was light. The only two things that exist in the universe are pure energy as light and consciousness as anti-light or the thing that holds light together. You can feel the presence of Masters, but you cannot see them until you get to the speed of light squared. Animals can see them because their pupils refract light differently. The fully realized Master emits light all the time and you can feel it like a current, an electrical force. God is Light and Sound. Pure light which is heaven. There are two planes of motion. God is all motion and the motionless motion. 20 The slower the light becomes, the denser it appears. The human body is the slowest form of Light. So we say Intelligence or God chose to condition himself, herself, itself into a human body. So the body is the temple of the Living God. And then the Master of Life Engineering will say, “Know ye not that ye are gods?” Don’t you know that this manifestation is God in Its purest sense, at a slow speed? The only way you can communicate is sound and everything gives up sound. In the beginning was the Word, the Cosmic Force, Cosmic Vibration. Your name is Randy, that is a sound. The name of God is sound. He is the Cosmic Sound. We are brother and sisters of Light, we share light within. The genes in our bodies are compositions of light at different speeds. The pigmentation is the different ways it refracts the light. One color is true only in relation to the color next to it. The chemical relationship that is causing the light to break up allows you to perceive this as color. Really there is no color, yet there is all colors. Discussion of colors in white light. Everyone, everything in nature is Light at the slowest speed. If the speed is increased, we will be exhibiting pure light. At the speed of light, things are invisible. At the speed of light squared, it will ignite itself as Light. God is Light. Discussion of sound in light, thunder and lightening, which comes first? Sound. Sight will pickup light faster than hearing will pickup the sound. Yet if the hearing is increase or it becomes acute or intuitive, then the hearing transcends the sight. You can hear God all the time, but you can’t see Him all the time. Hearing is easier and non-delusive. 30 First you hear the Divine Current. They are working together. You see the flash of lighting first in the outward world, but in the inward realm, you hear it first. God is always present as Sound. You may not recognize him until you are Initiated which is an accentuation of the sound that you are blessed to hear, but didn’t recognize until the Guru points it out. The Audible Life Stream passes through all of us, but we may not recognize it. The five senses have the tendency to shut it out. The Master sends the force into you like a battery charger. You drain off the brain charge by interacting with material objects. Jesus said, if you look inside you see the whole body is light, but in Initiation you hear the sound, it gets louder and has a particular melody. There are many more scales than seven, there are unlimited scales. Meditation helps you to prepare yourself to bring it in. You are all brothers and sisters of Light, Pure Energy. The second / third question here: She has met you on some other plane of consciousness. Do we know who we are when we are sound asleep, male or female. This is the first thing you have to accomplish in realization. We are neither man nor woman, we are pure consciousness. Masters are men and women, it implies freedom from the repercussions of thinking. Mind is an ever flowing force. 40 What appears to be difficult is our association with the environment in which we life. We are photographically recording through the vision conditions to satisfy the brain that will appear as a harmonious environment lest we end up appearing a schizophrenic existence. Everything is pure energy in a state of motion. The appearance of being solidified is a mental action, an illusion. It is impossible for man to live in reality, he can only dip into it occasionally and draw from it and come back into the illusion. The nature of reality as a water effect on the mind. The Ocean of Life is water-like. We freeze it by our Will. We freeze reality into illusion-ness by our Will. The shock is too great on the human brain if it is exposed to true reality 100% of the time. In Cosmic Consciousness you can be sitting in this room and know what is going on in India. You can photograph it and transport things back and forth. Compassion, humility are qualities that are normally inhibited in our mechanism from the food we eat, environment, education, and behavior not having a chance to express itself. LSD is a hotrod way of getting behavior experience. We don’t want to do this. We want to arrive at compassion as a natural state. Within this mechanism, the chemical structure can be controlled by Will, the organizing of Meditation. Adano gives an example of going inside and “dipping into it.” This brings out peace, a natural condition. 50 The Will holds back the environment. To develop the Will do those things that you dislike to do first. Procrastination corrodes the Will. An active life is a life of training, disciplining this mechanism. “I will / want such and such a thing” you never really do it. Turn it around, Recognition is Spirituality. Want and Will are corrosive elements in our lives. “Thy Will be done.” If it is the Will of God, I will be taken out of it. The programming of the brain by words is the key to the release of the forces around you. The first thing you should learn about in realization is the use of words. You can’t want a need and get a result, you must need a need. 1:00 A need is geared by Divine Law to time. A Want is not geared to Time, a motor out of tune. A Need is in tune. All Needs are provided. I tried to get rid of all these things, but more kept coming back. In early stages of growth, minimize existence to bare needs. Don’t worry about how much time it takes. Story of Adano wanting to be a tailor, but he never used it to make a living, so he learned a want is not a need. A need could only come from certain actions, being on the borderline between suffering, frustration, and joy. That is where need exists, the balance between frustration, pain, and a joy. The joy is in you, your mother, and your sister. The frustration is in your father because of the operation. The Joy is when he knows what he has passed through is for the best. You have to have the answers after the experience. The reason a Guru exists is not only to bring you to God Realization, but also to accentuate those things that represent God Realization. What belongs to God belong to God. These need to be accentuated. Quote about Masters and footprints on the sands of time. Masters make an impression on our mind so that time passes easy for us, time is not a boredom. We life in a state of full enjoyment of time. Timeless time. We can appreciate the timeless of it now. We are alive NOW. Many of us travel on the inner planes when we sleep. When God created this body, enclosed the Soul, Man is Soul, but it takes meditation to prove it to him. When we sleep, we experience a form of traveling. This Soul is a composite: body, mind, and spirit as a unit. Man is linked to God only by breath in the form of Soul, but you must recognize this linkage to be free of the imprisonment of the body. 1:10 By being aware of the Sound, is being aware of Breath, is being aware of Soul at the same time. Meditation is a link to it. Astral body is an electrical field charge that goes out and travels. The astral body a composite of 19 elements and Adano explains. It is aware of itself and it travels. The purposes of recognition is strictly to realize that we are citizens of two universes, a universe of the physical existence and electrical existence and we have access to both universes at the same time. True meditation we pass through it carte blanche. God has given you a credit card in meditation. The other techniques do not remain with you, only meditation which is the actual science of contacting the Soul. When the student is ready the Master will be there. You have to be prepare to profit from the meeting. (gap in tape) Jesus picking Peter, a Master is a living embodiment of pure intuition, knowing directly, independent of the five senses all the time. Now the closest brother to intuition is willpower and intuition always seeks willpower, but willpower is limited and there is another force inside us that eventually transcends Willpower and go beyond and gives us intuition easier, this is Love or Devotion. The natural law of the heart. John had this over Peter. Intuition builds upon willpower and can transmit the Love, but it can’t leave something substantial so it uses willpower to leave something in the physical world. There is a big difference in leaving your knowledge to a person who has the will to carry it on to see it applied, than to leaving or transmitting your experiences to a person who will experience these things in themselves and that’s love and devotion. 1:20 He transmitted many of the mystical experiences to John, but he transmitted His work or His ideals to Peter to carry on. In Devotion there is no resistance, it’s like water, it just flows. Adano explains the statement, “When two or more are gathered, there am I in their midst.” This has a threefold explanation, it may mean 2-3 good Christians, that is our assumption, he has got to be in our midst. He wasn’t talking about this. 1:23 The moment a man of truth, or anyone who is interested in the truth of his existence, the moment he gets together in the Consciousness of I, the consciousness of his own self, and to listen to his own name, that’s the vibration, in My Name, that is Cosmic Vibration, that’s the vibration or frequency of the I-ness in you. The three levels of existence will come into focus, that is the mineral existence, animal existence, and human existence. When these are synchronized, that why we call this a Satsang, a meeting of Souls. When they are gathered in my Name, in this Cosmic Frequency, because where are we going to gather in the first place. Not in a motel, we are gathering in the whole Cosmic Arena. We are right here in the universe of life. “There am I in the midst.” Because he is not over there, out there, He is in the midst. He is in the here-ness, the now-ness. He who? Life itself. The Cosmic Life itself is present all the time as the Sound Frequency passing through us in the form of flower, man, beast. And it is the living relationship that is Spirituality. Because the thing must be living, the thing must be a living experience to see it going in simplicity, not in complication. Because living experience is a simple thing. Truth is simple, but difficult to comprehend… The Master does not shock you into the reality that he is lifting you up. I am not helping you, but the Masters that flow into my relationship are helping you. Happy is the Soul that can fly, Soul liberation, the ability to step into the next realm while in the physical frame. Flying is an indication of the astral body moving in and out, a portion of our mechanism that takes flight. The Soul goes nowhere, it is omnipresent already, it goes into the here-ness. Recognizing omnipresence is recognizing tranquility inside you. Inside the tranquility is endless, outside it is broken. 1:30 The pure consciousness is motion, that you are able to carry Love with you all the time. The real purpose of Man’s existence is the realization that he IS Soul and that everything in this universe was made for him, but not to be enslaved by the thing. If jobs are made for Men then it makes no difference if he has one tomorrow or not. He will always have a job. Adano was looking for work. He was criticized as a Yogi that didn’t work. “What kind of Yogi are you in this modern society.” So he got a job and his boss was named Wade and Adano realized that he was wading through the financial difficulties of this world and the type of work was corrosion control. Before he was getting rid of the corrosion of the Soul and now he was getting rid of the corrosion of the metal. So he realized that this job was made for him, he wasn’t made for it. What name was more appropriate for the problems he was facing. This law works if you are willing to cope with this thing and not fight it.

Adano65_06_02ManisSoulQ1RRNW6 - Question: Why is it I can’t get past a certain state of development? Why can’t I get the experience to back it up? I am going to give the reason why the student cannot get past the intellectual stage into the spiritual experience because there is a basic law there. That law is sometimes called Satan, Devil, or the Divine Examiner. But it is called by the metaphysician or cosmic science, the Principle of Ramm. This particular part is called the Primary Principle, like the primary function in a coil because it involves a particular force in the mechanism. And the second part is SLR. This is called the Secondary. R stands for Resistance. The basic intrinsic resistance in all structure by the very art of creation exists as is. God cannot destroy His devils because He is devil manifest also. You see? He cannot come into manifestation if there is no basic resistance in the manifestation. So how can He destroy what we call devil? How can creation begin without intrinsic resistance? That’s why the law of resistance exists or Ramm. It is the principal that any manifestation involves resistance. “Fiat Lux,” to break the resistance of darkness, light was necessary. It is already there, basic, part of us, will be us. But this resistance you’ll find does not last, it is a period only. That’s why the scriptures say “all things comes to pass, but not to stay.” That was left out in the writings. All these things will come to pass, but not to say. Because all things are moving in the cosmological time sequence with their intrinsic resistance. Now, resistance acts only for a period until you recognize it as resistance and if you don’t recognize it as resistance, psychological, physical, or spiritual then it will continue to possess and haunt you, obsess you. But it can’t stay too long either because the very law of nature it is moving. It is not static. It is in the process of moving. 4 So we move from resistance to Adjustment or Adaptation, where we learn to adapt ourselves. So A stands for Adaptation. We are forced to adapt in spite of ourselves. Even adaptation can’t last too long, that changes too into Mutation, which really means change. So we say we live in a world of constant changes. When change has worked itself out, we have Mold or Pattern and it is set in its primary function as Life. The input of the function of Life is set. We have to have some output, which is Secondary Principle, then comes Saturation, we get bored. As we get bored of what we get molded into, it begins to drag upon us and that dragging is called a Lag or Boredom state. It is a non-incentive state. Right in this same lag, the period of non-incentive is coming into the period of incentive. Incentive exists in Lag because we get initiative coming out of it, we get a new impetus. Also called Night of the Soul, which leads to impetus, a spark, new incentive, new ID (idea). It is churning in our consciousness. And we move out with that new impetus to Recurrence, a new cycle. The cycle is based on a spiral movement, from the central / zero point of One. The darkness is the blackboard, moving out by intrinsic resistance gradually until it comes in line with the central point of One. The law of recurrence spirals out. Until Man knows he is Soul, he cannot free himself to have experience of his Being. You see the reason why the student has difficulty experiencing himself. Each phase of the law is based on time. 10 Now, the ancient Sages say, Cosmic Consciousness is directly liked to breath mastery, or hyper oxygenation. Adano explains how Kriya breaths address this problem. On the seventh day God rested, this is the recurrence. Adano explains Jesus being tempted in the wilderness and why this happened in terms of the principles above. The last test was the test of pride, when Jesus was asked to bow down and worship Kal. Man does worship Kal, he wants to control society with his thinking. The greatest challenge to the Realized Man is the power to possess and dominate through the power of thought. We have dominion, but not ownership of the universe. To have somebody bow down automatically puts you in command of them and you are in possession of them like a slave. Man cannot be slave to another man in no form because we are all souls. Jesus realized that every aspect of his Cosmic Consciousness has to be hammered out. Kriya Yoga allows you to do this in 40 years naturally, you can also do it in 40 days like Jesus and Buddha. Or you live out one million years of births and rebirths in a healthy body. 16 Where does the Cosmic Man free himself from this Spiral? He steps out of it by stepping across in a direct route right back to the central part of himself going inwards, “seek ye first the kingdom of God which is within you.” He has to learn how to build the Temple of God in himself by stepping out. 18 The Cosmic Desire is that the Creation follow the Creative Will, not that the Creation desires to follow Creative Will. The Creation recognizes Creative Will. It should understand recognize Creative Will taking place in all its activities. Not that it should crave to go back to the Creative Will and submerge to it and surrender to it. When it does that, it is still lacking. It should come to the understanding right away that the Creative Will is in it and the Creative Will is responsible for it. It should begin to recognize that immediately without having to go on craving for it. 19:40 You are in the body with unfulfilled desires and you are exposed to knowledge that the Creative Will is supposed to guide your life. Therefore you crave to go back to the Creative Will to guide your life. Now, until you have overcome spiritual life, you are craving to go back. You have to realize that you are Soul. The moment you realize Soul, there is no going back. You are Soul, you broke the chain. “I AM that I AM.” “I and my Father are One.” These are all realizations, affirmations of the fact that you are Soul. Realization of the fact that you are Soul comes when you are building it now. “Build me a temple that I may dwell in the midst thereof.” 20:45 To build a temple, you have to have a basement and the basement is called, attitude. Building the first basement in your life is attitude. Your parents should have the attitude so their offspring will carryover attitude right away, you see? Now a master is born to parents who already have the attitude. You never hear of a master being born to parents without the right attitude. The attitude is there. They couldn’t build a temple, they couldn’t give the offspring any impetus. So they themselves got to build for the offspring. So attitude is established as the basis. Then the next line up is interest. This cannot die in your life, you cannot let interest die out, so there is no stagnant moment in your life, you see what I mean? There is no moment in your soul life where you are gonna lose interest. All life becomes interest because all life is soul now on a bigger scale. And from that you close up the next angle in service. You are forced to render service. With this service then you close the ceiling. 22:26 With your next knowledge, astro psychology or astrology, which sets the foundation for time now. Every master has to know time thoroughly because he cannot work outside of time, he works with time, not with clock time, cosmic time. So he knows astro psychology or astrology and he builds from there, parapsychology or knowledge of the extra sensory nature. He knows this properly because he is going to differentiate between the mystic or the fakirs and the true saint now. So he closes the triangle by meditation, the science of meditation. At the apex he puts what is called the weather vane and that is called self realization. And he has built the temple. He is in self-realization all the time. The first attitude that has to be established is Love and the only real attitude. All other attitudes are subdivisions that lead up to Love, which means evolved. To love is to evolve, go out, unfold, let go. We have to get away from being static, fixed, concrete. This is the only attitude to build this temple properly. As long as you evolve, your interests will automatically reach out because everything becomes interest now, everything becomes love now reaching out. And if you are evolving, which is love, you have to render service. If you spread out, you are going to run into people with their problems. You need to know meditation to speed this spiritual life. Then the light opens up, consciousness is there, and peace profound is passing through you. Adano relates this to the Prodigal Son story and explains that they should have laid emphasis on My Son and My Father, the relationship, no fear, no rebuke. If we don’t understand and we still have connections with past IDs (ideas) that are not applicable right now, we can still pray for that Love and become humble enough to feel this Love. One of the Beatitudes, (Be-attitudes) “meekly wait and murmur not.” The father should be willing to wait and the son should be able to come back because there is still Love going on, for no other reason. 30 But in Man’s relationship with God, this love is even greater. Adano explains the other son that did not go away in terms of Ada. If the Father accepts his offspring, the greatest ache in the father’s / mother’s / Guru’s heart is the one that turns away from the Love that is there. Which child gets the attention, the one that cries or the one that doesn’t? The Masters who did not run away are the Angels. The Joy of one repentant Soul is equal to the Joy of one million angels. You can only exert Love when there is tragedy in one form or another. Normal love there is no tragedy. Let there be friction, then there is tug-of-war in your feelings and hate / indifference / self-centeredness comes in. Love needs to come in. This is why we don’t get that experience, we are trapped in that law of Ramm and if we recognize we are trapped in it, then all we have to do is let each period work itself out. You know so many days it will take for resistance, so many days to adjust, change, mold, saturation, lag, then you get a new idea, new impetus and then recurrence. The only two commandments: Love your neighbor as yourself and love the Lord thy God with all your mind, heart, and Soul. Love is the first basic attitude you have to establish. Out of Love we evolve, we can’t have anything else but that. You have to start from interest that makes you render service, then you run into problems. You feel people are against you. You need to know astrology to learn to work with them. Scientists will begin to understand the principles of spirituality eventually. Jivanmukta, freed while living. Anabolic (build up rate) and catabolic (break down rate) forces the body. Based on brain wave jamming by society. The Masters could do these things. 40 Adano explains Babaji being several thousand years old. There are basic scientific laws in this physical body that we don’t realize. Babaji’s disciples, especially one that is a member of the Theosophical Society and a retired businessman in the US. Teleportation. Adano explains the story of Samson living in the age of Taurus. His hair was able to draw in Cosmic Energy into his body, the mark of the Nazarene. It flows into the medulla through the roots of the hair. The powers have to be awakened in the spine to use the energy. Samson used psychic energy to move objects. Psalms were Psi-alms, aids to using Cosmic Energy. Delilah physiologically is like grounding the antenna, it also involves the principles of regenerating the body which is involved in Love. Adano explains Adam and Eve awakening the kundalini energy and stepping out of the frame into the etheric body, and saw themselves as Cosmic Energy. They did not allow the Cosmic Energy to go into the medulla and open the thousand petal lotus, they moved it down to the coccyx first. Man fell by stepping out in the projection and therefore lost his ability to make this body Cosmic Body. Therefore he saw he was naked, divested of the power. 50 Adano explains this in terms of Kriya again with the energy going up and down the spine. Don’t put your mind on the coccyx, put your mind up. The energy is positive up and negative down, but it is really a flow. This is atomic mass so there really is no up and down. 53 Now you see why the Cosmic Intelligence had to rest and let Man make mistakes by implanting the very first law of resistance or brain jamming. If I say to you, I want you to forget a certain number and the number is 99. You will go to remember it all the time, do you see what I mean? I demonstrated what is called a brain jamming principle and I’ve demonstrated the principal that is gonna make you go against yourself. Now, “Thou shalt not eat of the fruit in the midst of the garden.” That means thou shalt go that way because only that way can I observe this process of my creation. How else can I see this thing going? If everything is perfect now, there is nothing there for the creative force to work. You see how this cosmological… The Creator is not damning Man, He is not damning Man or Soul, He has made Soul for a cosmic play, but by setting up what you call the tragedy and setting up the villain first in the process, He has cosmic drama. No villain, no tragedy, no cosmic drama. When you feel that sensation of the head shutting off and the lower body shutting off and the fullness, direct that to the heart and you will feel it opening up. Adano demonstrates some breathing exercises.

Adano65_06_03DallasQ1RRNW6 - Adano tells story about Saint Peter killing a man and his wife by rebuking him for putting too much money in the collection plate. The man was exposed. This demonstrates the Christ conscious ability to materialize your thoughts at will. Peter realized that he had committed an act of pride. 1 He too (Peter) made the one mistake that Jesus was liable to make which is the last test of pride with the ego, you see. There is no devil and we say he went up to be tempted in the wilderness 40 days and 40 nights, fasting. He was hammering out the different aspects of ego and the various negative natures in it. The last one is, “If you bow down and worship me all these things are yours.” In other words, “I give you power over life and death if you only become a dictator over humanity.” The scripture say that man has the power to have dominion over the universe, but not to possess it. Only God possesses us and He is hungry, very hungry for us. That’s the funny thing. He created us and He’s hungry for us, so hungry for our love. Nothing else does He want from us because what else would He want from His creation. He cannot ask us for anything else, but conscious love from our own efforts. That’s why He created us and left us incomplete by the process of evolution, physiologically speaking, and psychologically endowed us with His cosmic nature to move independently here to here which is called cosmic man. As Jesus says, “man ought to be perfect,” but he is not. That doesn’t mean physiologically speaking. Psychologically speaking he is imperfect, he has to work out his psychological nature to attain cosmic consciousness, perfecting his consciousness. And there is the danger of our consciousness. Masters have always taught the fundamentals of living and building a psychological temple, but we don’t practice it because the physiological evolution of the world keeps us entrapped. Our attitudes change every second. We have to realize how to build this inner life, not in the monasteries. We must go back to the information left to us by the sages, environment to acquire the attitude. The church is an environment. We are all aching for completion. The completion of the peace that passeth all understanding that allows us to have the ability to execute knowledge at will. 7:45 When the peace comes from within yourself, with all your materials pressures, all your material desires and possessions, which can be umpteenth big, and you can get this peace that cuts out these internal tensions like that, you have found the Christ in yourself, you have come back to the Divine. This peace is in us, nowhere else can you find it. 10 Peace is in us and God is aching for our love so that this peace can flow. He is aching for us since he is the life energy and has become us, to withdraw from the external realm. Emotions - energy going out. If we understand emotion pulling us outwards, where are we going to find God which is supposed to be inwards as Jesus says? They say inside. The opposite of Emotion is Devotion, a conscious withdrawal from the five senses from the is world of matter back into this temple of consciousness. And Joy which is spirit, peace, serenity. When we can experience these, we will also experience bliss / ecstasy which gives us wisdom if it is experienced physically (not just mentally). Peaceful rest is based on the conditions inside of us. When you can recognize peace as a settling of the mind and opening up and being aware of the colors of the room, sounds become clearer, and you feel bubbling joy coming up, you know you have this buoyant feeling. Adano talks about vegetarians and building a foundation of health in the body. Sonny painting a picture. 17:20 We are making an effort of building a temple that He could dwell in the midst therefore, the temple of the body. The law of attraction and right thinking. Wrong thinking and wrong attitudes tear down the mechanism. The more unhealthy people you have, the atmosphere becomes polluted with psychic waves. Good versus bad vibrations. 20 The churches have been impregnated with an attitude, but if an individual goes to a church with the right attitude, then good things happen. Life more abundantly. The American Indians ask for healing NOW in their prayer meetings. They are living it, they want to experience this peace, this joy. People in Norway and Sweden do not have initiative, it has been taken away by the government. They are remaining in self-centeredness and no longer thinks in terms of moving out to the next level of development. 26:42 (gap in tape for meditation). We are Soul, we not minds or bodies, we are Soul. We work through the body. But if we understand our oneness with God, life, we are free. Free from the repercussions of our thinking, that is what salvation really is. If we realize we are Soul, “come let us make man in our own image and likeness,” image is the atomic structure and likeness is the cosmic nature / intelligence / attitude, “male and female created them and He breathed the breath of life into man and man became a living Soul.” Not a living body or a living mind, a living Soul. God is the Over Soul or Cosmic Self. He has become us. And when we realize that daily by merging in meditation and looking at the light that we see in the consciousness. The light shines in the darkness and the darkness comprehends it not. We have a brain that is working away inside, radiating cosmic light, we can turn in as Jesus says “when the eyes are single vision, the body is full of light.” We can see that inner light, feel its presence, f the great Sages, the attitude of Love. The moment we get away from the fact that we are bodies or minds, we possess Souls, we will keep on living with the repercussions of our thinking, we will still suffer from it. We ARE Soul, from the word Go. We realize we have laid the foundation for Love. We have to live Love. It demands the utmost of our consciousness and a tremendous inner honesty with ourselves. 33 We are dishonest without knowing it because we are ignoring, we are living in a state of ignoring, “Ignore-ance,” to ignore what we are. You see, the sage once said, “God, Spirit, Mind, Love, and Tranquility.” He said, “These are words, but these words have half meanings to some people.” They don’t have real meaning, they don’t have real experience to some people. Yet to those who have experience in terms these words really represent, and can produce what it do represent in terms of the physical nature, then we have lived it. So Master Yogananda used to say, “I am not interested in people who talk of the Bible, I am interested in the man who can live one sentence of the Bible.” If his whole life was representing one sentence in the Bible, that man is living the Bible, that man is experiencing the Bible. If he never knew anything else and didn’t do anything else in terms of spiritual culture, if he would only live one sentence and make this one sentence his guiding light of inner life, that man is a living Bible unto himself. He says the rest are going to flow automatically to him. The knowledge is going to flow because he will pull it. That man is natural with that consciousness and this is the basis of the inner peace. 35 Now, in the meditation, you find that you are in a state of peace. That is, you are not agitated, you are not getting restless. We have thoughts that come and go, but we are not worrying about the thoughts coming and going, they will settle down of their own nature. Don’t try to interfere with them, because then you are taking your conscious will to move something that the mind has to do. All you have to realize is like a bronco rider, that’s the Soul, who gets on the bronco bucking horse and hooks himself into it and let the horse run itself until it gets tired and stops, and that’s your mind. That horse is going to buck and buck and buck until it gets tired and it says, “well, I’ve exhausted every verbal concept, I know what I am.” And then it reaches the last thing it don’t know anymore id-s (ideas) come in then the Soul will shine through like a light. Pow! Right in the dark skull of ours, we will see a flash of light and light we know is white, but white light is colors. When it breaks itself, it breaks into colors. So we will see colors. The three higher aspects of the Light, the gold radiance like a circle, inner part is opal blue or purple, and in this inner blue light, it flips like a five pointed star, and looks like a dove descending. Jesus getting initiated by John and seeing the opening of the higher Christ center in Himself and heard in His inner consciousness, “This (descent of light) is the beloved Sun (S-U-N), in which the cosmic is well pleased to manifest.” Light, peace, joy: these three words have more meaning in terms of actual experience. It removes unconsciousness after awhile. We are afraid of the unconscious, not knowing what we will be when we pass out of the frame when we die. If we look in patiently, it will open up. Pray wanting the realization that you are Soul, the constant joy that fills you beyond all understanding, a freed Soul. Then you are free from the repercussions of your thinking. All your attitude will be Love. 40 When we pray, and Jesus said “the Gentiles pray for food, clothing, etc.” Gentiles do not mean the non-jews and the jews did not mean an Israelite, although we call the country Israel today, that has nothing to do with spiritual knowledge or law. God is reality, He is the is-ness of all things manifest and un-manifest and to be a child of God is to return back to reality in yourself. Those who have some glimpse of reality in themselves and don’t have confidence in the light, they are really lost. They went back to the five senses and went back to the rituals and ceremonies. We live in a state of indifference all the time, tomasic, a state that is dragging. We cannot live in that state all the time and that is self-centeredness, rajasic. When the air is let out of the balloon of self centeredness, it collapses as a mental wreck. The individual is scared of existence because he didn’t build anything from within. The next outlet for him is the sattvic or action necessary for life. Service. Interest, attitude, and service are the foundations and the walls of the psychological / spiritual temple. 50 Anagram of Meditation. M=Mental. E=Energy. D=Direction. I=Individual (a personal practice). T=Thought. A=Activities (of thought). T=Towards. I=Intuitive (not sensory). O=Observation/Oneness (dual function, first intuitive, then you become One). N=Nature/Nouminon God (not phenomena). Science, philosophy, and religion all in one process. Intuition is not a hunch, it is knowing from within directly independent from the senses. It has to be awakened by a Light process. The light of meditation comes in three colors, gold, blue, and white, looking like a dove, a five pointed star that represents ether, earth, air, fire, and water, the primordial functions of nature which descends from the point between the eyebrows into the heart. The meditation is to go in and feel this thing rising in us, merging with the peace all the time, accepting the consciousness. As we go in and understand that God has become us, we can treat. First we treat each one in the room by receiving this consciousness in this light, this feeling of joy or peace, and it anoints which we call grace, the flood of light into the body, and then you feel it emanating, enveloping everyone into the room, seeing them whole, in body, mind, and spirit, then the entire building because the walls represent the creative force too. If the tongues of men of peace were cut out, the stones would shout “Peace!” You have to send out that healing vibration from your consciousness to pacify all these things and see them go back into their normal frequency. So you treat out the entire mineral kingdom, the galaxies, the entire vegetable kingdom, the entire animal kingdom, the entire human kingdom, and the entire spiritual kingdom. The higher beings can only work if we are in tune with them, they cannot interfere. It is like the radio waves are in a room, but it cannot interfere if you don’t turn on the radio or TV. Then we radiate it back to the Cosmic Self, God, centering into the heart. It has to come back to your heart because only the pure in heart sees God, not the pure in mind. There is a light that flows in the heart that shuts it off and allows you to be free from this shell and realize that you are Soul. You are a human being wearing suits. Jesus simply said to “look inside” to pray to God. The pure in heart sees God, you see your higher self. You are not going to see somebody sitting on a throne. Your higher self is your Christ self and you are linked to it. It has to do with an aspect of consciousness, the form of human shape. A cow would like a bigger cow to represent god for him, a lion would like a bigger lion. The fact is the futility of the mechanism makes us fear the cosmos and its immensity so we have to imprison it in form to have relationship. This little mechanism feels so futile with its limitations, but when it reaches out and sees the immensity of its Being that is is Consciousness, then form loses its meaning. 1:00 You will see Jesus, you will see all the Masters in form, crystallized as pillars in the Father’s house. The man who has reached realization will resurrect, rendering loving service to undeveloped beings. They will greet you as an elder brother / sister. The Father aspect will manifest Jesus. The mother aspect will manifest as a Saint who looked to God as Mother. If you don’t want no form you will see Him as the Cosmic Light, the white clear, germinal light responsible for manifestation existing in the black light, which you call darkness, is both light. One of a white, germinal nature and one of the soil in which it works, the dark light. You will see your higher self, another you, far more refined, devoid of all the densities and limitation of the you that you look at now. And you will know you are a child of god, a higher self, freed. Autobiography of a Yogi “finding god” story (teacher touching him on the heart). Sleep is an illustration at a lower level of levels of consciousness, Being, how you feel, this is yourself going on. Living and dying daily (Saint Paul). There are tremendous, unending opportunities for growth through many life forms. There is no end to this process. That’s why “to him that overcometh, I will not send forth a second time” that is repeat the same old pattern, but make him a pillar in the house of the lord. He will be rendering loving service. You will see a higher Marilyn, far more of all the qualities of the higher self that are lacking in the lower self. When the higher self and lower self recognize each other, one has to act out its role. The higher self is still going to be a silent witness. 1:10 Adano explains the 1/2 ounce that leave the body at death. Bombarding 4 oz of tungsten with neutrons for 20 minutes, then let it cool, we have residue with three ounces less. Where did it go? Then bombard it for 40 minutes, then it is 2 ounces. Then bombard it for 80 minutes, then 1 ounce. Then we bombard for 160 minutes and it is still 1 ounce. We weigh 1/2 oz less when we die, that energy that is in this structure is a form of matter in its own density and it is released. It feels like cobweb if you pass through it. Master who have realigned the atomic structure of the body through meditation do not lose anything. Carbon body vs. silicon based body. We have to understand the atomic sciences in which we are living and we have to understand that this is god or spiritual knowledge. We have a carbon body that throws off a shadow. If you take silicon and coat an object, it can resist 2,000 degrees F. Silicon, which is glass, passes light. We have it in our body also. We don’t use the 360 degree angle of the brain focus. So if we learn how to accelerate through breathing, hyper oxygenation, we will change the cellular structure and shed carbon. Adano talks about Kriya yoga and reads from Autobiography of a Yogi. The oxygen in the water in our bodies. It is an electrolysis process. It takes 40 years to take a moronic brain to full Cosmic Conscious brain. Arriving at Cosmic Consciousness is not the end of our existence. Cosmic Man has work to do. 1:20 There are many civilization in the Cosmos, that are not yet materialized by man. Love is Evolve if your turn around the letters. It reaches out through service. When you are rendering service you have to be involved with people. Human being are the product of time. That moment decides their whole psychological makeup. We have to understand people at their time sequences, 12 signs. Why was the space program named after the Zodiac signs? We do have an established zodiac up there. Once we know astro psychology or astrology, then we can recognize para psychology or extra sensory perceptions, then we realize the spiritual nature of Man which is meditation, then when they merge, you have realization. Adano talks about the exact date of the aquarian age, around the year 2000, the influences of Piscean age are off. This is the cusp. The node of the Aquarian age is around 2,300 AD. The Sages tell us that we must follow Solar Nutrition, that is a low carbon content. Oriental cooking ends up with 10% carbohydrate since they don’t use potatoes. Rice is 10% to 12% carbohydrates. We are a product of a solar function. Adano talks about solar nutrition. Dawn slant range of light also at high altitudes. California is still part of the old continental region so more cosmic rays beam in better. The intestinal tract should not grind up certain foods so colonics are needed. 1:30 Grinding nuts and putting them in fruit juices. Midday foods have sun penetrating at midday. Leafy vegetables. Evening foods grow under the ground with no sunlight on them. Macrobiotics. Planting positive and negative foods. Vegetarian eating and changing body structures. You are supposed to live 7 times 21, but society has “brain jammed” us to live 65 years. First 30 years is the first span of life, 60 is the second, 90 is the third, which corresponds to Saturn. It is based on cosmological laws. Saturn is the disciplinarian. If we make 120, then we have “double time” extension.

Adano65_MeditationKriyasQ1RRNW6 - (Indian music playing in background). Meditation is one step further than prayer. That doesn’t say that man does not pray and I don’t want you to go away with the ID (idea) that this is going to detract from a religious involvement of your life that you pray. Far from it. I am only trying to point out that by the meditative process of disciplining the emotional nature, you will really know how to pray for the first time and discover that prayer is a means of communing with the higher self. 1 In the meditation, you are asked to just close the eyes, but don’t fall asleep. Try to keep the spine straight and don’t strain, be as comfortable as possible because this entails conscious effort and the conscious effort is discipline. Now the vital energy flows through the vital nerves and through the five senses into the physical organs and you are involved with the outside world through the senses of seeing, smelling, hearing, tasting, and touch. Now, everything involved in that outward realm is retained in the brain as language and the association through language. In the meditative principle, or disciplines, we will shut down one of the avenues. That is the lids of the eyes, vision, and through this shutdown attitude, the discipline of sight begins. While we close the eyes and look within and not falling asleep, we have a sense or tendency to become more aware of our existence. Thus a stepping up of your inner consciousness and you begin to realize that the sense of hearing is taking over more. The sense of smell, the sense of taste and touch are also becoming acute to the extent that they are becoming extra perceptive. And as we gaze at the point between the eyebrows with our eyes closed, keeping the mind there, gradually we will see a light or a radiance, a luminescence. 4:10 Now the mind has a tendency to drift only because it was involved with the external realm and this is a form of discipline by trying to observe what the mind is latching onto, what particular ID (idea) or word or association or thought or experience the mind is latching onto and through this conscious observation or conscious discipline, the mind sometimes recognize an idea or a thought creeping up from the past, some past experience. Now if it is associating with that experience, eventually the emotional nature will become frustrated. If the mind is latching onto something concerning the future, sooner or later the emotional nature will end up in anxiety. Now if the mind is involved in the present, now, what it is actually doing in relation to the body, then the sense of breathing, the function of breathing begins to slow down. In the scriptures it is said, “God breathed the breath of life into Man and Man became a living Soul.” At this very moment in the present Now as the consciousness identifies itself with the present and the slowing down rate of inhalation and exhalation, Man is given an opportunity to experience his Soul awareness. 7 The Soul partaking of the qualities of the Divine exhibits omnipresence. That it seems to reach out and be present everywhere in Consciousness. It seems to radiate into unlimited existence. Here begins the devotional workload of communion with the universal spirit, God. Ever conscious of the present Now. The vast ocean of peace and tranquility is all around you now in the form of consciousness. And the personal discipline of watching, the personal vigil is the linkup with that vastness of consciousness from within ourselves. 10 Pause in meditation and feeling the reservoir of peace flowing out, then diving back deeper into the ocean of consciousness, aligning yourself with God, the internal light within yourself. Aligning yourself with God, the internal Light within yourself. Chanting Om. 20 Chanting Om, Kriyas quicken the evolution. One minute of Kriyas = 365 days of cellular change. Verifying Kriyas with Western science. 24 Valid knowledge cultivates devotion, which cultivates faith, but to believe without valid knowledge cultivates superstition. So we have centuries of superstition brought on to us. Now that is no fault of no one. The fact that valid knowledge could not be given to people before their time. It takes at least three Kriyas to have the equivalent of one Kriyas. If you start something from rest without repetition, then you ground the electrical charge. So only the 2nd Kriya “counts” since the first and last cancel each other out. Jesus would say “As in Heaven, so it is on Earth.” As it exists in what you call “empty space” (there is no empty space), it exists in manifested space, mass. So we have to step off this planet to see these things in their true nature. The sages did not do it by the extension of their senses, they did it through the independence of their senses. In the West, we use a microscope to extend the senses. Independence of is to get in and transcend. To do that you would have evolve up, speed up, accelerate this mechanism. Kriyas are an acceleration 30 No one likes to know that he has been following something for centuries and all of a sudden to wake up one day and find out he’s a fool. It hurts him, but it is the best way to start. To be hurt one time and to pick up from the broken pieces and start all over to put them together. Seeing and measuring the “time in an object.” When it is existing in time? The idea pattern is the next dimension. The idea pattern applied on the substance to mold it (or to lift it and throw it) by the mind… Using the Will, the intensity to make it despite what others say “where there is a will there is a way.” 34 Kriya is showing you this. If you can realize that all this is here in this body and if you can make this revolution in the spinal column and an alteration of the temperature ratio, you have done exactly what nature would do if you eat, sleep, went to bed, got up, worked in 365 days. You would have the same adjustment. That is a slow movement. This is a faster movement. It is a measurement movement. One is speeded up. Now, the first thing you will notice if you take eight years to do a certain amount of studies of science. You will find the ups and downs: the resistances, the adjustment periods, the mutation periods, the molding of pattern periods, the saturation period, the lag, the frustration periods, and eventually the new recurrence / the new impetus start all over for eight years. In any problem you go through this same repetition over and over. You don’t seem to get out of it. It becomes like a rat race, you are stuck. Now your attitude has to come back to yourself to get this thing to go into yourself. Now, if you can recognize this, you can speed these various movements up. The various resistance periods can be reduced. The period of adjustment can be reduced. The period of change can be reduced. The period of molding or pattern can be reduced. The period of saturation, the period of boredom can be reduced. The period of lag, or the new impetus, the new inspiration, all can come on faster because it is coming from the Self. We say that is coming from the superconscious mind or Cosmic mind, the new inspiration, the new ID (idea), the new impetus, the new drive, coming from there only because we are stimulating it. We are revving it up. We are revving up the motor. As you rev it up, your brain starts to work faster. Now, as it works faster, the first phenomena is always calmness. You will find that your will is controlling all the functions of your mechanism. You start to do the Kriyas for yourself, but sooner or later you realize it is not for you, it is for the whole of the universe. Then you begin to act for the continuance of life. You don’t realize that things are doing are for the continuance of life around you. The good feeling is bliss. Kriya, when it revs it up, gives bliss, which is joy too. Ananda = Bliss, We Exist = Sat, We are Conscious = Chit, for the purpose of bliss - Ananda. Sat-Chit-Ananda. 40 This universe is here for the joy of ourselves. Real ecstasy is something different. Don’t get stuck in that, get beyond that. Ecs = out. Tasy = Static. Out of the static manifestations. Your sensual perceptions has to reach out of static conditions in order to see it in motion. Kriya is to loosen you up from within so you can speed up your adjustment period / the resistance period / the change period. It can speed you up to experience the saturation period within a shorter space of time. You can’t eat the same food everyday. Every time you do Kriya and you alter this mechanism, you alter the electrical output. 44 Gap in tape. Explanation of the apple in meditation not rotting for an entire year. You are all saints in the making when you stop degenerating your mechanism and Kriya is to regenerate you. A degenerate is one who thinks and generates ID (ideas) that tear down the mechanism from within itself constantly. He may be sitting here and looking at you over there and be hating your guts and he is degenerating. But I may not feel his hate. The hate may not bounce through me and go back to him. You enhance this electrical frequency everyday by this Kriya. No one get into the inner science of the functioning unless he is initiated. And initiation is a sacred right. In the east, it was caused baptism at times. The masters have all initiated their disciples, and that is where the word disciple comes into. From the time the guru initiates the disciple, he turns the electrical charge on and the disciple is polarized or magnetized with the guru’s force. They are linked now, endlessly, in time. Your guru will always be your guru, body form to body form. The link is there. The disciples of Jesus were linked to him. Jesus gave the “keys” to one of his disciples, Peter. The gurus are not longer forcing you. You destroy yourself at your own rate. We are no longer going to force you to accept truth. 50 As long as you want to destroy yourself at your own rate, we will be around, we will let mother nature spank you as a naughty child and you will come back. The more we stray from truth, she has many ways to correct us. She has many ways to let us invent our own self-destruction, our own self sufferings to discover truth. That’s why the gurus are not interfering now. They are not going to force no one. They are marching on. Man is marching on, either to his own degeneration or he steps out of the crowd and begins to regenerate himself, this is his choice. Now, why they want Kriya known again, East and West, that it will be recorded so it is available at all times to the brains of men by being recorded. The problem is that man would evolve and not want to pay respect to any of these personalities because he will get so sophisticated in his scientific awareness that no human being stands greater than himself. And I could never say that, even at the stage that I am. I owe all mine to my guru and Jesus would tell you the same, “this is the way of righteousness, he owes all his to his guru. That’s why he made John baptize him. We must pay the reverence, it is attitude of the law of the cosmos that we respect what is handed down to us because this is the source. Kriya, when the energy is raised and lowered, and the temperatures are change in the spine, it is the equivalent of one. A sequence of three is equivalent to one. One year of natural physical unfolding is equivalent one Kriya. The Zodiac signs correspond to the parts of the human body. If man on earth has the basic ability to accelerate his vision so he can see through the wall, that is clairvoyance in layman language. The Guru demonstrate this to make us conscious of what we are. 1:00 The Kriya scientist does not take the environment with him, he changes himself to the environment and he goes where and when he wants to go. Time and space has no interference to him. Kriya is to quicken this overall consciousness. If you do the Kriya, it enhances those functions at a ratio of one year to one Kriya. You must first shutdown to go forward. In the complexity, there is simplicity. You can bring your consciousness here (Adano demonstrates) and the electrical charge is increased. Meditation is a preparation for Kriya. Kriya is taking us to space life. Adult living is taking up your cross and follow me. That is what Jesus meant. The healing is based on healing the entire Cosmos (elemental kingdom, the mineral kingdom, vegetable kingdom, the animal kingdom, the human kingdom, the Spiritual kingdom) in the physical, astral, and causal universes. Healing on Indian reservations. 1:10 The five senses begin to shut down, the body feels flaccid, the breathing slows down. Calmness, peace that passes understanding, profoundly deep. A heightening of the electrification of the cells. The odor of perspiration begins to change. The senses become more acute. Your adjustment to heat and cold is faster. In the mental realm, your attitude begins to change. You don’t get as irritable. You don’t think up resistances. Then comes the saturation. Then the lag, then the recurrence (new impetus from the super consciousness), a new way to do things. Every new joy is God. You are drawing from God, which is law. God is the consciousness light. Whatever you call him, you have to experience it. Meditation is a condition which you not only go in, you merge and get the consciousness, you come out, you work, you apply it. You Know, you Be, then you Do. You have the right to reject the Master, to keep God out of your heart. Unerring choice is the important function and leads to free-dom, not free-will. It leads to liberation from the effects of your own self-created actions. Until one learns to feel more than listen, he will not understand the principal of mind and its function of acceleration. Thought waves. Using dominant will. 1:20 When the umbilical cord it cut, automatic will steps in and makes the child breath. Next stage is unthinking will. You are molding the child which parrots you. Then blind will, like juvenile delinquents. Thinking Will - trial and error, learning from mistakes. We never seem to go any further. Just a few develop Dynamic Will by understanding the mechanism. Will power is desire plus energy. No desire, no energy, no will power. We have right to manifest and have to pay the price for manifestation. If you visualize correctly and exert this Dominant Will, it will materialize. In the highest aspects of Dynamic Will, you are breath-less. 1:26 The Sages have placed a formula for us always to apply Dynamic Will when we need it and that is: desire or ID (idea) times the energy which is the natural body power, times the Breath divided by the Breath, that is the inhalation / exhalation cancels each other out, and we have Conscious Energy. Conscious Energy vibrates in an unobstructed universe. We live in an unobstructed universe because this is a time / space continuum. The chances are 1,000,000 to 1 that you will touch an atom if you put your hand through that object because it is all empty space. Yet that empty space is waves, waves of consciousness, and this object is different from that object by a rate of vibration and an ID (idea) is what you recognize it by. The impulse of the concentration is how you alter it. So we see it is possible now that what these Sages are talking lie within the realm of application. We have a choice to manifest to convince ourcells (ourselves), but this is not the reason why we can do that. The reason and purpose for true manifestation is to correct our behavior. You see? The Sages all are examples of transcendental behavior. That is Cosmic engineering, Cosmic Life engineering. They know the art of behavior, we don’t know it. So we have ups and downs, obstacles. Every time we can picture the ID (idea) or the problem that is interfering and direct the energy anywhere, we have now psycho-somatic reconstruction instead of psycho-somatic destruction or disease. You live in seven dimensions right now. This is man the Unlimited. Fourth dimension is time. 1:30 Time is relative to the light of the sun on the planet. The fifth dimension is motion. The volition is the desire or the will. Adano visiting Yogananda’s ashram and seeing non decaying food from 1952. 1:32 I’ll give you a little illustration. Once I went to visit my Guru’s ashram in California and I went inside the place, a smaller room, and I’ve seen food not in refrigeration just a little plastic paper over it dated 1952 shipped from India, in a state of non-decay. He just broke a piece to eat it. The rest is still there. You go fight with that. Now we say that is miracle because we don’t know. Logical mind or untrained mind says, “It’s a miracle!” Yes it’s a miracle because it’s something you don’t understand and miracles is the limitation of your understanding but if your understanding is expanded, it’s no longer… (end of tape)

Adano65_ThreeHourMeditationQ2RRNW6 - Adano explains physiology of meditation with Indian music in the background. 1 - In the meditative principle, or discipline, we will shutdown one of the avenues. That is the lid of the eyes, vision and through this shutdown attitude, discipline of sight begins. While we close the eyes and look within and not falling asleep, we have the tendency to become more aware of our existence. Thus a stepping up of your inner consciousness and you begin to realize that the sense of hearing is taking over more. The sense of smell, the sense of taste and touch are also becoming acute to the extent that they are becoming extra perceptive and as we gaze and the point between the eyebrows with our eyes closed, keeping the mind there, gradually we will see a light or a radiance or a luminescence. Now the mind has a tendency to drift only because it was involved with the external realm and this is a form of discipline by trying to observe what the mind is latching onto, what particular id (idea) or word or association or thought or experience the mind is latching onto. And though this conscious observation or conscious discipline the mind sometimes recognize and id (idea) or thought creeping up from the past, some past experience. If the mind is involved in the present now, then the sense of breathing begins to slow down. In the Now, man is given the opportunity to experience his Soul Awareness. The Soul partaking of the qualities of the Divine exhibits omnipresence. 10 Personal vigil is the linkup with that vastness of consciousness from within ourselves. (Period of meditation). Listening with the right ear is discipling the sense of hearing and directing it back to its source. (More meditation). The internal self surrender is a discipline on the emotional nature to the presence of the Divine Life flowing in. (More meditation). 20 Holding onto the inner attitude of calmness in the waking state. You are not the same people anymore after this. You have found the source of your being. From this source, you have to learn to live daily through personal effort of discipline. 25 - O Spirit, Divine Mother, Beloved Jesus, Babaji, Lahiri Mahasaya, Sri Yukteswarji, our beloved guru Paramahansaji, Mataji, and Saints and Sages of all religions, we bow to thee all. Free our lives from all obstacles and may thou be the only love reigning in our hearts and may thy love shine on the sanctuary of our devotion that we may be able to awaken thy love in all hearts. Om, Peace, Om. Divine Spirit, we are thankful tonight for this wonderful gathering for our beloved Sister Helen who made her home available for this spiritual Mahasamadhi ceremony and to all our brothers and sisters in the spirit who have come a long way to gather themselves to commune in spirit and to lend their spiritual power to aid certain Souls traveling through the bardos of consciousness. Masters, as a humble disciple, I surrender my body tonight in thy service that the energies be used to help those Souls traveling through the bardos and if it is thy will, that they may make it to the clear White Light and have a peaceful rebirth wherever they may be. For the symbols present we have the Earth, the Fire, the Air, and Water for when the water time comes to be called for water. Representing the primordial elements from which the Soul came forth, but it must go back to Mother Earth as we call the eternal womb so the crescent is called the eternal womb which Man comes forth and goes back to. 30 Chanting Om and Praying for various people. 32 - Join me in the first bardo, the red light. The Soul will travel up the first bardo of the red light so you focus your mind on red and all these Souls pre-mentioned are gathered in the red light and as you focus your mind on the red, try to think of the words I will repeat, freeing them of the attachment of the red light which is the attachment of the lower part of the ego and the attachments of food, which is represented here as rice, and material substance which is represented as money. Freeing them from the greed and gluttony of the lower bardo. 32 - Just let your mind dwell on the red light and lend your spiritual power and humbleness so that these Souls may have a joyous rebirth for theirs is their rebirth now. With living threads of Thy beauty my winsome wings were woven. Endowed with a spark of immortality, I have flown from life to life. I escape from all who audaciously try to posses me. I only belong to Thee O Spirit. No transience enthralled me; my true home is Thy Changeless Spirit. I return home. Thou hast clothed barren eternity in the verdure of multicolored cycles. In the forest of incarnations, I flit gaily from tree to tree. I shall alight at last, O Lord, upon Thy outstretched hand. Om… Christ… Gurus… As we keep our mind on the red, sending love, freeing these Souls so mentioned from the gluttony and the greed of the physical realm and the lower parts of the ego. (meditation). Slowly raise your hands above your head, still holding onto that red light in the consciousness, and let us send out the sound of Om seven times. Om… (x7). As you feel love coming up from the heart as a warm sensation, slowly open the eyes and don’t move. 40 This ends the first bardo. We go to the water. Oh Divine Spirit, water is our sister that envelopes all forms, yet the mind is not as clear as water. In the second bardo, the mind is suffering with many attachments, still cloudy, it still drifts back to old associations of people on this earth plane. The Soul is not free. Let us close our eyes and picture the green light, the green consciousness that frees them, the green light to go, the purity of mind. As we think of this green light, we send out freedom of the mind to the souls also mentioned before and keep your consciousness on the words I will repeat in the second bardo. “I may lose my way and roam in the darkness of the mind, but oh my Divine Mother, shining, luminous, let me see that tiny taper of divine remembrance of Thee be never extinguished by my gusts of disbelief. I only sought earthly things, but now to finally discover that I can only crave Thee, the purity of mind and consciousness. Come, O Divine Spirit, be with me always. Om, Christ, Gurus. As we keep our minds on the color green, sending them the freedom of mind. May the water purify your consciousness, the water of Spirit. Freeing you from these desire patterns, may you have the one desire for our Cosmic Father that the light helps you to lift yourself up to the third bardo. Om… (x7). 50 This ends the second bardo. The last three bardos are the most important bardos of spiritual rebirth. They have now passed out of all the lower vestiges of the consciousness. Those who are have any clairvoyant insight would have already begun to see the flash of white light around the crescent or would have seen one of the Masters radiating out, taking charge of the bardos. As we go up the last three bardos, these bardos are the most important aspects of the Soul because we are going into an aspect where there lessons on the inner plane begin for them. If they are going to have a high spiritual rebirth, how they handle these lessons in these bardos will help them have a rebirth that is favorable to them. Otherwise, they suffer remorse of attachment to the lower self. 52 We go to the third bardo, which is gold symbolized by the fire, already it’s there, which is the Cosmic Vibration or Holy Ghost and since this is the Aquarian Age, the holy breath, or Kriya, is the one that liberates us. Since they have not had initiation into Kriya, we do it by proxy and when you join me in chanting Om, I will do the Kriya on the third bardo for them. As I raise my hands, we just say Om (they do this). We will keep our minds on the golden light and here we will chant “Door of My Heart” together. I’ll lead the chant, so the words aren’t very difficult, but as you chant “Door of My Heart” with me and the Kriya being done by proxy, their lessons begin on the heart chakra for them, wherever they are on the third bardo. If they have never come that far in development, whatever lesson they may learn in the third bardo begins for them now. We will help them through. We are lending our spiritual love to them. So just close your eyes and think of gold (chants “Door of My Heart” with group). May thy Love shine forever on the sanctuary of my devotion. May the Souls in the third bardo see for the first time clearly that Love, reigning in the Heart, is the true lesson in the physical plane. And may their chakras be open to absorb some of that divine love. 1:00 All those who have entered the third bardo in the golden light, you now see for the first time that there are no devils, but yourself. Chanting Om 7x. Still thinking of the golden light, using the attendees heart chakras as a proxy to help the souls on the inner planes. 1:05 The fourth bardo is the blue light of the Christ Consciousness. If they have been lifted up by the Holy Spirit, which Jesus spoke as the Holy Comforter or Cosmic Vibration, then their hearts and their heart chakras will be opened up for them to a certain degree of how much they can take and hold onto of that divine light. As we try to help them to go the fourth bardo or the Christ Conscious light, which is blue, how much they will be able to hold of that light to get a glimpse of Christ Consciousness, that is as much as they can take with us helping.
