We will act as a booster charge for them in that bardo. The Masters will help them to a certain extent, they have to learn their lessons, the Christ Consciousness, the malfunction of thinking. In the Christ Consciousness, man is involved with the ability to materialize his thoughts at will and to misuse his thinking powers is his mistake he would make and his downfall in the Christ Consciousness. Now, how much of the mistakes they have made in their own lives they will see in the Christ Consciousness and then they would have to learn their lessons that they have learn to think right and if they get to a better rebirth, the right judgement, right thinking will come with them. Air is the element and that is all around us and to signify it, we light the match, which is the fire and let the smoke go up, that is gone back up into the air. The bardo begins with fire turning into smoke. We start the bardo with the chant again, “Who Is In My Temple.” Well, let me go over the words so you may understand what it is. The body is the temple. All the lights go on by themselves, no one turns them on by himself, it is turned on by the gurus by our attunement to them. The doors represent the seven centers. 1:10 Darkness like a dark bird flies away because there can be no more wrong thinking in the Christ Consciousness no more, it is all light (Adano does the chant). Keeping your mind on the blue light of Christ Consciousness. Reads a poem “I have bled for thy name and for thy namesake I am willing ever to bleed. Like a might warrior…” All Souls can be lifted up if we can only be humble and ask for remembrance of the Master Consciousness, the Christ Consciousness in our own cells. 1:20 This is the bardo of the hearing and the seeing and of the living and of those who have passed on to the invisible realms. It is the bardo that helps both the living and those who have passed on. Still holding onto the blue light of the Christ Consciousness in yourself, let’s raise our hands above our heads and chant OM seven times. Radiating Christ Consciousness from the heart, let us slowly open the eyes. This ends the fourth bardo. 1:24 The fifth bardo is the most important of them all, the clear white light which the Soul goes back into and there is no loss of individuality in the clear white light, it is the regaining of Self, the cosmic Self, because we cannot lose individuality. We may lose ego association with the body, but not the Divine Individuality that is Consciousness. When the Soul goes back into the white light and regains itself, it will recognize the Divine ‘I’ and see itself in all things. For that brief moment it returns, we in the living can experience it more, than those who are going through that trial by living in our Conscious Now. We must empty our minds of past and we must empty our minds of future as we start the fifth bardo or the final bardo for them. God exists Now, He doesn’t exist yesterday or tomorrow because existence is Now. Where would existence be? Think for one moment, you exist and existence is Now, and only because Consciousness exists Now can you sense your Nowness and you are one with everybody Now. The moment your mind drifts away, it would be like that water shaking in the glass from past to future. When you synchronize your Consciousness to Now, past and future become Now. In the Now, you are free from the physical body, the Astral (gap in tape, but picks up in two minutes) body, and the Casual body. You are One, you are Soul Now. It is only Now, in the Nowness of your being can you experience the white light. Many of us may experience it and many have experienced it before, many have experienced it by their meditation, but it is only through Now and in the bardo of the Nowness, the fifth bardo, this can be your Divine experience of yourself. 1:30 Those who are going to go through the bardo will be helped by the Masters to experience the Nowness of themselves and when they experience the light, how much they will hold of that light and you’ll find how much you can hold onto the Nowness of your consciousness. It may not be more than five minutes or five seconds depending on how strong you bring your conscious, but you have the advantage over those who have passed over that you are in the body and can repeat the process as long as you are in the physical frame. When you are out of the physical frame, the process is a one shot exposure and you go back to the level where you are supposed to prepare yourself for reincarnation. In the physical body, the only disadvantage is you going to sleep at night or you decide not to wake up the next morning. There will be no break between the full Consciousness and your Consciousness in that state of Nowness. Your body will sleep and get the normal sleep and everything, yet consciousness will not be broken. The only reason why we are afraid of the death process as Jesus and the Masters called the sleep process, is the loss of our awareness, which you call identify, but there is no loss in the Nowness of yourself. To start the last bardo, we do a Kriya again, because the Kriya is the Master Consciousness. (gap in tape, then meditation) We will chant “Polestar of My Life” and I will go over the words because the cosmic star or the third eye is the white star, the pranic star which is the gold, the dove, that descended unto Jesus which is upside down. It is five point star representing earth, water, fire, air, ether. We are passing through these bardo ourselves so we are being lifted up, the grace and divine presence will flow in and to convince you that you have had your upliftment. Chants “I Have Made Thee Polestar of My Life.” 1:40 Then chants “Thou Art My Life.” Try to hold onto Now and the consciousness of the white light. Adano reads “The Last Bardo.” “Oh Divine Kali, Mother Nature, I bow to thee all sheltering Mother Nature. Ruler of time, space, form, and relativity.” 1:50 Holding onto that white light, we are entering that Cosmic Consciousness. all our senses are withdrawn into the altar of the spine, right to the top of the skull, the thousand petaled lotus of light. God is the ever-new joy and the consciousness of Now. (Chants Om. Short Meditation.) Now still holding onto the white light and holding onto the consciousness of Now. Let your mind dwell on the crescent on the table and draw its current into you. The Divine Conscious light drawing it through your forehead. Sending the energy to the entire universe. We are all linked to those who are in attunement on this planet and on others. Thank you. Chants the Rose Petal song.

Adano65_Vol1_IamSoulQ1RRNW6 - 2 I am only a disciple and a disciple is one who has decided a long time back that he came to the wonderful realization that he is pretty stupid. He doesn’t know his way out, how to behave among his fellow man. That was me and is me. I am seeking, as a disciple does, to discipline the whole structure of my nature to the one reality and that one reality is I am Soul. I don’t have Soul. This may come as a strange statement to many people, but to those who have diligently searched the truth in all scriptures and scientific investigation of life, will realize that Man is Soul and the testimony lies in those Masters, or human beings, who have achieved this in their own life and have demonstrated it and worked with man to realize it. Being interested in our cells (ourselves). Why discipline? The study of the problems involved in our emotional nature. The book of Genesis and making Man in His own image and likeness… Man became a Living Soul (not a living body). How to discover that one is Soul? The living Masters become important, the founders of current religions. 8 In my search, I have placed the mechanism under certain disciplines handed down by the Master Paramahansa Yogananda. Because he communicated those disciplines to my frame of reference as the most scientifically verifiable way that I have been able to test them scientifically. Not that there is no other frame of reference for them in your own consciousness. In my work, I have to be scientific. I cannot tell a scientist that I believe in a god and tell him that you have to rely on the faith to do this and move that chair over there. I have to give him a demonstrable relationship. Reference points of love and knowledge. 10 The struggle of being confronted by the emotional nature. 12 So normally, if we attempt to impose a restriction on this emotional nature to prevent it from becoming too involved since we want to follow discipline, we end up being more frustrated, more aggravated. In fact, you wish you never started to discipline yourself. Everything that you intend to do starts crumbling. Anytime you become exposed to some real truth and what you thought was truth and you automatically discover you had wished you had never got involved because at one moment you seem to be traveling in a beautiful plane of thought, everything is working fine, you can adjust this emotional nature. Then all of a sudden you find downhill you go. Another moment you find in that downhill moment there is frustration. There is lag, boredom, there seems to be no outlet. Everything seems to be closing in on the person. But the disciple, and as I said I have to refer to myself as a disciple, I am not the master, because mastery is something I have to achieve. As a disciple, disciplining this entire mechanism and directing it to its true creative source, God, I too would admit I would rather jump over a cliff than attempt the disciplines because they are too harsh at times. When it became obvious what one would have to surrender and yet because it was not a form of suppression, I realized the value of the discipline on my emotional nature. 14 If I did not realize that these were not actual suppressions on this emotional nature of mine, the consciousness would have gone into a negative tone or a negative attitude of existence and destroyed itself. But I realize that the discipline is an art of reducing the outward flow of the desire pattern through the senses through the mechanics of my body to cope with the environment in which I live in. If it were not this principle of reducing and turning on and raising it and lowering it at certain times when it was necessary, the road of discipline would be impractical, near impossible for the individual to follow. But we don’t get the disciplines that ruin the mechanism. No discipline is imposed by scriptural truth that would ruin this mechanism because this mechanism when created was created for a particular purpose. As I said before it’s stated in the scriptures that Man became a Living Soul. Man did not became a living body. Yet he seems to be imprisoned in a form called body. That is so far he seems to be imprisoned in. It’s the realization that this form contains the qualities of Soul that spurs with the cycle to make that effort. 17 We should not try to suppress our emotional nature to discipline our lives and call it discipline. We should try to understand our emotional nature. The only way we can understand our emotional nature is to take those very codes that have been handed down to us in various religions and see their influence on our behavior and those very codes that have become legislation in our convention that holds us in a psychological pen for us to move in our assembly line existence. It is this we have to review and evaluate to see it before we can say we are willing to accept the disciplines of Spirit. A disciple’s greatest desire is the God Realization and the knowledge that he is Soul and greater than that is the universal desire of God to see the creation unfolding as Soul. You see, this is what makes for the presence of Living Masters on earth plane. They are the unfolding. 20 Now, in this discipline, when you really understand how it functions, you will see it’s freedom. It’s not an imposition or a restriction to your real nature. In fact, it’s the first time you can regulate the flow of consciousness through this mechanism called the body. The first time you can really merge in that delightful, fundamental peace and know it exists because from it everything seems to flow like light. It’s vibrating. It’s the consciousness that works for you now to work in this material world totally creative for the first time, unhampered with animosities, unhampered with prejudices, unhampered with any type of psychological hangups. It is that what you are striving for in your discipline. The inner contact of this inner flow where this vital power flows from within you. Knowing the right time in ourselves for discipline. Monastic, crusadic, and hermit lifestyles. Understanding inner discipline and applying to daily life. Do it yourself joy. 30 The important thing about the peace that comes is that you’re able to work in the environment on the problems that the environment present without causing the nervous system to heat up. Now, I said “heat up.” When you are angry or you are in a state of emotional stress, this body heats up and when you are recollective, pensive, in a state of deep meditation or concentration, the body cools down. It’s very important to realize, there’s an old saying “keep a cool head, my son, you will make the grade.” Don’t be a hot head. Even in these little statements, we start to see an emotional principle demonstrated to us. Watching the interaction of the mechanism with the environment. Beatitudes = be-attitudes = attitudes of behavior. Turning inward to meditate is the gift and the spade to do the spadework. Fruit of meditation in the early stages is peace profound. In the advanced stages, it is the realization that you are Soul. Meditation is only on one objective, conscious unity with God. 40 You have to discover this through your own effort through the intuitive self of man. Meditation is one step further than prayer. Meditation instruction. Dealing with thoughts from the past / future. 50 The Soul, partaking of the qualities of the Divine, exhibits omnipresence that it seems to reach out and be present everywhere in consciousness. It seems to radiate into unlimited existence. Here begins the devotional workload of communion with the Universal Spirit, God, ever conscious of the present Now. The vast ocean of peace and tranquility is all around you now, in the form of Consciousness and the personal vigil of watching is the linkup with that vastness of consciousness from within ourselves. Aligning yourself with God, the eternal light within yourself. Meditation. Focusing the hearing on the right ear. Listening to the audible life stream flowing in and out and around you. The Divine Cosmic Vibration of life passing in this physical form and right back into the atomic structure around us. This is escalating us into the consciousness of the Divine Nature. 1:00 Meditation as your own personal paradise. Meditation to prevent disintegration of emotional structure and becoming brutes. God is the only true organization. 1:10 Truth is simple and the results are ever present. Laboring under the illusion that I have a Soul, I can see the need even myself to want to calculate the chronological ages of Masters of Life. But once one begins to realize that Man is Soul, chronological age don’t really exist, it’s physiological age that exists. You maybe all physiologically old, yet chronologically young and there are great Masters who are chronologically old and physiologically young. That is the truth. How to maintain physiology or physiological youth and carry on chronological age is the science of non-corruptibility or self-regeneration. Masters are living testimony of the one Truth. Our destiny is the stars. God, the creative force, has all the disciples. Becoming free from the illusion. 1:20 The realization we want most of all is this awakening now that we are Soul. Astrology and the Aquarian Age, lifting off from the Earth. What dies, what eliminates itself from this physical form, and where is that existing as to what you will do with that which you discard. Emotional versus devotional. Applying ourselves consciously in a semi-effortless way to accomplish things with a certain intensity of alertness, not nervousness. Brain has the electrical energy of a 25 watt bulb. Light shining in the darkness (the uninformed consciousness). 1:30 Walking the Path of the Masters. There is a reference point in the human mechanism to turn on the inner light. Man is atomic matter, but it is also Spirit. We are congealed light appearing to the physical senses as matter, but it’s congealed consciousness too which is divinity which is up to us to awaken. The body is the manifestation of the greatest light wave. An atomic smasher separates the matter back into its light. Saliva takes solid matter and converts it into energy. 1:40 To build a house, you have to have the ID (idea) first, that is one body form. Next, I would like to put that down a blueprint form. Finally, I am committed to build the house by hard labor. The end result is another body form. It might not be exactly like the schematic form, but they are all light. Man has a physical, electrical, and idea body form. Made in the image and likeness of God. Image is the atomic mass slowed down, and the likeness would have to be the omniscience. If Masters never discard body to free them from the personality complex, disciples would never make an effort on their own. They’d never be strong, they would be weaklings all their lives. They cannot walk on their own consciousness. They would never make the effort. They would constantly try to use that Master form as a rabbit foot for all their basic problems in the world and don’t we do that in our religious organizations? Try to use it as sort of a “genie in the lamp” attitude of prayer and association? Example of Master Kabir. It is necessary that Masters accept pain as a personal struggle to indicate to a disciple that he too can conquer by the right information, his divine nature in pain. Death is here as a measurement from one level of existence to another level of existence. 1:50 Death shows the eternalness of life based on the truth of Consciousness that Man is Soul. The killer of the Soul is the one that tells you have a Soul instead of saying you are Soul. Story of Jesus and Lazarus. In the discipline, never think of the end result, think of the effort you are making toward that result. Be concerned with each step you are making forward. Experiencing the opportunity to try again, to overcome, to remain permanently established, because it is an inexhaustible source of light and energy. 2:00 - Suppression of the idea of reincarnation. Truth is not accepted in mass, truth is a personal, slow, reevaluation from whatever standpoint of frustration your begin from. Story of the monk who went from India to a European monastery. He was only told, “You are fortunate to have found the way back.” The visit ended. It is a slow point of frustration within each one of us that we come to that make the decision to seek the valid truth. Prayer is the kindergarten for meditation, which is the adult approach to religion. The Master will make it available to you by revelation. Diving deep (into meditation) at intervals with tremendous intensity of awareness, this brings on much more. The more repetitions you make in a shorter space of time, the greater the momentum will be.

Adano65_Vol2_DreamsQ1RRNW6 - Religion is a do it yourself thing. It is something you have to do to experience. The eyes are the window of the soul is a poetical description of truth. These organs act like a lens, picking up light and leaving images on the retina and leaves an image which the brain stores. Adano describes the various positions of the eyes and his experiences. One position he is seeing “three different levels of consciousness moving out.” In another position “there is light coming down. I can see light in various colors coming down. I can see the aura then.” If he looks down then “I have a tendency to agitate old memories.” Religion as a truth of the nature of ourselves is being experienced, knowing cold facts about the reality of yourself that generates the true devotional attitude for self. Let us have a little meditation right now. 6 You know some people are scared of the dark, but why should you be scared of the dark? We were all ghosts in the first place before we became human beings and we are gonna go back and become ghosts and haunt some other poor human being. So there’s nothing to be worried about, we are brothers of the dark just as much as brothers of the light. So there is nothing to be afraid of or to fear. There is no fear for God, God is the whole creative force. The ID (idea) is that you are trying to realign your consciousness with this universal truth. 7 - Now, in meditation normally you keep the spine straight you see, and the spine is the actual altar of God, the eternal life principal, in the human body that is the temple. Now, every temple has got some little table which they call an Altar and they have wafer and wine and candles to tell you that the Holy Spirit is present. Man is the only real temple in the universe, all the rest are imitations, and the spine is the only real altar and the life principal is the only true God in all man, but man doesn’t know that. Man has got to discover this for himself in order to be free and meditation is his first attempt to discover the truth of himself. 10 Adano provides a great explanation of meditation. Brief meditation centering the mind on the Teacher / patron saint to prevent mind drifting and experience oneness / bliss. 17 Divine Mother, we who are seeking into ourselves may stumble upon many, many mistakes over and over again, but without these mistakes we could never learn fortitude, endurance, understanding, enthusiasm, courage, and dignity. Therefore Divine Mother, the greater the challenge you present to us, the greater you supply us with understanding to meet the challenge. Let not this source of communication ever dry up or die out within us. Let us always be able to uncover the source of initiative, endurance, enthusiasm, creativity flowing from within ourselves. Let us always seek within the silent consciousness the intuitive nature that leads to the unerring decision. Beloved Masters we thank thee for thy presence. Bestow thy blessing upon this home in which this meeting is gathered. Meditation is the one source through which we can make contact, but greater than that we should be able to meditate wherever we are, under any condition. In the busy activities of life, the bond of communication should never be broken between man and the creator for the creator is in the man. May each one of us realize our higher cells (selves) as the true light of divinity. 20 - Looking down with eyes agitates the subconscious. 23 In sleep research we have various measurements and one of the things in sleep research or what you call the rapid eye movement that goes on, we dream, you see? Now dreaming is important to us. If we don’t sleep and dream to a certain extent, something will happen to the brain. Now, it is not important at another level. I’ll put it in a different way. “Important things first. The more important things become important, the lease important they are.” Do you follow me so far? Important things are first, right? Everybody goes about shouting, “this is important,” and he does it first. The more important these things become, the lease important they are eventually because there are other levels that you are going to go on. You cannot get stuck on that one thing you see? So dreaming is important to a certain level, but then dreaming is no longer important at another level. You see you go past dreaming. Now, Master used to say that you dream by your own volition, through your own effort, and you dream because you have no volition. Now, you can create a dream yourself. You can close the eyes and dream, that is you can begin to image where you want to be in the dream, but you have to take that flow or source from subconscious relationships. You cannot dream something that you, or generate, something that you haven’t been associated with on your own volition. Can you say, “well I want to dream” and stop right there? You didn’t give no description of what you want to dream and somebody says “What you wanna dream about?” And then I says “Gee, well what is it I wanted to dream about?” What is it? What symbol was it? What association was it, you see? “Ok, I wanna to dream about a lamp,” but a lamp is an association and a language relationship, you see? Now, I don’t want to dream and one of the funniest things can happen, you find yourself dreaming more because you automatically set off a condition in your consciousness by not wanting to do something, the consciousness is pulling down from the subconscious. You live your life so long in subconscious associations and memory patterns, they gotta come up. So that’s past. Eyes up and down in meditation, death, and dreaming. “If thine eyes be single - the whole body is full of light.” There is a word missing at the dash. 30 Eyes focused in gives kaleidoscope vision. Watching the inner light and it will explode like an atom. Clairvoyant = Clear Vision. Seeing through vs seeing at. The light inside is like a star = astral light. Any time this light bursts open and conditions itself, we will find it has five distinct points which represent the five basic principles of creation: Fire, Air, Earth, Water, and Ether. We are that in this human body. 16 chemical elements plus trace elements composition is matter of the human body. We got 19 more elements that composes the astral or electrical body. And the 19 plus 16 is 35 that is the 35 ID (idea) principles of creation, God. It’s man. Imprinted on the altar which is the spine. You have a positive and a negative. Below a certain portion of the spine is negative, above a certain portion is positive, therefore it resonates. The Masters tell you to start at one of the higher registers to find God. 40 The greatest relationship in the human body is the guru / disciple relationship. There is no other relationship, not even the mother / father relationship, that can compare with the guru / disciple relationship. It is the only true relationship. Why? The guru is a manifestation of soul in active life, and the disciple is an individual who thinks he has a soul to discover that he is soul sometime when the guru extracts him from that uninformed condition. You see the disciple always thinks he has a soul, he doesn’t know he’s soul. The guru knows he’s soul all the time. The day the realization, the enlightenment, has manifested itself in the guru, the guru is soul. The disciple is not enlightened, the disciple is not free, he is restricted by his habit patterns. He doesn’t know he is restricted by patterns of thinking, IDs that have come into his mind. So he thinks he has a soul. The guru acts as a mirror to him and says “Look at yourself, see yourself as soul, see what soul qualities are, try to emit these things out of yourself.” So if you have a problem don’t say “God, remove the problem,” say “God give me the strength to work the thing out,” that’s the soul quality. When you face truth, all our pent up imaginable fears soon fly like a balloon full of holes. When you realize how God works in you, you will be the first person to accept Jesus in his form. Story of the Yogananda Disciple who thought he had achieved the awakening of the inner vision. Technique versus Master’s intervention. Yogananda said to him “you have been the victim of a highly developed imagination.” The one light you are looking for that you have to pass through to get to the inner awareness. Must have an outer gold ring that is more brilliant than any gold on earth. You feel it, a tremendous electrical flow. People may start speaking in tongues and healing others. This is the just golden part. The next ring’s color is opal blue and that is the Christ consciousness in man. This is not Jesus. “You see me, you see the Father.” When you look inside and see this blue brilliant light for the first time, you will see cosmic consciousness, but you have to pass through that blue light into that white light to say you have really entered into cosmic consciousness or illumination or achieved a degree of enlightenment. How are we to apply divine gifts to our daily behavior, without making it a three ring circus. 50 The characteristics of the Soul is what we want. Once you know the laws of truth, how they function, you can say it and it begins to materialize. Story of Jesus and the roman soldier, “if you but say the word, my son will be well.” Jesus recognized how this man’s consciousness was functioning from a position of authority and realization. The centurion was a man of authority and he realized that this is the way consciousness is functioning also. Going back to the fundamental truth: if your eyes are straight ahead, you are conscious. (Adano gives an example of different levels of consciousness.) You are all radio stations in this physical form. God is the undercurrent of life, a reservoir that we have to learn to tap. The greater the obstacles the man would face in this material realm, makes him a greater saint. Because every instant he is challenged with the decision to satisfy the ego or not satisfy the ego. 60 Story about the Mr. Johnson’s son, Bob, going into Vietnam war and Divine Mother taking care of him. When they were dropping him off at the induction station, the water pump on Mr. Johnson’s new car broke at the intersection right before the induction center. The boy goes into the Army and is going to be shipped off to Vietnam. He goes home and not even an hour after getting home, his superior officer calls and tells him that he has been transferred to the military police in South Korea. While he is in South Korea, he is not on the battle front, but has lots of free time to meditate at the government’s expense. 1:05 - See, this is the peculiar part of Divine Law. As long as you don’t refuse to face it, the problem, the greater law comes to work. It doesn’t come to work, “I, God, am going to change the law,” it comes to work in subtle ways because how is God is working in subtle ways? He is working as the vital life force, the vital awareness of human beings, for human beings. Therefore, God is in Man already, but Man cannot recognize it. 1:06 But diving deep at intervals with tremendous intensity of awareness, this brings on much more. In other words, the more repetitions you make of diving into the consciousness in a shorter space of time, the greater the momentum will be. Than if you just make it a sort of a marathon action and forced and become frustrated. By going a little at a time, coming out, not opening the eyes completely, half open it, and savor it. It’s like a good meal, just drink that good champagne of Spirit and you go back and take another mouthful and come back, and you keep dipping in, keep dipping into it. Before you know it, you are getting further and further into the Consciousness, wider and wider into the Consciousness and more illumined in the Consciousness. (another meditation, deeper and deeper, let the consciousness dwell in the right ear). 1:07 Ok, just keep the spine straight, but don’t strain and slightly close the lids and keep the mind at the point between the eyebrows, the reference point (period of meditation) and let the consciousness dwell in the right ear and try to listen to the audible life stream flowing through the body and around it and don’t be too concerned if the mind drifts around. It’s just natural, but what is most important about the drifting is the reference point. You don’t want it to drift and latch onto to an id (idea) concerning the past or an id (idea) concerning the future. You want to latch on to the present, what you are doing. In other words as the man says, “watch what you are doing.” Watching, it’s vigil, by internal watching and internal listening, the consciousness begins to rise into the Pure Consciousness and the luminescence of the inner light begins to glow and those who are listening, sometimes you will hear the celestial music coming from the audible life stream and the music of Soul. 1:10 - (Another period of meditation) Diving back into the inner conscious, deep in and far out, feeling the eternal flow of life permeating your being in the ocean of peace. (Another period of meditation) Diving for the third time, very deep, into the ocean of peace. 1:18 Heavenly Father, beloved Jesus, and the Saints and Sages of all religions, bless this meditation and grant us the protection to walk the path of the Soul to its true nature and home within. 1:20 - Thank you. (gap in tape) Story about man praying in a temple in front of a Shiva statue. There are many bags and books in front of the statue. He hears the voice from the statue, like a beautiful piece of music. The statue asks him to find a bag that he can pick up, but he could only pick up his. Then a mouse passes in front of him carrying twice his weight in piece of cheese. He asks about this. The voice says “I told you, greater the man, greater the obstacle and the mouse is greater than you.” It turns out that the mouse is carrying part of the man’s karma. The idea that others help carry part of our karma can be a great uplift, but to be negligent and surrender and don’t do anything, that’s a folly, an attempt to escape from ourself. 1:25 A Masters does not remove your karma from you, you know. He speeds it up to the extent that you are exposed to it faster, to the extent that you gain the enthusiasm and the courage and the will to be faithful to the truth that you can overcome it quicker. So that makes you a better person. Now, if the Master denies you karma and make you what it called a life free from obstacles or conditions that interfere with the free flow, then the Master is not true to you. That’s the beautiful part of a Guru / Disciple relationship. By constantly pulling the rug out from under you occasionally or challenge your wits, you know, making you more alert as to where the next test is coming. This kind of making you aware of yourself and the potentials that are within yourself. The God-ness in you, you are able to call on it. There are many ways we call on Divine supply. That is what the Beatitudes really involve, that you can feel that Presence all the time. Now the Presence isn’t forced to fulfill your wishes. It will fulfill what you need to be fulfilled. This calls for surrender for consciousness. Detached don’t mean you don’t have compassion for your fellow man. There are times you should do nothing to help someone than to attempt to do something and help them. 1:30 The child is acting naughty, you can punish it, you can ignore as if he never existed. The Master is awakening a force in us that we don’t want awakened. It has been proven the man who aggravates you to your best development is the man who loves you. Story about Sonny and the guy in the army who has trouble with another guy. Sonny asks if he had ever had to count on the guy that was harassing him. The guy admitted that he had confidence in the man who was harassing him. the Guru only a symbol of God in action all the time and God is who is doing the real force, but God has become you too, but you are not recognizing it so you are hanging onto the guru as some latch. Story about woman who came from Germany to work in an ashram and got stabbed with a knife in her eye by accident. This is like the story about being thrown off the horse. But when it throws you off, it might drag you out of the mire. The guru speeded up her karma to have that injury. But how is the karma to be speeded-up, compensated, clarified or cleared out of consciousness. So she had to go through the physical pain and know that it is being healed and it is all the same Master Consciousness doing the same thing. It could have happened 20 years from now and not in the Ashram of the Master, she might have been a married woman with 4-5 kids and her husband might have passed on and she might have been the sole supporter of the family. So carrying the load of others is an important thing. There is a common bond, the love of the Guru Consciousness, is there in the Ashram. Ashram is a hospital for sick souls. It is a place where the Soul goes to be healed, where you share the load / Karma. Story about Western Indian prayer meetings, they pray for each other. 1:40 In this situation, Adano prayed that light would shine in the minds of all present that this problem would be carried out of consciousness. They each pray all night for the problems of another. The head man prays and only asks one thing, “God, and all the great Holy Ones that hold this universe up. We are praying for our brothers and sisters who have fallen from grace. We ask just one thing: that this morning they be relieved.” He didn’t ask them to be cured, he asked to them to be relieved. It is a simple metaphysics. Problems live, germinate, multiply in the darkness of your consciousness. Therefore, it is in the darkness of night that you are praying. In the morning / dawn we feel healthy, that’s why they do the ceremony at dawn, and the final declaration is for everybody in the room. There are only two men that pray after the head man and they don’t mention the problems at all. It’s a prayer in which Man and Woman is recognizing an obligation to the Universe. His love and his attitude to the mineral / vegetable / animal kingdoms and extended to the human kingdom and the spiritual kingdom. The karma has been carried out. Don’t think of karma as being something bad. The term doesn’t imply bad nor good. The action of lifting the consciousness from one level of accepted levels of thinking to another level of accepted levels of thinking whereby you are synchronized with Life itself. Religion as church-ianity, certain doctrines, certain creeds, which eventually become politics. Another category is organization. Kids call it “the establishment.” They are right. Man is a cultural creature. The last aspect of religion is an intelligent search into the reality of yourselves. To know that you are an organism that must work out certain modes of behavior and gesture, in order to realize the trueness of your nature, this calls for work (and it is ego shattering). It is this part that man should be interested in, it is foundation for the other two parts. 1:50 The scientist is aggravated when you talk to him about religion because he’s caught up in the first two categories, the doctrinal part and the organizational part, but he would be willing to listen to the third part, the scientific nature of it, where it fits, because he would begin to see a relationship. He would see the identical thing he is searching for. The third part involves prayer. There is a tendency for man to get into a mood or gesture or attitude of supplicating an unknown force to solve an immediate problem. This can be divided into three levels: a rabbit foot level, a facing up of yourself in relation to how you live your life, this condition brings relief, calmness, inner peace, inner joy, the inner wonderment of being alive. It also brings the inner satisfaction that something is working through you and allowing you to experience those value that are not normally acceptable in the convention we live in. You can read or hear of the awakening, but the sudden shock of the awakening from one level of awareness to another is something else. You are not ready. It will pull the whole roof apart. If you don’t fight it. This is where love and pain come in to make this awareness of yourself sharper. Masters are only saying to us that we must learn the science of this consciousness or religion in order to manipulate it. Thank god for forgetfulness, you get the chance to experience the Joy again. Religion is intended to reunite Soul with God, a refamiliarization with God. The greatest enemy in this universe is being uninformed because once you are informed, you have no fear anymore. 2:00 And it doesn’t come from books. So the Sages tried prayer as a stepping stone, but that was not enough. The next step was analysis and reason “why do I have to pray?” Then comes along someone who says we should try meditation. Man can channel his thoughts for the first time to be one with Truth. 2:03 - Now, he starts to meditate and he discovers by that attitude certain things that have been there all the time from childhood up to that moment, but he never realized they were there. 1 - He discovers that he is calm, he is more collective. 2 - He discovers that there is an inner light that flows within his brain. 3 - He discovers there is music in the atmosphere that he normally did not recognize was there. Now 4 - He discovers an extended awareness of things around him that he did not normally recognize were there. In other words, he seems to step into time a split second ahead of his fellow man in awareness. This makes him consciousness now that there must be something to meditation. Then he’s caught up in “is it good or bad? Is what I’m doing evil or is it…?” He’s got that guilt complex coming right now. So he starts looking for friends to talk to, but there aren’t too many friends that he can tell this experience to because they themselves never had it. Now, those that he would meet who would talk about it, don’t want to talk about it because they will think they are all nuts. So spiritual people have very few friends, but religious people have lots of friends because they can take the bible and dissect it from cover to cover and debate in rhetoric all over the whole thing and have friends. 2:05 The common link at every time you attempt to meditate, you feel a sense of peace, joy, and a widening awareness of yourself. When I use the word “a widening awareness of yourself,” I am saying that there’s a tremendous intensity vibrating out of your Being to think, to understand, to feel, and react and that this is infinitely flowing stronger, pulsating more and more with greater momentum every second that you widen this awareness. This is a big difference because you are starting to see the infinite, unlimited source of your consciousness. It’s there all the time pulsating and you can go in and merge with it. To illustrate meditation, you are stuck, but you got a way to give some external action and that is gesture to communicate the mood your consciousness is in. If we close our eyes for a brief moment, but do not fall asleep. It is going to widen your understanding of yourself and the feeling reaction of yourself.

Adano65_Vol3_SatGuruQ1RRNW6 - Because how is God working in subtle ways? He is working as the vital life force, the vital awareness of human beings, for human beings. Therefore God is in man already, but man cannot recognize it, he can only feel it. He can’t see it, but when he feels it, it is that condition of feeling that impinges on the consciousness for him to act. It makes him act in a more refined, a more sane, sanitary way, actually a non-destructive way. This is what really works with him. 1 One of the strangest things about meditation is that once you break into this consciousness, you can go into it. It is in there alone that the whole library of the Universe and its laws of creation come out. When a man said that he found some new invention, he didn’t find it by reading in a book you know. He pondered upon it and by pondering upon it, the superconsciousness, or the intuitive nature came down with the id (idea) from that realm. And then he saw that id (idea) and then he tried to impress that id in the geometrical or mathematical form. And from that mathematical form or blueprint, he tries now, in a simple way and sometimes in a complicated way, to take fixed structural matter to put it together. And each year he has got to keep making a new model of it. But the id (idea) is still there. It is just like the automobile. The original automobile in Henry Ford’s brain is still there as he saw what it was. He saw the unique engine. Then when he sought to put it down in the mathematical form, then he started to take metal and mould it, he saw the inadequacy of the physical thing in relation to the perfect thing he is seeing there. 3 Meditation is to keep us always going to the perfection. It is to keep us to go in more and more. So there is no end. That’s the beautiful part of it. Now, in meditation, we are going to run into a peculiar problem. There are certain things that occur that appear to duplicate at times this divine law and these are the functions of the mind too. It imitates at times. Now, those who are acquainted with the youth movement of using acid or you call it the psychedelic experience. They do have a certain extension of awareness, but that extension of awareness is not coming from the superconsciousness, it’s coming strictly from the subconsciousness because the subconsciousness is a reservoir already of that superconsciousness. It’s a mirror. So inside of it, that subconsciousness has all these things stored up already, as a replica of the superconsciousness, but it cannot add more to it unless the superconsciousness feeds it. You follow? Taking acid causes a person to map out the subconsciousness mind over and over, there is no new materials. There is a lack of inventiveness and self discovery. In a real superconscious awakening, in the light, one may see certain forms of human being from other ages. They are experiencing different life forms of themselves. The divine life has no ends, it only seeks to manifest in human form. Adano wants people to locate National Geographic, October 1958. There is something in there he wants us to see. A master does not coddle us, he acts as an insurance policy against certain repercussions. The problem with insurance policy is you can’t collect if you die, somebody else collects. The master’s insurance policy always pays, even if he kicks the bucket, you are still collecting on the Master. But he doesn’t kick the bucket in the way we are talking about. His consciousness takes yours “into tow.” No matter where you drift, you are still locked into his consciousness. As one Master would say, if you go to a foreign city, you use a tour guide. In superconsciousness, you also need “a tour guide,” the master who has been there all the time. 10 - That the the advantage of that type of spiritual insurance. It is an insurance that pays off in either level - in the body or when you leave the body. You know who you are dealing with. Man is made of flesh and blood so there is no affinity with the marble form of a master, but when he sees a human form, he doubts, can it be true? People are too preconditioned by the marble form of one past Saint or a painting of a past Saint. Seeing a human form communicating that identical information and experience and encouraging him to make that journey in, that is something he can’t accept right away because he’s still thinking in terms of his human standard. You can look at a statue of Jesus or the Virgin Mary or St Joseph and the reverence is there because their stature has been established and has been put down on paper to be recited like a sort of a rotation. Therefore, the reverence is there. In a human form, it is hard to see the qualities. You have to see so many things occur for you to realize that this is happening. Some masters you sit in their presence, and you don’t realize it, but they are doing a whole lot for you. Story about the reporter who went to see Maharishi. The reporter thought he did get anything. The Maharishi said “you may not have found what you were looking for, but I sure gave it to you already.” How does the report know what he is looking for? The Maharishi is saying meditation is simple, it is not a complex, difficult thing. It is something that you take it in strides. (Somebody interrupts Adano and gives a long discussion about her experience with meditation.) 17 A good many of us in their own way have actually achieved the art of meditation, but can’t recognize it. For instance, let’s say you are sitting down and just thinking for awhile. You have been playing in the yard or running around and then all of a sudden you are tired and you sit down and you are looking around the trees and thinking, “well, got to go to school tomorrow, got my homework to do, gee whiz, and they are going to the movies tonight.” And you’re thinking, but this is a physical restriction from age zero to age eighteen imposed upon us by society. So you are thinking and there are certain noises are going on, there are certain arguments and all of a sudden you take off into your own little corner, you sit down and shut your eyes, you want to shut it out. But then all of a sudden, there is a peculiar feeling coming over. You feel cold or you feel warm and then you feel joy. You are stumbling right into meditation. You are being forced right into the very source of yourself. Now, because you can’t recognize it. Oh well, get out of this room and starting doing something. Come on, prepare, wash the dishes… Now, let’s put it in the adult scale. “Gotta get up for work tomorrow morning. Gee whiz, the car ain’t running, it’s too cold outside. I should have fixed that washer.” And all these things come piling in. Yet, when a brief moment, a brief time you take to relax. Then again you seem to go back into it. Now, someone comes along and tells you, “you need to learn to meditate.” 20 I made a mistake, I should have said “a good many of us do it in an uninformed manner,” not unconsciously. In a group setting, you are doing it in an informed manner. You are prepared to be immunized against the frustration and the pain. You are prepared for the various aspects as they occur. 23 In meditation, let us bear in mind, that we have to do the work ourselves. We have to be acquainted with the instrument we are working with and that’s the human body. You can’t trade it in and there is no u-turn on the road of life. It is a straight one-way from birth to the next birth, whether you like it or not. There’s no u-turn and it is a one-way run and you can’t trade it in, but someday we’ll trade in a new heart for a new heart and we can change a leg into a paddle and change the nose into a snorkel and have parts bank you know. You know all these things are coming along sometime, but in the meantime, the human body is marvelously built. You don’t want to change it, no matter how it looks. Now, being acquainted with that is being informed as to what it is. Being informed is allowing you to operate it, but you also don’t want to make this operation a complicated, drawn out intellectual tussle with yourself because it then loses all proportions. Once you are informed that this mechanism functions a certain way by the scientists of the material world or by the spiritual scientists of the other world. Once you have got this information established there, then forget about the information, do the work. Now to do the work is to take time out to practice. 25 Now, regularity is important. Now this is one of the hardest things about meditation because regularity entails discipline. That’s why the word is disciple, one who disciplines the five senses to the divine self or guru-ship. God is the guru all in a human body. The human body came along with full realization and meets another human being and introduces him to this divine principle and takes him through this process, but as long as you understand that information, we must now understand the information that is involving a personal action. Now, I’m not saying that one should not rely on the Guru or one should over rely on the Guru, because these are faults in us. These are things we are going to do regardless of how we are trying to watch ourselves. We are going to be over relying on the guru to do everything for us and we are… time is going to say well, “Guru don’t exist for me because he’s not helping me,” you see? Because he doesn’t solve my problem. In other words, I got $50 rent to pay and can’t pay it, he’s not solving my problem. So guru is to blame, it is just as to say God is to blame. In other words, we are trying to point out that in the approach to meditation, the fundamental thing is what this consciousness represents all the time to us. It represents to us all the time the divine creative life. Once we keep this in mind, we are never going to stray, but if we have some other description of what this divine creative life is gonna be, we are bound to stray away into some fantasy, but once we realize it’s a divine creative life and this divine creative life has become us, then we will never suffer the fallacy of being separated from it. We will always maintain an affinity of oneness with it. We will always know that the Divine God is always here, it is never somewhere else. It has become us. 28 Now, let me show you something, why it has become us and why this thing is so important to realize it as such. The scriptures state, “God made man in His own image and likeness, male and female created them.” Now if you read this from that vantage point, you will think there was some little fellow way off with a fat tummy, which is a symbol of prosperity, because god’s got to be a prosperous individual, jovial and laughing, and that’s the sign of knowing what he’s doing, you know, and he’s going to create now, take a little mud here and a little bit of there and he’s going to make two individuals and push them out on their own. If you read the thing that way and try to understand it, that’s the way you’ll end up thinking of it all the time, but if you try to understand the dimension in which it’s involving you, then you will see something deeper. 29 God made man. That is to say this Creative Principle, this creative life energy slowed itself down from a conscious flow to a crystallized object. You can’t go any further than matter, you can only go back to pure consciousness. So, how thick is thick? See what I mean? How solid is solid? You are solid already, you have reached the state of solidity. You’ve reached the state of fixation. In other words, there is no hell. This is the hell, or the final fixation of your… Your freedom has been taken away and confined to dumb matter. You are confined to dumb flesh. In other words, the thing has already stopped here. This is the final manifestation of the creation. Now, it’s all the levels preceding this is where the realizations exist. The preceding qualities, it’s not where it stops, the preceding qualities. So the image is matter, but that image is atomic. That means matter is an atomic principle. Now energy is equal to the mass, this atomic mass, times the velocity of light squared. Now that Bible said at one time God made that light first and every Saint in the Bible said, “no man see God, but saw the Light.” Now I’m not talking of a little electrical light, a total Cosmic Light is light because all the atoms are composed out of it. So we are seeing crystallized light, but we don’t realize crystalized light until we try to manipulate it by our will. 32 Now I can’t move this crystallized light in the form of flesh unless I will to move it. If I wish my hand to come to the kneecap, I have to wish, that means I have to desire. There’s a feeling to move it, there’s a need, and if I move it I have to execute some form of energy. To execute some form of energy I have to breath, exhale or contract, and relax and in so doing I execute a law that is going on that I don’t appreciate, but I take it for granted. I snap and kill a fly. I take that for granted you see? But look at what is happening to move it, what is involved in the thing. Good. A lot of principles are in action and we don’t realize these principles. Now, this image is the universal image, therefore we realize that this image has become us already by stopping at this particular level. Now, where is the likeness of this image. The likeness of this image is the ability to move it. The ability to manipulate these laws or else we have no likeness in it. God, the Creative Intelligence is manipulating all his laws and holding them in motion. Now, we say God is at rest, but we must not confuse rest as meaning stop. We must realize that rest means total orbiting movement as a whole and as a total existing force. It’s there at rest in its orbital movement already. It’s not going to go out of its orbital movement unless they change their particular… You know, one out of a billion chances one object will go out of its orbit and come into another orbit, but they are all orbiting. 34 Ok, let’s look at this now. We know he has crystallized himself as flesh. We know this because he has given us this capacity of self knowing. Now, self knowing is one of the functions of self, but what part of this physical body is self? But this physical body knows. How it knows, why it knows, for what it knows for, he’s stumped. This is the dilemma he’s in. It knows though, so knowing doesn’t belong to the body. So knowing is universally there as likeness. You see, it’s a likeness unto us. We are likened to this principle that it knows. Now, it feels and reacts. What part of us can you say is doing it? There is none. Yet, they all dovetail into this mechanism and this mechanism vibrates as a placid movement. It goes on all the time. Now, we then realize that there are only two aspects of this manifestation, a male / female aspect. Now, we also realize that we need help. We can’t do it by ourselves. If we could do this thing by ourselves, everyone would be realized masters. They would not need in the first place any master because, why we need help? God breathed into man the breath of life and man became a living soul. Now he didn’t say that man became a living body. He didn’t say man became a living mind. He didn’t say man became a living spirit. It is specifically stated that man became a living soul, not a dead one either and breath of life had to flow from some point. Breath of life. 36 Now what you feel when I go into that consciousness is the flow of life that is in all of us. And you sense soul, your own soul you sense all the time. You sense your god-ness, but you are unable to put a finger on it. It is very hard to pin it. You say “well what part of it flows through this room, where?” It is passing right through the wood, the stone, everything, it is passing into space all at the same time. That soul consciousness is going on. Now, you are linked up into it. In other words, every time you realize you are soul, that doesn’t say you can remain totally realized there all the time in that consciousness, you drift back. You see, you have a temporary realization you are soul at times and until you become illumined that you are permanently soul, then you remain a soul. You see, you know it for sure. Now, until that time it is temporary. Even when you are asleep you can’t say if you are a man or a woman. Yet when you wake up, this particular form of the two types that the creative intelligence has slowed down to become, I am one of it. Is is possible that I have been the other shape or multiple, interchangeable shapes? 38 Realizing that meditation can bridge the gap, the sages have come to us, and that’s where the need for the guru. The guru comes up to start us off, to bridge the gap, and that’s why Jesus says “I have come that ye may have life more abundantly.” He didn’t say I have come that you may see god today. “I have come that ye may have life more abundantly.” God is life. Now, who is the room can say he has more life abundantly? I don’t mean material goods. Life more abundantly means that you are a citizen of two realms of existence. While being in this material realm, confined to the physical form, you can vacate the form and go into that unlimited realm. “I rebuke you in your rejoicing because I live and die daily in God.” He was able to slip in and out of this mechanism. When I say slip in and slip out, I mean his awareness opened up and allowed him to see that other realm and traverse that other realm with a Master or a Great One and still come back into this realm and accept this realm. In other words, you are familiar with the realms of existence. 39 We came, originally, from a realm of pure consciousness. Which you may call me a ghost. In that realm, I’m a ghost. I don’t have a body and so Brother Ghost or Sister Ghost, there’s no… We are all ghosts in that… we’re all bodiless entities, you see? Now, yet memory is there, memory of the association with the different body forms are there. You can’t lose that. Now, so, I shouldn’t have no fear for a ghost because I am a ghost already. Now, Thomas said, “Am I seeing an apparition?” “No, you are not seeing an apparition, you are seeing a flesh and blood body. Come, put your hand, feel these things.” Yet this is a peculiar aspect of this flesh and blood body. To show you what is involved in divinity, to show you what is involved in our evolution of life, we are not going back to ghost-ness because we came from the ghost world, we are going on to a higher level of body reality. That is a body that cannot decompose no more in nature. It’s a permanent manifestation of the law of life, but this body exhibit a peculiarity, it casts no shadow. Therefore it permits light to reflect through it uninterrupted. Therefore it can be invisible and yet visible, but that doesn’t say it is empty space because if you take your hand and hit that body, he is gonna feel it. There is body there. For instance when Yukteswar came into the room to Yogananda after he passed through that phase, Yogananda took his physical arms, you know how big he was, and put it around that skinny guru and apply a little pressure. You know what he says, “Come on son, you are squeezing too hard, you know?” He was feeling pain too, you know? So, it’s there. Although that body can do many things, he was still (somebody else says “in a physical body”), right. Now this is the thing that all the Masters are saying, we have to go to this form. We are walking from the lower level of God’s image as matter through a higher level of God’s image as Light to a permanent level of God’s image as non-decaying matter. Star Trek’s transporter is an illustration. The Masters of Truth are masters of manipulating the atomic law that constitutes creation… All these laws seem so farfetched and they seem out of our range at the present, but it is not beyond the range of experience because those who have had those experiences along these lines will say if you meditate you will go through it. It is a peculiar thing. You will experience these things through meditation… Question: What is the importance of meeting a guru in the physical body? Answer: There is a very important answer to this. You are familiar with this house, right? You have an employee that works for you that has never been here before, right? If you were to say to that employer, “here is the key to my house, go find me my notebook of last’s months… I put it in one of the drawers.” But you don’t tell them what room you put it in and you don’t tell them the color of the notebook, but it is a notebook that is very important to make a sale. What is the confusion of that person when they come here? (someone in the audience says “very great.”) Now if you give them a written description of your house and the same thing is written down, but you didn’t speak with them. (someone in the audience says “they can’t find it.”) Now if you as a human being specifically describes it to them, what would they do? Wouldn’t they go specific to the one spot and pick it out? That’s the need for a living guru. He is specific to where he is going because he is already there in the specific form. But we don’t appreciate him because we don’t see the control of his existence in that form. We only appreciate the guru when he leaves the physical frame. He does more for us when he leaves the physical frame, but only to those who he has been associated with. The employee has associated with you and she knows how to talk and what you do and you have to go away to Houston on business. The employee, knowing your habits, will begin to think how you would act under certain conditions and thereby follow your pattern of thinking to solve problems. Now, when the guru leaves, the students starts to think, the guru comes in on another level, you can keep tabs on your employee by telephone now, one of these picture phones. The important thing is to find a living guru. The Master came and he said there were five masters of realization in Self Realization: Babaji, Jesus, Lahiri, Yukteswar, and himself. It is possible to know Babaji’s form because he is hasn’t gone over there yet. We have a picture of his form that we can relate to. Who really initiates? The disciple, the guru, or god the divine principle flowing the guru and the disciple? It is the god principle. It is until this linkage is realized, we will still think of the form. The form is a stepping stone to the formless. It is the formless that makes this divine life impersonal. It frees us from the limitations of it. You see? Now, Moses had a simple illustration of it. Adano tells the story of the burning bush, “what is your name god?” “I am that I am.” Moses had reached beyond the point of worshipping the personal aspect of god and realizing god as the total self now. God in the total self had to give him an impersonal answer. 50 The “I am” -ness of his own higher self was the truth. Now, a layman caught in it cannot comprehend that. A layman who has been accustomed to looking up to some personal form needs a personal form. Until he can reach the understanding that none of these forms is the end, or limitation, of the truth. It is a stepping stone to the truth. Now, the guru eventually doesn’t imply that he is a master all the time when you start to go into that inner realm. I am certain the guru at one point beholds you as brother or an elder brother with the form and then the time comes when the guru has no form and you go running “where are you guru, you’ve gone?” And then all this is light and you find yourself lost in light. The guru gives us strength, gives us the fortitude by being in the human form. Only for that reason, that we don’t assume that we know what this god principle is on its own. We need that physical form as a reminder. Let me show you a deeper relationship in this guru relationship. Guru is soul. I said before god made man and man became a living soul when god breathed the breath of life into man. Man became a living soul, not a body. Not a body, remember you cannot look at the guru as body now, remember this is the big fallacy of the thing, why a physical guru or non physical. God breathed the breath of life into man and man became a living soul. Now, as long as man continues to believe he has a soul, he will not realize god. He will always think god is something separate from him. He will always think god has made him, god is punishing him, god is rewarding him, and before you know it, he will kill his god and bury it too. You know, god is dead, we might as well perform the ceremonial rites of it now or the funeral rites. So man has reached a point where he is already saying that to himself now because man is living under the uninformed condition that he has a soul. He is not informed that he is soul. He is living that he has a soul. You see, he is living under an impression that he has a soul. He doesn’t think he is soul. Now, yet god does not leave his creation, that is his own nature, to flounder because then it will fall apart. If you have an object and it starts to break away gradually and you don’t take care of it, before you know, it disintegrates. Now if this is humanly true, you mean to tell me creative intelligence that holds this universe is not going to do the same thing? It has to find a way to maintain its polarity. It has to setup the laws to compensate itself, it has already done this. This is the principle of god as the redeemer, but this isn’t something detrimental. We need to be pulled back. He knows that his creative powers will diminish if it continues to live under the illusion or the impression that it has soul because he endowed it already with the power to choose and to abuse that power of choice. So how is going to prevent disintegration of his nature? By establishing the regenerating condition of his own nature. He had to establish that before he started to create. So we say insecurity is the game we live by. God is insecure because he needs our love and this is true. This is the only thing he cannot get back from this dumb flesh. He made it marvelous. The birds chirp to indicate they love god. The trees sway and give fruit to say they love god. But man will curse or man may swear and man may eventually chant that he loves god too. Now I’m saying this, realizing this principle, god as the father cannot involve himself in his creation no more, he has slowed down into the creation. So he has to generate another nature within this creation to maintain it, a redeeming nature. Out of that we got the second quality son, but don’t use it as s-o-n you know. Story about the Jewish man and the Rabbi both complaining that their sons were Christian, then the Jehovah Witness says, “You think you have problems, my son has become a Christian too.” Now, the redeeming principle of total creation manifests itself as a sun, a bright brilliant light, the light that shines in man, that no man comprehends, the darkness don’t comprehend it. The light that shines within us. Now, once a human form realizes this light and its true nature, the bonds are broken and soul manifests and he realizes a heritage. That individual realizes a responsibility, not to himself, it’s a responsibility to the manifested creation that is existing around him. In other words, we are our brother’s keeper, but no one wants to accept the implications of being our brother’s keeper. Too much responsibility. Only a master can assume this responsibility because he has come home to the soul nature. He is soul now, he is free. He has reached the two qualifications of God that has manifested in matter. The one manifestation of atomic mass or atomic control, the other manifestation, the total likeness. That is not impeded, there is no limitation now. He is soul. He knows this beyond all doubt because he sees it all the time. Then he sees the responsibility. He realizes why Jesus said, “Father forgive them, they know not what they do.” If we knew that we were soul, what forgiveness do we have coming to us? A more evolved individual has to forgive you for all you do to him. If you are soul, it is highly impractical, impossible nearby for you to go contrary to the laws of creation. 1:00 Therefore, therefore forgiveness does not exist in the soul, in the true sense of the word. You get it? What is there to forgive because you are soul, you cannot do wrong, you are total righteousness, total truth. There is nothing wrong in soul. But man needs inspiration, a reminder. The guru must come in a human form. If a guru came from the astral realm, crystallized himself, and spoke, you are either going to fall down and faint or take off, but you won’t stay in that room. If this person is familiar to you, then there is an association that has been there. Gurus take the human form to bring about the evolution of the human behavior, removing the wrong information that this mechanism HAS soul to make it aware that it IS soul. That is their obligation. They are their brother’s keeper until he plucks us out of illusion that we have a soul. 1:03 Now, to take an illustration, a lioness one day was running, you know, she was pregnant, and she was chasing some goats and in the heat of the chase she fell down and died, but at the same time gave birth to a baby lion. The goats and the sheep all came around and mother sheep, it’s only natural for them all to gravitate, it’s a human, maternal feeling. They gathered in the orphan lion into their fold and it grew up with them eating grass and crying like a sheep, bah, bah, and ate grass and grew to a full grown lion not knowing the difference. One day a lion came down from the hill and saw the sheep all grazing there and he let out a big, huge roar, telling the world that he is lion and all the sheep are familiar with that roar from past lives or genetic action, took off for the hills, and the little big lion that lived among them, the “sheep lion” as he thinks he is, took off with them too. So the lion who looked in the crowd couldn’t figure out why another lion like himself is running from him. So he gave chase not on the sheep, he gave chase to the lion, and he chased the lion until he caught up with the lion and the lion almost gave out with fright and he caught him and held his head and dragged him to the river and he says “hey you, look at yourself in the water and see what you are. You are not sheep, you are a lion,” but he would have almost died from the exhaustion and the tussling and pulling him there that he was ready to die, he had already given up. So with a shear last look, he took a deep breath and he says, “well now roar like a lion.” So he roared like a lion and started to give chase to the sheep. That’s the same thing with man and soul. That is the same thing with guru / disciple relationship. The guru shakes us up. He grabs us by the neck, takes us through the various levels of existence to see reality as it is, to see god in us. We need the physical guru and we need contact with the gurus in the various levels. It is like a school. Up to a certain level you have certain teacher or guru action, at another level another guru, at another level it is just god and you. So we take on a physical guru and through life and death he takes us up all the way to the highest consciousness. He takes us to that level were you see yourself as a sun of god, a radiant light of God. Now, he has already established his sun-ship, his soul nature. Then at that moment, he is your brother, but you don’t lose the respect when you discover he is you, but now it is the impersonal relation. We are only seeing god manifesting his infinite wonder of keeping us entertained. We don’t place a limit on god. The human guru is important and having him is a living form is important. Each one of us has a guru, we might not recognize it right away, but he will come and recognize it. Story about the Shell service station. A guru doesn’t always impose his life on you. 1:10 Now, having a physical guru is like, as I said, the only true relationship that can exist because your parents cannot assume the full responsibility of working out your soul nature. It’s not possible. They are not evolved, they are not enlightened to do it. Now, here is an illustration. Story about the Vyasa and teaching the Bhagavad Gita to his son in his sleep. The son realizes his father is a highly evolved man and asks his father to show him the light inside, but the father said “no, I am not your guru.” He sends him to a king in a remote area and tells the son that the king is his guru. The boy goes there and see the king with the harem and drinking. Is the guru the man who drinks or the man who sits down and prays? The boy has a hard time accepting him, because he knows the guru is a holy man. But if you ARE soul, the mere gazing upon that man will tell you if that man is guru or not. The light would be shining in the man’s forehead. Story about the king’s castle on fire. He boy learns not to criticize the king for being materialist, when the boy is so attached to his books not burning. The king / guru wanted the boy to rid his consciousness of the fact that he HAS a soul. He makes the boy walk through the castle with two bowls of burning oil. He can’t spill a drop, but has to describe every piece of furniture. He fails the test and has to try again. The second time, the king has to come find the boy who is in the garden meditating with the bowls of burning oil. The king says, “have you seen the interior of my castle and all its beauty?” and the boy said to him “The eye that pierced the light and behold the jewel thereby knows how life exists. Thou alone o guru is life.” The man touched him and said “you are now in cosmic consciousness, enjoy it.” The boy eventually found the castle inside his body, the jewels, the seven centers. 1:19 Now the human person is important. Now, we’ve all been initiated to a certain extent, but that doesn’t say if a great master was to walk in, and there are many living today, if one was to come in the room, and was giving initiation. Is there anyone in here who would refuse to take it? This doesn’t detract from the SRF disciples or the SRF masters or any other masters that exist. Any master that comes must realize who is selling the masters in the first place. You think they come of their own will? They didn’t desire to come. They discovered they were soul and they discovered the responsibility that goes with being a soul, soul realized individual. They realized that they are shepherds gathering stray sheep for the owner of the ranch. They are working for the owner. In other words, soul realizes that the uninformed being cannot remain in that uninformed state because it will lead to disintegration of the universal principles and therefore they yoke themselves to this law. 1:20 That’s where the word yoga comes in. Master called himself the “eternal boatman.” Every master realizes the universal responsibility. Adano tells story of Cain and Abel. Cain (Ego) doesn’t know it is soul. It’s only the soul knows it is soul. Cain was blinded by his own ego. Man doesn’t want to accept that he is soul because he realizes it is too big a job. It is not an easy thing to say to someone, “I accept you guru. I place my full life. I surrender and take responsibility of your discipline.” It is very hard, because what the guru puts on us can wreck many of us, but it doesn’t kill us. Adano tells the story of falling off the building, 30 feet to the ground. I prayed for my karma, yes. I had 54 compound fractures, but still he didn’t cut off his life stream. Adano wanted to live in that realm of totality forever. Adano had to come back into the body to learn lessons of the human form. My heart stopped twice on the operating table. 1:24 When I meditate, I build up the image of Master’s form, I am holding back the Master too. Because I am relying on that form to bring home communication to my inner being. I realize I have to break that too and one night I was meditating and I saw the form and then the form disappeared. There was no form, just light, light, light, peace, peace, so I realized now the formless god is the reality of myself. I have to learn to accept, to live with this thing in true love for the first time. Now this is quite a pain. It is a painful thing to all of a sudden lose association with a form and slowly dissolve into light. It is a reevaluation of what the form is doing in that realm of existence for you. Without this form, god could never communicate with my form. Story about Jesus and John the Baptist. Picture for one moment, two grown adults debating about who to bathe who. He recognized John was his master. The masters say you have one guru for life, that guru is god working through various human forms to bring you back to him. In different incarnations, you might be sitting at the feet of different gurus, Arjuna, William the Conqueror, St Francis, Yogananda, etc. But is it these people who are the guru?
