Are these not the forms, the suits, the guru wears, that god wears, to bring the soul back? 1:28 God is eternal life, using many suits, many incidences, many roles of life to bring back what? Not to bring back Adano’s physical body. Because what is Adano’s physical body? This is tissue, it’s a classification, it’s a name given to a form, but what is talking? It is Life talking. Life is communicating. Life. Now it is very hard to say is life male or female? We can only see when it breaks up in the cells and starts to pair off, but actually the life in the male cell or the life in the female cell, is it not life? They are all life. It is all God flowing back so this is what is happening. The guru is making us, or God is making us conscious that we are Soul in the form of the guru, all the time. That we are Soul. He wants us to realize this all the time. He wants us because he made us in that image, he made us in that likeness, that capacity, and he endowed us with this principle of life to know that we are Soul. There is no other way else we can go to it. So Jesus says, “This is the way of righteousness,” this is the way you got to go back. You have to return via the form principle, via the guru principle. Now, many of us can go about shouting, “we don’t have need of a guru in order to discover god,” but you know many a master has said “I’d hate to be in the presence of a man who has found god without a guru because he’s a highly inflated egotist.” 1:30 The masters are coming through all the time, the suns of light, are coming through in full awareness, enlightenment because here are many souls waiting for the illumination of themselves. Only when you have the inner experiences, when he takes you across the threshold of light inside of yourself, do you know that this particular ONE is the guru for that particular period of that consciousness going back. Let’s say if I had sat down at the feet of St. Francis in a past life, but cannot recognize it in Yogananda. I haven’t recognized St. Francis. Yet Yogananda can reveal St. Francis to me through his mechanism to me if he wanted and I wouldn’t see Yogananda, I would see St. Francis. If I goofed as a catholic monk in some past previous incarnation because I didn’t grasp the inner truth. Then seeing it now in yoga form and still not grasping it, then I’ll still going to need another human form to grasp it as calculus and integral mechanical movements. Eventually I got to grasp it. Whenever you grasp the truth, it will come into you, the guru does that. The Sat Guru in a given period is to reinforce this portion of creation, dumb flesh, that cannot avoid craving an association. Adano talks about Ramana “taking the acid test” of trying to die which was suspended animation. At the end of the third day he was called “Rishi.” Where is the Maharishi Guru, but he had a Guru. Ramakrishna studied every religion and attained illumination in all of them: Christianism, Buddhism, Islam, Sufis, etc. and he ended up saying “the way to god is the Guru.” Vivekananda is his most famous disciple. The word Sat means existence already, the eternal existing consciousness. The only thing that exists in this universe is not man. The thing that exists in this universe is conscious life, which we know as God. We know as God. Which we realize has become us in the form of man and which we need in the form of man to reestablish our identity with it. 1:40 A guru is an example of soul in motion. The gurus will always tell you that you have a way to go back to god and a line of succession is a simple statement. Let’s not confuse this with a personality. The link between one master and another is the one principle of truth that is being transferred on. These masters are not teaching a faith of a religious group, they are teaching us the reality of ourcells because they have experience the reality of themselves. Masters of life principles teach only that: how to realize yourself. There is no conflict in none of the masters of life though they be the very sparks where all religions seem to spring from and maintain itself. They talks of light, they talk of sound, they talk of divine consciousness and peace. You need some human form to tell you how to get out of it. It is part of the search to find a guru, but is it part of the search to latch on like a leech? The guru is an example of what oneself is to aspire to. The only relation that does exist is the guru / disciple relationship, but this is an impersonal statement. I accept the physical form as a measurement to reach my inner self. The characteristics of a guru is not to demonstrate miracles. What I need from the guru is how to behave in a world comprising human beings and verbal communication where a word can hurt your for years or make you your best friend for years. I want to know how to survive and life in this universe where this is happening, where love permeates the communication. Where human association is communicating because this leads me to freedom, it leads me to an understanding of self. The beatitudes entail attitudes of behavior. Even though you listen to me, you cannot honestly say “I am Soul.” But if you see a living Master and can walk in living consciousness with him, then you know soul. The guru is there to make you conscious. A man cannot go out of this frame without having one physical contact with a human being who is in that level of consciousness. If god is working through us, he is bringing that man into your life. 1:50 Adano demonstrates giving the students in the room “the truth.” You see, truth is demonstrable, it’s not something you merely talk, you have to live. What can you recognize in that gesture? When we step out, apart from the pull of this mechanism, and feel the free flow of consciousness, you’re always in the presence of guru. Now, your guru is always in a state of illumination. If you have never met him, he’s still standing next to you because you don’t make an attempt to step out of the pull of your body or the demands of your body. He’ll wait ‘til the time comes when he’ll have to break you from that confinement and then you can walk out or be in it. When they have walked out they have seen various masters waiting to greet them. This is flesh and it isn’t go accept what is going on on the inner plain. This flesh is afraid and God made it in such a way to wants to huddle together with like monkeys. 1:54 You see, meeting a living master is one who’s enlightened already. He’s gone the whole gamut, he’s already pure consciousness. He’s in god realization. He can come to you in many levels. He can come to you while he’s in his physical body living way off in India in a physical body and make you conscious that he is the guru and he may never come to you after that in the physical body. He may come to you while living in India in a physical body, come to in the inner plane, make you conscious of his existence. He’s in the human body, he’s not dead yet, he’s in the human body and yet may never come to you in the physical body and you ask yourself, “why is that?” and he may not come to you that way, he may come to you in a travel through the physical body and wait for you to slowly recognize him and work through and keep fondling you on ‘til you break that association that when he’s away now from you in vision or physical sight, you have to learn to realize to see in his eye now. What is that guru really doing? Don’t you see he’s performing something for a reason? He’s freeing you from certain conditions you have long mastered or certain conditions you need to master about yourself. Story of Adano and Yogananda not meeting in the physical body. Also the story of Kriyananda talking to Yogananda about Adano that he should come to California to teach there. Yogananda replied, “What is he going to do here, look at the palm trees? He’s doing the work he is supposed to do where he is.” Can a teacher can teach via a public address system and you still know he is on the top floor? It’s a matter of how you setup your consciousness. You see what I am saying? Adano decided to stay home in Canada and meditate. He got a letter from California on Friday with Kriya instructions and saying “prepare yourself to be initiated tomorrow at seven o clock.” Adano helped his friends go to California to get initiated. He sat in his house to meditate. At just about 7 o clock, like some great force had drawn all the air out of the room, there is not a single noise, and I can hear like all the atoms in nature vibrating and I felt a thumb knock my forehead right here for about two seconds and I was gone. 2:00 I didn’t go nowhere out of my body but my consciousness was all in space, back and forth. I knew peace, peace, peace, peace, peace, peace, and levels of peace kept going on and I realized that I didn’t have to go looking for the physical guru. I had long been freed from that imprisonment of physical form, that the guru now was eternal life and heard deep down in my consciousness, this consciousness vibrating, “It is done.” 2:01 But I never saw the Master. I meditated for years after that, I never saw Him in any other astral form. He never came to me in an astral form. He only came once. The day He died, or He left the body, I was going home and I arrived there was a telegram and I opened the telegram and I read He just passed away. Well, there I’m going to show you human recriminations. I started to swear and I kick up the floor, I says, “What a damn food I was, I should have gone and seen the man while He was in a human body. You need to see the Sat Guru in the human body. You must have human contact.” And here I’m going through exactly the rigmarole, talk of the same thing, “I should have gone, I lost… what have I gained? I’ve only got a few inner experiences and building my consciousness here.” The thing that was more important now was to see that human body. See how human form wants human form? A lion needs a bigger lion to look up to. I need to go and see. Deep down there was something still missing, I should have gone and seen. No sooner I had said that I felt my eyes close down and I heard like a huge voice say, “Who is dead? I am alive! You know it all.” Like that I knew He was lifting off karma from my mechanism like mad and I can see all these things moving in consciousness. From that day on I knew the whole course of the SRF without even looking at it and I didn’t even read the balance. The thing had worked, what I wanted most to know about. I wanted His blessings from that realm without having to go and say, “I was touching human form and satisfying human form.” I wanted to know that really, divinity was working from any level, from any time and space, it could reach out to man and touch him. In other words, I was trying to really appreciate His existence in California which I called “the podium of the church,” and Canada where I was living, “pew 93 at the back of the church.” And all of the Masters were (inaudible) above me and I’m sitting back here trying to peek through the clouds to see where the Guru is, but at last I can feel that light coming down was enough for me because this was how I had already accepted the Guru consciousness. I was no longer looking for physical form no more. You are trying to achieve soul awareness, not body awareness. I’ll tell you why the human form needs it. We are nurtured out from the principle of sensation, of touch, it is the only true sensation besides seeing and heard and tasting and smelling. When I look at the universe I touch you through my eyes, I can touch you through my hearing, I can touch you through my nose. But this is inferior to just touching. The is a tremendous cellular need for touch. 2:05 Love can only be transferred in a profound way between two beings except by touch and the profoundness of a Master’s love for his disciple is most enjoyable when you go out and get a physical touch from him. There is no greater physical association after that because this is something you have lived through in a biological way with him. Now, that sensation, that electrical charge that has been transferred and it is tingling through your body. If it remains years after he has gone to other forms of existence and you can reach out and feel it, this is what will keep your faith going and what will keep your devotion going. Once you know, it is a reassuring effect, that this consciousness can reach out through time and space, through dense matter and affect you. This is a greater realization, you are not hanging onto the gurus shirt tails. Story about cat and kitten, the cat takes the kitten and moves it. This is like total surrender to the guru.

Adano65_Vol6_DivinityRRNW6 - You only get those things you need and abundantly. You don’t want what you don’t need. In consciousness, there is an inexhaustible source of supply as well as an inexhaustible source of fulfillment in relation to the eternal life of the Self. This eternal principle is what makes for Divinity. Guru Disciple relationship is a drama whereby we work in this process. Eventually to be free from the form of Guru knowing that God is the true Guru, the I AM self is the real Guru. Making us Lord of our Self. A truth that free us all. Lord of Self is the truth of our mechanism. There is no sense of inadequacy in Self. The great Masters have said, there is no thought that can go unfulfilled. Prayer is a method of evaluating / triggering the thinking process into an action. The desire pattern plus the motivation and the knowledge of the feeling / reacting principle that allows us to see this God himself. “I come that ye may have life more abundantly.” Abundantly is the fulfillment of this principle. Adano calls himself “the cleanup man of the Saints.” Adano shows the four steps to Divinity through daily meditation: 1. Art of conscious sleep, 2. Art of conscious death, 3. Art of projection, resurrection, 4. Art of conscious ascension. The bedrock of these steps is meditation. The Saints knew the art of word puzzles and how to hide the science of meditation from non-initiates. They could not use people who did not suffer enough and have enough conscious control over the mechanism. Women tend to do this more than men since they suffer more, they are more conscious of their mechanism due to their aches and pains, childbirth, menstruation, etc. Saints have three types of students. 1. Outer ring: Sees the Saint as a cafeteria. 2. Second ring: Picked to stay with one movement until he got frustrated. 3. Inner ring: Volunteered no matter what the Saint did to them. 10 Meditation is an anagram. Adano goes through Mental, Energy, Directing, Individual, Thought, Actions / Activities, Towards, Intuitive awareness (to the independence of the senses), Observation and Oneness, Nature / Noumenon. 20 Discussion of male versus female. We are here to polarize ourcells. Conscious sleep is needed because we do not know if we are a man or a woman in regular sleep. A dream is a playback of consciousness. Do we know WHO we are when we are asleep? You cannot grow in Divinity if we are unconscious. 28 We must know what the word Divinity means before we can say we are growing in it. The whole of this cosmic experience, the totality of it is in a state of motion, spinning. It’s not in a state… it’s not stopped, it’s spinning all the time, it’s in movement. There is not one thing in this universe that can say it’s stopped. It’s in motion all the time. Right in this… between these two hands, there is millions and millions of things are in motion and this room you are bombarded by radio waves, electrical waves, television waves, thought waves, and everything. It is all here. There’s no such thing as empty space, never was, never will be because it’s conscious energy, but we don’t know what this conscious energy represents to us and lack of the knowledge of it’s reaction on us, we try to placate, or would you say, seek the next best solution out of weakness in consciousness. The next best solution would be “god” and we throw the burden on that name, you see? We don’t relate this thing to our-cells (ourselves) that this name we call god in reality has become us. You see? But we are not god. This divinizing force, this spinning force has become us at certain rates or vibration, certain speeds. The Cosmic Divine power is existing as us, it became us by different speeds. 30 But unconsciousness is not a “wholesome” state to develop divinity. The next day you start the problems all over again, unwholesome and “degenerative.” It is tearing down the mechanism, leading it to early frustrations and decay. If the mechanism is atomic energy, it should last and last. We must learn conscious sleep, a few minutes revitalizes the body as much as eight hours of sleep. Scientists have confirmed this. God is the Divine Simplicity and the Divine Law and out of this knowledge we get Devotion and out of this Devotion we get Faith, which is freedom. But we need a technique to apply this. Prayer is a technique of thought transmission to activate the cosmos to bring about in your life what you need. Thought waves travel faster than the speed of light. 38 Man is a living Atomic Principle. He is a living, miniature Universe. Now, his aim is Cosmic Consciousness, but that’s just the beginning of his existence. We are moving toward cosmic consciousness not at the end, as the completion of our evolution, but not the completion of our existence. You see? Theoretically we evolve up to Cosmic Consciousness, which is our divinity of our-cells (ourselves) from there on we must move on to Cosmic Existence with our neighbors in the cosmos. See “in my Father’s House there are many mansions. I go to prepare a place for you. If it were not, I’d tell you.” So he was speaking already of cosmic Existence in relation to Cosmic Evolution. Conscious sleep is the first step to revitalize the body consciously and recognize you have access to this force passing through you. It enters the body through the Medulla Oblongata. 40 Adano gives them a meditation lesson, keeping the spine straight and gazing at the point between the eyebrows. In the waking state, we need methods to revitalize us besides drugs and food. 50 - We alter our-cells by the temperature ratios within our-cells we now correct all the magnetic repulsions and attractions within our-cells. Conscious sleep does a part of this correction and we can recall this, it will have the same effect as if we had taken a few minutes. The next step is called Conscious Death, which will scare many of us. One of the testimonies of Conscious Death and its result is a non-decaying body. This is brought on by the volition upon the life stream via the mechanism to perform certain work. This would be a Saint or Holy Man, but this is a cosmic heritage, a cosmic goal, locked up in the mechanism, that all men are heir to. One simple technique of getting close to Conscious Death is through Conscious Sleep. In Conscious Sleep, we have conscious, sensory motor relaxation. In Death, we have unconscious, sensory motor, organic relaxation. The heart is only a pump, the life is always dormant in the medulla through the spinal canal. It is called Kundalini, but there is no Kundalini, no snake in the spine, it is simply individualized life current stored up there in a residual way and precipitated, awaiting to be released out of there by the slow process of decomposition. The cells are transmuting, in the process of change. 57 Conscious death would be ability then to shutdown the five senses, slowly eliminate the respiratory function, not by forcing it, by a natural shutdown and the same time, lungs and heart would shutdown, and the life current would slip now via the medulla and step out. For the first time you would feel like you’re two individuals. There a lighter you, transparent, and a heavier you, sitting and reclining. Now this is possible. Now, it is also based on the very fundamental technique of meditation. The mental energy being directed independent of the senses. You see? It is always independent and stepping out. For the first time you step out and you get what is called a split in two parts, you see one part as pure light and you feel it and the other part is here with you. Now there is a linkage, just like McDivitt stepped out of the satellite and was hooked in by an umbilical cord to feed him from the satellite. When we step out in a conscious way, in a conscious way, we have the same connection. Now this is not a permanent way. Paul knew the art of conscious “stepping out” of the mechanism. He knew he was not the body. The body is like a suit. We need to verify this because of the tremendous fears that follow us in death. Hells are ideas patterns of your own thinking, waiting for you to see yourself. Story of Omar Khayyam poem, “I myself (my-cell) am the heaven (haven) and the hell (held).” 1:00 Story of Jesus and Jairus’ daughter. Jesus knew the difference between death and sleep. We’re not here to run away from the body, if you do, it will find you in another angle. This mechanism has a “time clock” period for the Soul Principle to grow, that’s why we don’t exhibit Cosmic Conscious until the process is complete. This is spiritual volunteering process. Adano has the group experience “separating.” (short “meditation”) Why we cannot step out completely is because of shame. Why shame? The more you cover the body with garments, the more you are attached to garments. Like coming out of the shower and hiding yourself with a towel. The more you lose the sense of shame, you will see the body is also a suit, you will feel a distinct separateness. We have a link like the satellite had a link to the astronaut that stepped out, he is able to work now on that satellite. He is able to work in this dimension. Now, the third step leads to conscious resurrection. What are you resurrecting. This body. The Masters say death is unnatural to the body. If the body can’t rot, it automatically tells you that you can resurrect it. Each cell is a living universe to itself, impregnated with vital power, the Universal Christ Consciousness. 1:10 There comes a time when one will notice that occasionally he doesn’t have a shadow. Lahiri Mahasaya demonstrated this all the time because every time they photographed him there was no registration in the camera. He gives a technique called Kriya. It will lead to Ascension, deathlessness, like Jesus and Babaji. The final technique is ascension. The energy naturally circulates through the law of gravity, but it will take you a million years to have glimpses of Ascension. The Guru points out how the acceleration is possible in simple things because God is simple, the truth is simple if you can pick it out and apply it. When your consciousness is anchored or united with this energy it will rise. You can have many other mystical experiences that have nothing to do with Ascension. We get glimpses of it in ourselves occasionally, making a movement in the spine. Do you ever walk in the room and feel out of place and feel your whole body vibrate? And it goes so fast and comes down back that your mind can’t keep up with it. The two can’t seem to go together, one seems to outrun the other. The life principle seems to outrun the mind principle. 1:18 Now, when the individual goes through this principle of raising it or ascending in the spinal column and correcting this mechanism now, the first manifestation is extension of life in the body. We begin to extend the life principle in the body. The decay principle is arrested, you see? Now Kriya, as a science, by its very initial start starts to prevent or lessen the decay of the tissues by added oxygen taken into the mechanism. The atoms of those oxygen are transmuted into pure energy. The pure energy now revitalizes the mechanism and causes it to ascend. Altering the temperature also can slowdown the breakdown rate. Also altering the food intake can alter that condition. 1:20 We regulate our food intake, we give the mechanism a little more rest, if we regulate the temperatures, we allow the body to vibrate. But you need to work according to Cosmic Will. You need to adjust to the environment through consciousness within ourselves so we can work. The principles are to work for the next individual who is ill with his problems. You being in a better control of your mechanism, can help him overcome his problems, selfless service. But once you have healed two or three individuals, sooner or later you get involved in personalities. The only prayer that is valid is the emanating of life via your mechanism to all levels of existence, that is to the kingdoms: elemental, mineral, vegetable, animal, human, and spiritual kingdom and within yourself. We must function, we must render service, no matter what the environment. The mere fact that you breathe is service already. Human beings are the highest form that the Life Principle works through and that highest form is to correct things in relation to your consciousness. The Gurus are saying that if you lift this energy in, in your mechanism daily, sooner or later you will adjust and have the mechanism to work. Man has a right to be a Saint just as much as he has the right to be a progressive, evolving mechanism. It is a balance of spiritual and material, inner and outer worlds. Cosmic Consciousness has more to offer and cosmic existence has more to offer. If the Sages remained stagnant, then the whole of humanity would be stagnant. 1:30 If we don’t function this way, we bring chaos into our lives by not establishing our right to truth. Life is renouncing you because Mother Nature would not vibrate to you if you don’t fit the process. Life must function abundantly in all phases. Your attitude via these phases is an abundant principle too. We are servitors in cosmic existence. 1:33 Man must have his development evenly balanced out. So while he is evolving physically, he has to evolve mentally and he has to evolve spiritually, but it is easier to evolve spiritually than it is to evolve materially or in the physical plane because it’s easy to withdraw from the responsibilities of the world, hide in a cave, look at yourself and say “well, the world has treated me in a rough way. I don’t need the world. I can sit down and be” and I sit down and be. Yes, it’s alright, it’s good, you come home to yourself, but you’ll never find none of the Masters staying there because they get up and go out. Every one of these men, after they came back to their inner self, got up and worked. So we say, greater than the man of action, greater than the man of devotion, greater than the man of meditation or wisdom, is the man of conscious activity, the realized man. He is consciously active all the time, he’s not running, he’s here, he’s working, he sees and anticipate in consciousness. He is living, he’s not afraid you see? He knows where he’s going. Now, he infuses you with strength all the time and the first thing in any evolution, or freedom in this evolution, is courage and strength. If you don’t got it, you ain’t got it, and then you are suffering with the weaknesses. If you’ve got the weaknesses and you don’t have the courage to face up now where you are and work, you can’t go to the next freedom. 1:35 Now, the next freedom is freedom from hate, which is love, cosmic love. Everything has to be cosmic love. Now as you graduate from that next freedom, you go into what is called enlightenment, freedom from the ignorance, the ignoring of the laws of life. You begin now to function with the laws of life and as you free yourself from that ignorance, then comes on your illumination, your cosmic nature concerning man on this planet. Now, the first experience in the cosmic nature would be social cosmic consciousness via tourism. Your interest in man as a whole, not just you yourself. Most of us run away and hide in a cave looking for our own cosmic consciousness for ourselves. This is also self interest, this is also ego, it’s not cosmic realization. You see the masters are pointing out we don’t want a cosmic consciousness for the world, we want it for ourselves. We want to know we have something in ourselves that is unique. It’s not true. This is a natural law that will come regardless of ourselves when we are ready for it too. That is by to say the grace of god, it descends on us. This is a principle that where the Christian saints have transcended. They have willingly allowed the grace of god to pour down. You see? They did not go out to look for the thing for themselves personally. They wanted the thing to come down from on high. 1:37 Now the second phase of this cosmic consciousness would be when you sit down in your home, wherever you are, and step out and recognize the duality, recognize the twofold part of your being. When you do that, sooner or later you are able to have this whole awareness and see it. Now, having it isn’t having it for all mankind because if you know that “thou shalt have none other gods, but me” and “love your neighbor as yourself,” then you see that your own self is locked up in the other individual and it’s struggling in a body form. Though you know you’re everything that doesn’t say that form in which you are temporarily imprisoned by the thought block is functioning correctly, you see? Now, you have to look for that and realize “there for the love of God go I” but what am I doing, am I just sitting back? I know that person will work out his karma, good, but am I giving the necessary vibrations that would ease the tensions in his unfoldment? So when we say we are healing now, I’m not healing one individual no more, I’m healing the entire creation back that each one unfold out, because I’m healing myself. “Physician, heal yourself.” You’re healing back yourself, from your higher self. You’re healing this force. So you have to vibrate now and think of the elemental kingdom, seeing them in a state of light and peace, you have to see the entire mineral kingdom, which we took all our substances from and vibrate it back, we have to send the same thing to the vegetable kingdom, we have to send the same thing to the animal kingdom, the human kingdom, and we have to send it to the spiritual kingdom, and the cosmic principle in ourselves. Now we realize we’re moving to a certain destiny. The truth is we are threefold in nature like a three legged stool. No leg is more important than the other, your physical well-being, your mental environment your mental well-being, your spiritual environment and your spiritual well-being, but they don’t work independently, they must work collectively. 1:40 Scientists is not far off from the mystic. They are crossing each other, the pendulum is swinging. The scientist is coming by the senses video to the invisible realm. Mystic is coming from the independence of the senses back to the physical realm. They have to cross. Questions. What this freedom from fear give you? Freedom from fear gives you courage. Now freedom from hate gives you love. Freedom from ignorance gives you enlightenment and freedom from self interests gives you cosmic nature or cosmic consciousness. Question: What do you mean by self interest? Any action that should center around your own immediate needs to the exclusion of others is self-interest. You see, the moment you include others, you have begun to exert your cosmic nature. “SELF” but not “self.” The Cosmic Self is unique. The higher self is interested in the whole. How do you differentiate cosmic actualization from ascension? Actualization you are identified with the thing actually and therefore possess the ability to materialize your thoughts at will. The ascension is that these forces ascend within you by your consciousness to adjust to any condition you find yourself in. You see there is an old saying “if you can’t beat them join them.” But this is not true as far as the masters are concerned. Is just a stopgap. The words use, abuse, abstinence, self-control. First thing you use the thing and then you abuse the thing and because you abuse it and your hurt, you don’t try to control, you learn to abstain. There is where the masters say, “nature has forsaken you.” Just like you say “if you can’t beat them join them.” It is not true. If you are in any sense a realized individual you will see that this is only a stopgap for a lack of spiritual adventure-ness or investigation. It is necessary for living until we understand the cosmic principle. Then we will see there is a valid ethnic and there is a valid moral. There is valid truth and there is invalid truth that passes for truth. We must be able to separate the invalid truth from the valid truth. This is where meditation comes in. The day the Guru stops picking on me is the day I will cry. Meditation gives you the unerring choice. In the mystic life timing is the essence of success. Adano explains how the energy shifts in the mechanism. 1:50 Bathroom is the ideal refresher room. You take 10 minutes just to go in there and you put your hand. This is a five pointed star. Here is ether, this is fire, this is air, this is water, this is earth. You are hooked into magic (sp?), the mother force, just like a plug and you concentrate feeling a golden blue white light surrounding the entire body. Until you start to feel it coming in, “and as many received, to them gave ye power to become sons of God.” As many individuals work conscious of the vital energies passing through the mechanism to that individual suspension is possible now. You have a self-healing principle going on with you. It will feel like a tranquilizer. When you feel this consciousness coming in it feels like a band around your head and you vibrate from there. Sound waves are vitally important to help it. You don’t want to hear the music, you want to feel it. It will correct certain pressures in there and allow you to relax. Remember to rid yourself of tension you have to be more tense. Adano demonstrates this principle. Volition is the craving to modify. To do that you have to exert a craving with a certain pressure. Mind alone is no enough, the principle is mind and energy. The greater the desire, the greater the energy. But we don’t realize how much energy we release through our desire. 2:00 Somebody asks about healing a broken bone quickly. Adano tells the story about breaking his bones, 54 compound fractures. If they would have healed overnight, he would have been a freak. The accident occurred on Wednesday night, I came out of the shock on Saturday afternoon. The Sunday, the doctor told him that coming out of this condition would create pain so he would have to have pain medication every hour for a week. After four days, Adano did not want any pain medicine. What we read and what we develop are two different things. He tried to fight with what he knew about body principles backed up with his concentration. He realized that he could only fight the pain by biting on his pillow. (gap in tape, then new lecture) Adano talks about the photographs on the wall, Yogananda, Jesus, Sri Yukteswar, Lahiri Mahasaya, Babaji. These are the five masters of self-realization. Self-realization is not an organization. It so happens the name was chosen for the West by these masters. Babaji initiated Lahiri to give the world the Kriya science which was lost after the death of Timothy, a disciple of Jesus. Babaji initiated Lahiri to give the world the Kriya science which was lost after the death of Timothy, a disciple of Jesus. Kriya means scientific union. Kriya science is the book of revelation in your Christian bible. Babaji called Lahiri Swami, knowledge of the Swa, that is self. He thought people in the West would benefit more than the people sitting there doing nothing. 2:10 Yogananda spread Kriya into the West after spending 10-11 years living with his Guru and achieving Cosmic Consciousness. Babaji told Yogananda that he was the one Babaji had chosen to disseminate the message in the west. Yogananda came to America in 1920 just when most people in the West were in conflict with the new metaphysical schools that were popping up. He came to do one thing, to establish the long-lost science of Kriya, the book of Revelation. The cosmic Master Jesus demonstrated Kriya while alive all the time. One of the first statements the master Jesus made in the science of Kriya, “when thine eyes are single (focused), the body is full of light.” This has many philosophical interpretations but as far as the Masters are concerned they were talking about the cosmic light, God. But they are talking of the atomic light, which is cosmic energy. 2:14 When the two optical nerves of the eyes are focused, like lenses of a camera through the aid of light, the photosynthesis and the negative function of the eyes act as a plate, photographs the light, and leaves what is called an optical image relationship in the brain. Thus making you conscious of your fellow man around you as what he is. Then you see the ancient says, people say, or these scientists say, you live in Maya, you live in an optical illusion world. He (Jesus) being born among the Hebrew people could not use the word Maya because it would not mean anything to Hebrew people. Therefore he used what was most common in Hebrew word Sat-an, the natural adversary of nature, the polarity. Greeks for love of personality, took the word and made it into an individual, Satan, some individual with a pitchfork, long tail, sitting in a bank of fire or something, trying to stoke the fires of hell with human souls. You see? That’s the concept that has ended up in mythology. The cosmic science is coming out of it gradually. The Eastern people have used the word Maya, but today Maya, Sat-an, only means one thing as far as objective consciousness is concerned, or cosmic consciousness is concerned, it means relativity, the polarities of light in which we live. Without it, nothing is here. We can now comprehend what these cosmic scientists are talking about through science. They wanted man to realize himself and not be a victim of the senses. If a person would focus the eyes on the point between eyebrows and if you would apply a little pressure on the eyeballs, you would see light in the different refractions of light breaking up in colors. The pineal gland, the pituitary gland are composed of crystals that act as refractors of light. We have it in the outside world, we have it in the same here. We are 16 basic chemical elements plus a few trace elements plus an entire electrical anatomy plus an ideational anatomy. These glands contain certain crystals in them and by concentrated pressure, or stresses, we caused this light to come out. This is known as the star in the East. In the West they say, “the light is shining in the darkness and the darkness comprehends it not.” 2:20 Kriya is only a term applied to the science, which means scientific union with the light. You have to apply some scientific process to unite yourself with the light. These masters have spent entire life patterns to emphasize this science. In Jesus he’s telling you a simple technique, that you are a manifestation of light. You can say you are spirit, a good Greek word, Spiros, to spin. But what spins, force, life force, Pran. This is in a state of motion all the time. What does this force offer in this mechanism? You begin to hear sound also. This sound is the actual motion created by the atomic structure. In certain religions it is referred to as the Word, the Name, the Holy Current, the Music of the Spheres. You are in tune with the motions of the atoms in nature all the time. If you can calm the mind to hook in, you can hear it. If you put a conch on your ear you can hear a whirring sound. When you are told why, it frees him from ritual, you can use your consciousness. That particular frequency has many sounds. It’s like a large rope with many strands. Each sound has a focal point on the mechanism. A trumpet, a flute, etc. In the West the sound breaks up into many sounds. A conch held over the ear will sound like the roar of an ocean. This is the sound in the East. In the West, such a symbol is referred to as rushing water. What we are trying to establish is that if these sounds, in their true nature do exist, then they are universal. And if it does exist, there must be a reason for it to exist. 2:30 There have been various techniques for it. But if the techniques show an underlying unity, then we see there is a slow process of elimination. We will see a science emerging from it. In the Western Bible it says the body is the temple of the living God. In the East it is also been known that this is a manifestation of the cosmic mind. There is a reverence between the two, East and West. If the body is a temple, then it must have an altar. In the West, it is called church. Church, temple, synagog, house of worship, house of reverence, they all have a sacred spot, which you call altar. The underlying reference point is the human spine. In the book of revelations, in this altar of god, there are seven golden candlesticks. There were seven mentioned, a particular number. In the East, they are called chakras. As far as the cosmic scientists were concerned, it meant seven centers of consciousness in the human mechanism. These symbols are all referring to one thing. There are seven candles or lights so if you have a focal point you must have some force coming out of it, a force field, a degree of consciousness. The terminologies are a little different, the reference is the same, a reference point of reverence. These candlesticks were centered around the throne of god. We have a spine, and the most unique part of the body is the brain, the head. We are seeing an underlying relationship, there is a common unity, common bond, a common reverence existing. In the West this throne of god was referred to as a golden light. In the East, it is known that this light would be gold, white, and blue. And every human being there is a focal point in this mechanism, seven focal points, that draw from a central source and this central source emits light of three important colors. These colors have some relationships that give you some control of nature. Mantra = sound alliance, affirmation in the West to generate sound alliance. Mantra = I Am He. That is an affirmation in itself. You are uniting, putting yourself in unity. There is no separation, it’s all Now. They said if this force is in us, then we need to know how to quicken it. 2:40 One of the basic symptoms of cosmic consciousness is conscious sensory motor organic relaxation. That is the five senses shut off, the motor functions shut off, the heart and lungs shut off, and this particular condition has a name in the Orient too, it is called Samadhi. This is not something to be scared of, it is something that happens to us occasionally at times. We cannot merge into it right away, we have to work towards it by the practice of meditation. In meditation, the same symptoms are going to be present but in a different way. The five senses are shutdown, the motor function shutdown, but the heart and lungs do not shut down. Each one unfolds differently. One of the basic things in research into ourselves is the basic fear, the normal fears of tampering, the normal fears of feeling guilty of, the normal fears of shame, the normal fears of ostracism. These are things we build up in ourselves, but if you see an underlying principle then there is nothing to be afraid of, it is a natural thing. And if you don’t do it sooner or later nature will push you by another method called disease. If you don’t want to learn truth, make you sick, you’ll learn it sooner or later. So she has a way to make you evolve by pain and suffering. But we can evolve without pain or suffering by culture, by attitude, by organized living, by self-control. This particular process is much wholesome than by pain. If you aren’t in pain, you can’t meditate too good. I don’t know of any Saint that can meditate with a toothache. Kriya quickens the science of human evolution. Every seven or eight years, you have a change in cellular structure. You have an evolving of the brain receptivity every eight years. Story of the pendulum (probably in Griffith Park Observatory) that they push once every eight years. It stops after eight years. There is a reason for that. There is six months of change of the natural resistances to motion, then seven years of a momentum, then six months after the natural adjustments to motion. Now we see the same thing in space. If you want to go higher you have to go slower. Kriya as a technique is a psycho-physiological method to decarbonize the blood and to utilize the added oxygen that are transmuted as life energy into the cells. It is a natural way to slow down the aging of the cells. It’s a natural way or transmuting the cells. The sages know that it will take a million years to experience this condition. That is free from disease. So they experimented on themselves to find the common link. In the West, the book of Revelations. In the eastern man it is called the yogic science. But let us go back to a point that is universally true, the energy that passes through us through the medulla oblongata. This vital life energy passes through the spinal column via the medulla oblongata. In the Scriptures of the West it is referred to as the mouth of god. No doctor will operate on the medulla oblongata. This is where we are fed naturally by the cosmic principle. 2:50 The technique is based on this principle that we cannot have a change in nature in any form without a change in temperature. We also have to have an alteration of temperature in the mechanism, it is called metabolism. It changes by regulation of the breathing, the intake of oxygen. If we alternate the air intake in the mechanism and alternate the temperature changes on the mechanism, one minute of this process is equivalent to 365 days in nature to make that change. It has been proven over and over. Simply by knowing the science, the change has occurred. Why is this change necessary? Because some of us have a low emotional tone and no amount of affirmation is going to alter the emotional tone for us. Music will do it for awhile. We can shift this emotional tone by showing you a certain way to breath in the Kriya. This is something highly divine and very sacred at the same time. You are not a creator, you are generator. You’re altering the environment to suit yourself. The sages teach us to alter ourselves to fit the environment. The Yogi can melt ice with his body heat through the Kriya breathing. The living of it is now, to put it in action. You’re not a victim of the environment, you are a master of the environment, you are a master of the destiny. Your mastering them by altering yourself. A master knows he lives in all dimensions, all of them right now. How did he arrive at a unity with it? By speeding up his cells, by a certain breathing technique because breath is life. You see the universal-ness of it, it is a natural science.

Adano68_08_1IntuitionQ1RRNW6 - Adano tells the story about two people on an airplane with Adano who had problems: the woman who had problems that she had to share with somebody else and a diabetic who hadn’t seen his family in 25 years who doesn’t know how he is going to face it. Adano told them they were the only lucky sperms who made it to the ovum so they would make it now, by the skin of their nose. The only release we have is the mere fact that we made it as a human being is the fact that he has to make it all the time as a human being in whatever dilemma he’s in. The principle of success is already imprinted in the fact that he made it the first time to become a human being. 4 You see, Master once said when a man said to him, “Master you are fortunate to have so many beautiful souls around you in a beautiful ashram, praying and meditating all day.” He says, “Impossible, this is only a hospital for sick soul and this universe is that, a place for sick souls, once it’s healed and can stand on its own, it doesn’t need a universe, it goes on.” Freedom. You see you’re not going to be freed from anything, you’re going to be free for responsibility. Who thinks he is free from responsibility is only fooling himself. He’s a weak person already because he’s hiding like the ostrich with his head in the ground, running from the lion who’ll eventually beat him. You see, a lion is chasing the ostrich and he outruns the lion and then buries his head in the ground as he’s going to hide and out comes the lion and devours him. He didn’t free from the lion. Our consciousness is pushing us this way. There’s a big difference in understanding ourselves. 6 You see, to have or to have not. Our whole lives are concentrated on “having” so we still believe we have a soul, when we are soul. Now if you are soul, then to live the life of soul is a different process. It’s a different sense of focus. It’s a different sense of evaluation. It’s no longer emotion with passion. It’s a reverse emotion which becomes devotion now by contemplation. You see you can be in the world and not be of the world, but that doesn’t say you’re a cold potato. You can stay in this world of pure love and at the same time you can be in love or be loved or wanting to be loved and the three last statements are all ego. The first one has no ego. If you are love, what are you? Consciousness. You’re not imposing, not requiring, in fact you’re the first to serve. You’re giving and that’s what the Masters would say, free to give, free to receive, better to give better than to receive. Consciousness gives, consciousness don’t ask. Consciousness responds. It’s never demanding because there is no demand for it. It is consciousness, you see. Without mistakes, you have no evaluation. Explanation of being love (consciousness) vs being IN love (ego). 10 Now, Master Yogananda used to say, “the Bible is a book, but the real Bible is a human body.” Now, but the Living Bible is the example of one verse. Now, “meekly wait and murmur not” is a verse in that Bible, make your life an example of that. You are a living Bible because that itself is miraculous, it can control the universe. Anything would vibrate from that nature. To take one line and live. Now, this is a harder process. This is something that requires a re-evaluation of what I am, why am I get caught up in such a mechanism called flesh, and what really I’m going to do with it. Now who am I supposed to be involved with in this particular association? Now, the goal of this whole association is towards realization of one’s self and you call it self realization. Now, alright, self realization in another way can mean total memory. It can also be classified as cosmic consciousness. 12 First you have a principal of truth about self. That is “man must achieve understanding of himself.” Now this a principle to which he is dedicating his life to. How would he go about it? One, by algebraic methods of elimination. If you want to find an unknown quantity, you put down X and you try a process of elimination, not this, not that, not this, not that. So you come down to what X really is. This is one process. Now, then the next process is to refrain from, that is a total abstinence and therefore shrink yourself down into what you involve yourself with. This is another method. Now this doesn’t say that these methods are incorrect or the ideal methods or are the universal methods. These are natural, biological functions which our mechanism gravitate to. You see? Now, the third method is called the method of control. Control has to do now with understanding the scientific laws. It has to do with understanding first. 14 Now all the Masters would say before you want to be a disciple, gain understanding, study everything, don’t become a disciple, don’t get interested in these things, try to know more about the mechanical world in which you live, try to learn, try and compare, analyze, then eventually evaluate. Once you evaluate if you can now see the relationship of this value in your association, then you have something to begin to control. So alright, there is a conflict that’s gonna happen. The man who abstains is adamant. He takes a stand. He doesn’t do this, he doesn’t do that, and what happens? We have a very inhibited individual sooner or later because here he is. Now the other one who is exposed to analysis will try and then he too will find out that he may be a victim of latent desires, that he cannot get rid of some of them, and he will be overindulging in one desire. Fooling himself that this is a means of escape from the other desire. You see? We do this too. I love peanut butter because I wouldn’t eat meat or I love this. You get caught up in one thing, sooner or later it becomes an indulgence justifying your action. Now this is again a problem. Now what you are trying to do finally in control is understanding the laws behind it and understanding its balance, then you decide inside. Not by extreme methods, you decide within yourself how to apply it to your life. Explanations of how masters teach, making you conscious of a particular function of inflexibility. As long as you crave to do the thing, you are not free from the repercussions of the thing no matter how good it is. 20 Story about Adano sending a psychic message to three people to buy a watermelon, they stared at the watermelon for five minutes, but nobody bought it. The master can only work through beings that respond. 30 Master is not a being, it is a state of awareness, a complete understanding of the laws of behavior. The Master pulls us to him when we are ready for Him. You have to come to a certain inner discipline to work with the Masters. If we meditate, then our receptivity for them will be great enough for them to use us. So we can be a channel for them. 40 Story about Albert Cliffe, “Let go, let God.” When you come in contact with a Guru and He initiates you into the audible life stream, the bonnie, the sound current usually sounds like a flute, a harp, or a high electronic whine, and you can see the flash of light around you. Then you know the Guru is a manifestation of the God Consciousness embodied. Now that Guru gives you one command, that is make yourself a fit vehicle to receive this awareness. 50 Meditation is learning how to refocus your life within yourself consciously and to act it out without any motivation for personal satisfaction, or aggrandizement, or personal gain. Meditators aggravate others passing by who are nervous through their quietness through waves in the atmosphere. Meditation gradually become harder and harder after the first month on their own, it seems to die out. Meditation is not something you can regulate. It always will out-trick us, delude us. This Divine Principle, there is no room for ego on our part in regulating it. It is surrender all the time. Jesus would say, “Not my will, but thy will be done.” A Realizing Being knows that they are Soul. They love Mankind so much that they go beyond what is demanded of them by pointing out that the Divine Intelligence would absolve us from our own stupidies, our own ignorances. 1:00 The greatest miracles the Master would tell you of is the love of God in Man. Story of Moses and the burning bush, the light answers “I Am That I Am.” God has slowed down from pure consciousness, the pure energy, to matter. The Holy Ghost is pure matter. Christ is the pure energy. 1:10 The light of God is constant and the name of God is constant. Son of God vs. Sun of God. But sound was first, in the beginning was the Word, sound. But we see the lightening first before the thunder because light travels faster, but the sound came first. The sound slows down and became body. The “constant” of light as the Sun. It was eventually measured. This establishes a radio wave. 1:20 Adano says he asked Arnold Howard to calculate the speed of light squared. So a thought is energy. Yoga is unity with God, synchronization. Devotion is synchronized emotion without the lust and desire patterns. 1:30 Somebody asks Adano to teach at his Sunday school class. He agrees. The Lord’s Prayer is a formula. It’s not just a prayer, it’s a formula of how to live within the prayer. The human body is the temple of God and there is a sense of reverence for the altar in any temple. In the body, that is the spine. The forces rise through the spine to the brain and back into the Cosmos. God is within us as the pure joy and bliss and light and sound. Jesus gave a method, “If the eyes are single, then the whole body is full of light.” Try to be always conscious when you meditate because this a personal vigil between you and God. There is no sense of shame if you don’t make progress right away. In fact, this is surrender through love and love is the thing that attracts this light down and makes it brighter. The radiance at the point between the eyebrows takes on three colors: gold, blue, and white representing the trinity. Listen in the right ear. The left is the downward pull and the energy is discharging. In the right side, the energy is recharging or regenerating you or refreshing you. The sound will be a very high pitched, electronic whine. This is the Cosmic Vibration or the Sound Current. The mind has a tendency to drift, which is natural. If it drifts to the past, it will generate frustration. If it drifts to the future, by the same principle, it will generate anxiety. If the mind would stay in the present, now, the total I AM, yet within this I AM, the mind is forced to release the tranquility, serenity, the Peace that Passeth all Understanding. The sense of identity is restored now. So with the deepest love coming up from within one’s entire being, feel, watch, listen. 1:40 Adano leads a meditation starting by chanting OM. Later, Adano creates a beautiful prayer of devotion. 1:50 Guided part of meditation, broadcasting a mantra through the top of the skull. 2:00 “Slowly open the eyes and try to hold onto the peace.”

Adano68_08_2IntuitionQ1RRNW6 - Close your eyes and visualize the infinity of the universe. Story of the pig and the Lama. At the end the Lama hits the pig on the head with a mallet. The pig sees the light and all the stars in the universe. The Lama says “some people are hard to tranquilize inside.” This is normal. 3:00 I meditate but I never ask Divine Mother where I should go or what I should do because the first thing the scriptures of all religions point out, “do not pray like the Gentiles” like the gentle folk. Those who have no understanding, the uninformed. Do not pray like the uninformed who is praying for things. Now, learn to pray by seeking first the kingdom of God which is within you and all these things will be added unto you. That is try to sit down and gather in meditational practice and gathering this consciousness and let it calm you down. (group is laughing about something) 5 After we get into the meditative life, we are trying to feel ourself through the actions around us, through the things that are synchronizing our life. He says well, “this is God’s will or my will, which is which?” God’s will is so well organized that when the experience comes along and you get involved, the information that is being brought out, you see why it is God’s will that you had to be there at that particular time for that particular experience. Otherwise, it is not there and the scripture says your needs are fulfilled, not the wants, and this is a lesson we have got to learn to live with. This is a natural process. As we learn to live with the need then, that doesn’t say we don’t develop our abilities, that doesn’t say we mustn’t develop our artistic nature or talents, because this is evolution. We have to gather this consciousness and work with it, but meditation is to help you to go to these things with a better sense of attitude, a different frame of mind, not a sort of defeatist attitude. Always think, if you are fortunate to be the one little sperm that became a human being, you are going to be fortunate enough to make the grade with what you attempt to do because this is already implanted in the sperm, in the very genes for success. Now, if you defeat that, you are destroying the very life principle in yourself. That’s why the Master says that the worst thing for a spiritual person is doubt… 0:13 Well look at it this way. You can only see the growth in others, you cannot see it in yourself. It’s very hard to see the growth in yourself. Why? Because the sense of unworthiness creeps in because you are flesh, you are form. Therefore the sense of unworthiness… Audience interrupts: Comes from… Adano: No. Audience: Well if you think of… Adano: If you realize that you are… Audience: (can’t be heard). Adano: Wait a minute. Until you accept worthiness as divine grace permitting you to be a human being, not until you accept this fact that it was the divine grace that permitted you to be a human being, to be the only sperm to succeed, then is worthiness a real thing for you. That you are worthy for everything that cometh your way. It’s your worth. You are worth it. You are entitled to it. 0:14 I have a friend. You know he calls himself a Jewish Texan. He says, “I am entitled to be a Texan because I was born in Israel.” Audience laughing: Now that’s real thinking. Adano: And he came from Israel, born in Israel, he lives in Texas. He says, “I’m entitled to be a Texan.” Audience: It also helps us to recognize the worthiness of every other person. Adano: Right. Now you understand why they say, “to love neighbor as self.” You cannot love neighbor as self in the true sense of the word unless you accept the worthiness of self. Where is the worthiness of self if you constantly defeat yourself of being worthy of being a being or being a channel or an expression of God, then you have defeated your neighbor too. You first got to evaluate your own worth. You got to evaluate your own worth that you are worthy to have the grace of Light descend and make you succeed at this critical point of truth which is the sperm into human form into God form. 0:16 Audience: Well when you say succeed, what are you trying to succeed at? What are you trying to be worthy of other than…? Adano: God seeks within Himself to achieve the full realization or express Himself as full realization in human form. That’s why He slowed down and created human form, in order to worship Himself. So He Himself, this Creative Intelligence, seeks to establish worthiness of His own Self in form. Otherwise, what do we need a form, what does God need a form to worship Himself? The form will never admit to itself that it is worthy of the divine intervention. Audience: The form doesn’t… Adano: Its ego will say, “I am more important” but that’s not worthiness. “I am more superior” but that’s not worthiness. The ego can be very puffed up but the ego talking is self pride. That’s not worthiness. You understand? Worthiness is a humility, not a sense of defeatism. There’s no sense of being defeated when you think you are worthy of something or you are entitled to something. It is a sense of strength that permits you to apply yourself without any sense of doubt or backsliding. 0:18 Audience: Well it’s a complete realization of who you are, what you know that you are, say God in manifestation. You wouldn’t say that God is not worth of succeeding. So you have to admit you are… Adano: Right, ok. You ask, “How much is this worth?” So we say maybe ten cents, fifteen cents. We don’t say it doesn’t worth anything, it’s worth something, right? Now, in human consciousness, I mean beingness, we are worth something too. Now we have to establish what is the something we are worth. Now, the more complicated, the more better material this object is made from, the greater is the worth. Now in consciousness it’s the same thing. We place a higher worth, or sense of value, on the realized Master’s presence than the person who is not realized. Don’t we do that? Now when two people come to work for you, don’t you put a higher sense of value on the more experienced individuals than the less ones? Why? Because it’s the application of one to the other, the involvement of responsibility of one for the other. 19 It’s like the three men had three talons given to them, one had five, one had two, or whatever it is, and they all went out and applied. Well what did the third one do with his? He hid it so what was it worth to him then? Was their any worthiness in him? If he himself don’t consider himself worthy enough to apply himself, the being who gave him or the person who gave him something, isn’t it likely to take it back from him? You’re wasting the thing. In other words, whatever you are worth in whatever you estimate yourself, the highest estimate you place on yourself is Soul, you see? If you place yourself the highest estimate, it is not ego now, that you are Soul, then you’re going to realize it in this life form. The effort is not wasted. The effort is going to come off now. You’re going to see it because every action that you perform now is Will of God. Guru, though the Guru or the contact with the Gurus, you are doing Their will, which is you are meditating to discover yourself. You’re accepting the challenge. 21 Somebody asks if helping somebody takes away their opportunity to learn from the problem they are having. Adano answers: Sometimes the greatest help is not to help. Saints don’t give a physical, tangible expression of help to satisfy the five senses or the ego, but they do help by reevaluating themselves as you within themselves. They try to see themselves in you. Now when I look at you I am trying to see Adano, trying to see the consciousness of God. What is the God in Myrtle? It is the life power which is in me. Because this self is the audible Life Current. But if I don’t say anything and I try to picture myself in total life consciousness, this is trying to picture myself too. Then in total-ness/oneness, I see myself as harmony. Then sooner or later your mechanism starts to take on this harmony. Once you reap this harvest of harmony in yourself, you have to share it. You can’t use it all yourself. When you get to certain degree of development or realization, you can share it… By not saying anything, by just saying I will think about it or pray on it… 26 We have three ways to pray in which we can confuse ourselves. One, we pray that the person get well, but we are confused to the extent that they need to be well. We are confused to the extent that we think all prayers are so important that the Divine Intelligence has to intercede to make them well. You see the pride in the ego that crept in there? Because we assume right away that all prayers are so important to create an issue or intercede in that person’s life. This is the thing now. That’s one approach that we have that is a weakness too. How do we step aside from that weakness? We meditate again in ourselves… You try to see within yourself the truth of the thing. I am pure energy, they are pure energy, so we are equal to each other. If you feel harmony, then you harmonize with that person. You know that that person functioning now in harmony and in consciousness, because that person is consciousness and is of the same nature. 30 You are not interfering anymore, you are synchronizing. It is a sense of synchronization, a sense of attunement… Story of Jesus and the centurion, “it is done.” It is done because the man has come to the realization of the oneness of life… You automatically recognize the mental block that the child and the man are both self. He realized that Jesus didn’t have to come into his house to heal his child. “If you only say the word, sir.” The thing is that you have to feel. Once you start feeling, there is a pulling back from all the five senses, through the nerves, legs, the energy seems to pull back and stop in a certain portion of the body, the top of the skull and forehead, it is numb. That is the firing point, which is you, the core of yourself. The real core of yourself is not triggering off anything, the real core of yourself is devotion, the nature love of being yourself. The nature love of sitting right where you are and being content… Only people made out of marble don’t act. We are made out of flesh. Feeling the strength from inside in order to go out in it. Peace don’t come and you are suddenly transformed, it is a gradual transformation of your cells. The yogi begins to feel the peace as a pulsating in the temples. This is to make him aware of the fact that he is linked up with the divine principles of his nature and he should be aware and not try to disturb the link… The meditation is no good just to close the eyes and feel a little bliss, open your eyes and don’t move and try to hold on to this inner peace, inner softness, inner strength, and walk out into the objective realm and take it in stride. You apply yourself from that frame of reference. You are calm, collected… The person has to live the part… 40 You see more and more as you get into yourself, there are three distinct things that take place. One, the calmness, the tenderness, and the invisible strength of conviction. This is something you begin to realize sooner or later over the years of meditative life. Not strength of will, the strength of acceptance. You accept yourself. Not strength to dominate or push out another. You are here, you are you. Each one of us is a unique petal in the flower. The peculiar thing is this, each petal is connected to the next petal. You ever look at a flower before the petals separate. When the bud is closed up, and if you were to open it, before you start tearing petal from petal, there is a slight connecting link from one petal to another. There is a connection. That connection is the unity of our life frequency in all of us. We are all connected equally within to God. The sense of identity is the individual petal when it is pulled apart by the pressure of the air to express its own identity and this is what we are when we seem to want to communicate our nature to others. It gives us a sense of identity… Love is not to be in love or to love or to crave love, love is this connecting link, this minute principle that holds us together… When you try to communicate, you step away from the oneness to do it… Adano tells the story about a friend of his who studied with Paramahansa Yogananda. After the master passed away, she came out of the ashram to live on her own. She wanted to attend a Zen Buddhist meditation. They are all sitting and meditating and the master walks around and all of a sudden gives her a whack on the head. That was the end of the meditation. She said to Adano, “I saw stars, planets, lights, and colors.” “have you gone back?” “not to that type of meditation.” She was asking to see the inner lights which come out of congealed tissue and bones… Meditation is trying to make you watch inside and collect these energies into the central part of your being so you will be clear visioned. This is strictly spending the time. It is a vigil to stay there and watch for a long time and see this inner light. It can take months and years. But all during that period is a sense of joy. If you don’t have the joy, you have nothing… 50 Consciously experiencing the joy of this life. Sleep is unconsciousness joy… The greater joy is this, with the eyes open, action, the creative joy is here still… The greatest joy is the renovator’s joy. Setting up something fresh, to reactivate it. Adano talks about the story of the prodigal son. There are two lights in us. There is a wayward light that moves out through the five senses, ida (sp?) and there is a stable light that stays in us called pingala. It doesn’t go nowhere. Ida pulls all the time. Therefore, it goes down into our basic nature, down in the pigsty. It grovels in the pigsty. It becomes degenerate, it discharges. So it is like a prodigal child. The pull of the one light going this way. When that light reaches a point of total discharge, that light sees it is too weak now because it is drained out. It is depending on the mid-brain or the solar plexus to activate that phenomena to participate in phenomena to survive. Therefore, it comes to its senses. It returns back here now to find out why discontent has crept in, disillusion has crept in. So it tries to go back, but on the return up now, the moment this sense of disillusion, this sense of recrimination, this sense of making amends, a re-modification begins in the human being, intuition starts moving forward, not reason. It is the strangest thing, reason don’t come back moving down to the person who wants to make amends, devotion love starts moving out. Why, reason would interfere and prevent him from being humble. A person who wants to make amends starts to be humble. His nature becomes humble. He is trying to be honest with himself for the first time and reason has no place there now. Reason would only destroy everything and reason is just a pingala game because the other one says to himself, “Why does this other have to come back in? Why didn’t intuition come down and help me and give me a chance to go further in and get past this thousand petal lotus?” It doesn’t. When ida starts pulling back. When the degenerative energy starts pulling back, the disillusion starts remaking itself, making amends, the intuition starts coming down and reaching it out and encouraging it back. This is what we call the regenerative life. It begins to pull back now. It gives it encouragement, it meets it halfway. The intuitive nature pulls it back for the first time. This is going through RAM, the resistance, the adjustment, the mutations of consciousness and the molding of patterns of consciousness and eventually you go through what is called saturation, lag (or night of the Soul), and then recurrence, a new expansion of mind and Soul… Moving inside is a process of clearing up in the mind id-s of behavior and understanding how this behavior can transfer itself to outward action. Most of us go into ourselves, we make decisions in ourselves, but we don’t take it to outer action. If the peace that passes all understanding is what the Saints bestow on us, he is praying all the time. If he is praying, he may be repeating a mantra or the name of God or he may be immersed in the beatific feeling… It is this inner refinement that is occurring inside of you…

Adano68_08_3IntuitionQ1RRNW6 - 1 In the case of the living Masters and I don’t say that the un-living ones are not important. Each one is in its own category and they are all important. What you are trying to establish in the part of meditation is a living contact helps us to understand the non-living contact better because in the non-living contact we are liable to develop illusion. Do you understand? Now in the living contact, the living contact will vouch for anything that has occurred within you. To him he can say, “I was there at that date, ta ta da da.” and he can even tell you things about yourself that would happen at that particular time if was there or not. Do you understand? He is able to tell you that. So you know the living Master has this capacity. He is total awareness. Now, you are tuning in to these Masters in the living form for instruction. Now, their instruction is to show you the secret of creation, how the law of life works in you and they tell you that you listen in the right ear for this current. Now in the Ashrams, many of the disciples from America that went to some of these ashrams, they claim that one morning they were sitting down with a group of their students who were meditating and everyone says, “Well, don’t you hear the bonnie. Let’s go have a half hour with the bonnie.” The bonnie is the cosmic sound. One student says, “didn’t you hear the bell?” They realized the meditation had more than they expected… You realize the tenderness, the joy, the compassion, and the love are flowing now. You realize you have been there all the time. You realize you have to synchronize with it more, feel for it more… (Adano gives an example of the feeling) 7 The Masters don’t want to scare you away at the start, you know. Otherwise you wouldn’t want to do this thing. The pearl of great price is worth its weight in gold. Well, the pearl of great joy, of great conscious joy, is worth its weight in silence. Put it that way. Hail to the jewel in the lotus, isn’t the jewel in the lotus. Om Mani Pad Mani Om. That’s what it means, hail to the jewel in the lotus. Hail to the Light within the Third Eye. Hail that he that can see the Light and hear the Sound. This is what it is. All these are things… this is what you are trying to do. Greater than the Light, is the Sound because the Sound is responsible for the Light. Adano sings “I am Om, I am Om, Om, Om.” He didn’t say “I am Light.” You know Paramahansa Yogananda and all the great Saints, they didn’t say “I am Light.” He says, “I am Om.” I am the Cosmic Vibration, the Word. I am the Word. So “I am that I am” you begin to realize what Moses was experiencing. He experienced the Oneness of the Word as pure Consciousness, which is Himself and this is the Sound. He got to hear this Sound, a high pitched electronic frequency and it breaks into a melody and it is there all the time and it pulls you. It pulls you up, it doesn’t pull you down… That doesn’t say that you don’t get involved in physical things, but the involvement in the physical things don’t have repercussions anymore… Everyone is experiencing it, but no everyone of us have developed the capacity to hold onto it. 10 It is like an electrical cord. No, in fact, it is like a jack hammer. You know how much strength it takes to hold onto it when it really gets going? If you can’t hold it, it will go right on his toes. The sense of holding onto the inner current is patience. When you start to meditation to start to feel the bliss, then come out, get adjusted, then go back into and go deeper. It is a deeper sense of hearing. The third level is you are trying to experience a deeper sense of feeling… The consciousness goes to a first level of peace, then look out into the world. I have a friend Sonny, at this point he is thankful that he is peaceful. The next level is a deeper sense of hearing, more on the right side. Sonny says “I wish I were a musician, I would write down what I just heard.” Then he closes his eyes and comes out again and says nothing… Once you can recognize it as a serenity, then you know what it is. 16 As I told Arnold, you have to do action. Some people do action as a chore to escape from the inaction, that is a chore, it is not doing anything. It has to do with your attitude… 17 Let’s assess work. What is work? If you do assess it, and then you can see why possible it is not so much work as we think it really is. Work is desire plus energy. You must have some motive plus a certain amount of exertion and call it work with the resistance against it. Because you have to exert yourself against a certain resistance to accomplish it. Now, once you realize that this is what you are being involved with, then it is not such a thing to run from because then you see now that the daily resistances in the outward life is the key to the accomplishment of strengthening the inner life. The inner life don’t get strong without the outward expressions. The inward life only gets sharper or more distinct in observation, outlines, and feelings, but you still got to apply in a physical sense, your nature.
