You can feel joy inside and it becomes sharper and distinct and more pronounced, but you take a two year old kid in this room with a lollipop and you have on your nice dress and you’ll see how much joy you really got when he drops it on you… Out flies all the joy. In the meditation, as you get deeper into it, you want to hear. It is only a couple years we have been talking about it. How to get into the peaceful state at the start, how to watch, how to listen. Now we want to make these things with more emphasis, it is not how long, it is how deep you go in and connect and get that contact and come out and get that strength… 20 There are certain distinct sounds, the bell that tolls in the four corners of the universe. The bell is in the heart center, it tolls in the astral realm. And it is the bell of the angelus. Then there is the conch, the shell, the blowing of the ocean sound. Then there is the flute, Krishna flute. Then there is the harp, which David achieved the realm of the harp consciousness in his chakra. He awakened that chakra with the harp moving and he had that power. He had that spiritual power from that center. Now, Joshua achieved the trumpet and the walls of ignorance came tumbling down. They were dissolved when that particular chakra opened up in Joshua. Certain things are dissolved in these sounds in the chakra. Then there is the flute, or trumpet, then there is the harp, then there is the buzzing of bee. Then there is the bell. You hear a bell… The sounds are the result of the chakras opening up. The sound is coming out from the chakra itself and it brings a certain siddhi. It is a psychic force that transformed to you and you are capable of using it. Now, the Masters don’t say you should use it, they say learn to control it until the time comes and all of them are opened up. Then these forces are within you as a natural thing… These are your tools to work with. It’s a bee, it’s a flute, it’s a harp, it’s a bell, it’s a thunderclap. Have you ever seen pictures of the Buddha with a thunderbolt in his hands. Now, there is a friend of mine, she was initiated by Kirpal Singh and I visited her one day and I saw on her altar, the thunderbolt. And I said to her, “you got it back?” She says, “Yeah, it took me a long time.” And that was the end of the conversation. The thunderbolt was an actual substance made from a particular material teleported back to her after she reached that development. This is something she got back after she achieved that meditation… When the siddhi of the throat is opened up, the thunderbolt is there… Thunder is speech… The thunderbolt is shaped like a dumbbell. It looks like a metallic stone. It weighs 4.5 pounds. It is smooth and cold. You can touch it and feel the vibrations. It is not from this realm, a manifestation… 30 The chakras exist as actual things and the forces are there. The Master, after he connects you to it, he makes you practice meditation so you can work this thing. The Initiation is to connect you. The technique is for you to work with. I teach you how to write, but you still have to buy paper and pencil to write with… The shiva lingam is an oblong symbol of regenerative life. It is a mineral that is not of this earth, it is called spatum. It is known that the shiva lingam is the old relic that man could have designed. Adano tells the story of how the shiva lingam inspired the monkeys to develop… The fist is what makes the difference in evolution between primate and human form. 37 This planet Earth is only four and a half billion years old. It’s a fantastic thing when you think of it that we are naive enough to think we are the only human beings in the whole universe. You understand? When every scripture has said, “Come let us make man in our own image, male and female created them.” That means organized life came into existence in a male and female process, but in no language can you find a word “man,” except in Sanskrit that would indicate organization. Manas is mind in Sanskrit. There is no other language that you are going to find this word that is going to indicate us as man. So if manas is mind, what really were they saying? “Come let us setup organized mind in tissue form, male and female.” The whole universe had to have it. So organized tissue form, which is mind in an organized way, we are looking at an organized tissue form in mind. So Sanskrit already tells us here is what the thing is, male and female. You see? So if the Masters all say that this universe here is highly populated, not only in the physical realm, in the astral realm and the causal realm, boy, I’ll tell you, Adam and Eve had a long battle to go if they were the only two people. You see how we are not understanding? Adam and Eve is Ida and Pingala in ourselves, you see? 40 This is the garden of Eden and the Tree of Life is in us. The roots are in the head and the nerves come down this way, in the trunk. Now, when God slowed down, or pure consciousness slowed down into energy, and energy into matter, it has to stop someplace in the matter. Now if it stopped in man or manas, organized tissue, that is capable of expressing consciousness, then where in this tissue did it stop? What gives this tissue superiority over other expressions of tissue? The spine, either vertebrate or invertebrate, organized life. The most important organized life is the vertebrates. The invertebrates ones mean those without spine, vertebrae, that don’t have any sense of organization. Those with the spine have the sense of organization. Those are the ones that push forward and all the evolutionary movement continue. Now, Masters have said that in this mechanism with this spinal axis, which is an altar, God also gave one more important thing, a thousand petal lotus in the mid-brain. This is where the seat of the life energy is supposed to rest now. It slows down from there, gradually become the body form, then stopping at the point in the body form. It has to stop at a point in the body form. If this is the root of the tree where we would draw the sap from when it takes energy, the tree has to stop at some point from the roots. Now, if you look at a tree or a seed shooting its way out, all the roots are where the seed is supposed to be, then the tree comes up. There comes a point where the tree stops growing and it is just spreading. At the head of the tree, where it stops, this is where the dormant energy is. Now in mind, where this had to stop, it stops at the base of the spine… It doesn’t lose its ability to be creative. Now, this mechanism is endowed with two brains, the actual brain and the pseudo brain, the solar plexus. This wasn’t taken from Latin, we have to go back to Sanskrit. This chakra is Solar, the sun… 43 Ectoplasm, psychic phenomena, and all extrasensory phenomena have their seat in the mid-brain because here is the cross over point between the energies. Your energies cross over this way from your spinal system. Now if all your nerves were connected this way, you know you couldn’t live because it will back up on itself. The hydraulic pressures would push back and your body would burst apart so everything is crossed over as an axis. That is why they draw a figure eight now to represent the infinity of life and what is figure eight? It is a circle put this way. Now because it is put this way, it has a cross pressure and it is the principle of hydraulics playing back upon itself. So we find now this thing is right in here, it crosses right here. So we are here. Ida goes this way and Pingala goes the other way. Now, in man, or manas, that is in organized tissue, male or female or the Garden of Eden as another symbology, there is two forces existing there. Adam which is reason and Eve which is feeling. Now feeling is like a two edged sword. That’s why in the Book of Revelation it was referred to as a two edged sword. If you spell Eve it is to E’s with a V in the middle and the V is vortex and the E’s are the two forms of energy pulling both ways. And we say Adam. Put a hyphen between the A and the D and what do we got? What is a Dam? It is something that holds back a force. Now, we say it is reason. Now reason is the only force we know that can hold back or react with a sense of indifference and block things and prevent any experience… This is force that dams up the flow of the energies that come in from the medulla and flow down. Now, Eve is not woman, it is a principle that represents emotion and devotion. It’s feeling so Eve is feeling and Adam is reason. Now, this feeling has two functions: emotion (downward) via the five senses and a devotional pull (upward) via the withdrawal of the sense… The Masters say bring all your feelings to the point between the eyebrows… This energy is pulling down all the time. In this door right here, from the day feeling moved down, we say the man fell. Was it reason or feeling that fell? What fell? Consciousness fell. The moment consciousness refused to “meekly wait and murmur not.” Here is the longest process of meditation. Cosmic consciousness is in here already and to get it is to watch with vigilance. That’s why Jesus says “meekly wait and murmur not.” Don’t get excited, don’t get over anxious, don’t be like Eve, don’t be that feeling that is emotional, don’t drop down in to psychic phenomenas, don’t go down into the mid-brain or the solar plexus which is an imitator of the real brain. Now, by the natural pull, cosmic consciousness if forced to descend by the natural inevitability of your love. If he can’t wait, it slips down into the mid-brain and promises all the phenomena that he is going to get. It is moving to the dormant life energy, God, that is dormant in the spine, that is supposed to have the power of creation. Feeling in the form of emotion get tricked when it moves to the creative force in the dormant stage. The creative force, the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil, but not the Tree of Knowledge of Life and Death. Yet, within this tree, there is the principal of Life and Death… 52 It placed Will (Michael the Archangel) right there to block you. Will blocks feeling and reason from experiencing pure consciousness, Ego Will… Reason can only be redeemed through intuition. Adano quotes Omar Khayam “the daughter of wine.” Man eventually pulls back to the right side of the brain, Pingala… We are not supposed to stop at the Thousand Petal Lotus, this is where we begin. When you get to the Thousand Petal Lotus, you have arrived to causal realm, you have not arrived to the Soul of the Saints where the Saints go. The Saints all go back to Sat, Sat Loca, or Sach Khand. God is Sat, only in Sat, the Sanskrit word Sat is where your consciousness must be… It is like the bee sitting on the Thousand Petal Lotus sipping the nectar out of it… This is the Sach Khand… 55 Kundalini is not sex force. The energy comes back up. The dormant energy is there and instead of descending down from Ida, it starts ascending. It is cool. That’s why you should keep a cool head, not a hot head. (gap in tape, Friday, August 9, 1968, next is August 10th). Adano talks about DNA and the chemicals that organize life so it begins to function. Crystals grow by light… Life energy comes into the human body through the medulla oblongata, the mouth of God… Organized mind in the form of matter, called man, does not exist strictly by solids and liquids, but by every word, cosmic radiation or lifetrons, which is an electron with a different type of frequency which you can tap into with concentration directly. Man does not live by bread alone but by Word, that cosmic vibration that life interest. It is force, energy, and consciousness. It is called Prana, which is not breath, Prana is lifetrons which enters the medulla, the mouth of god, which is where the sperm met the ovum. 1:00 There is no such thing as failure. Since we became a human body, we have attained success that day. That was the very first experience of success. Now, of all the teeming sperms that had to make the grade, this one made it and that one is you. Now we are dealing with a life that is entirely different mentioned that the scientist is working with. He is dealing with chemicals that are built and organized as crystals, but will not make tissue. The DNA cannot made tissue. It is a chemical that is in there that is organizes itself to give the appearance of living action, movement. It appears to move and multiply, but it is not multiplying a cell. It is multiplying crystals. Those scientists will tell you that he is found how to make life in the form of a cell and build a body out of it and endow it with consciousness, he has found how to direct the electrochemical activity from within the mechanism so that it will stay active… The Master are talking about something different, they are talking about the vital power that slowed down from consciousness into a mechanism to become flesh… The word life is used too loosely. We are talking about the audible life stream. It is a current that is constantly flowing down into you. It has a color, it has a sound… John and the book of revelation: the first verse, “In the beginning was the Word.” At the very start of creative activity, pure consciousness was sound, the audible life stream… Thunder, sound, and light… 1:05 That’s why the Saints always say we see the light of God, but it is His word that made the light possible. It is his whole word, this sound principle, this logos, this Om, this cosmic principle, this audible life stream makes it possible. Now, John says “in the beginning was this word,” is this cosmic principle, this cosmic sound. Scientists are admitting now that cosmic vibration exists and is the result of the atoms in motion. Now, this is ultrasonic and yet it is audible. It can be heard by meditation. Inwardly, outwardly, after you meditate you can hear the cosmic bell ringing all around the room. And those who can’t heard it are not tuned into it, but those who can hear it hear it all the time. When you get into advanced meditation, this is what you have been taught to listen to, the bonnie, the Cosmic Sound, to hear it vibrating in the room. Now,the bell is important because the bell is synchronized with the heart chakra. Now, it pulls you up into the third eye or the Christ eye. “When thine eyes are single, the body is full of light.” Jesus said that, this is what he means within here is a light vibrating in the mid-brain and this sound pulls you up, back all the time. You don’t slip down. Now, the book of Revelation is deeply involved with this and it’s all yoga. It is nothing new, it’s the Science of the Soul. It has only been written in symbology, and now for the first time the scientific explanation of it as to what is going on electrically. We can understand it for the first time. It is an atomic principle. In the beginning is the sound, this cosmic, audible life stream, and they call it Word. What is Word? Isn’t it sound waves? Now, “and the word was with God.” What is God that is Word can stay with him? God is the total consciousness, or pure consciousness and it is a positive principle… In the Oriental languages it is called the Sat Purush, the eternal existing consciousness. No form. Cosmic self doesn’t have an image, it is light and it is sound. The Word IS God. John is specific in delineating each level. First sound to start it, then sound existed with consciousness, then the sound IS total consciousness, then it became flesh, congealed matter. Then God became you, he didn’t make you. So you got to find God in yourself first. Yogananda said, “everything else in this world can wait, but my search for God cannot wait.” It frees you from your five senses and your subconscious memories. It is like a high pitched whine, like a jet engine taking off, it is the sound of the cosmic motor. It slowed down to become flesh / matter. It dwells in Man in the form of speech. 1:10 What is the clapping of one hand? The rubbing of fingers, sound again. Turn your gaze to the origin of the nose to perceive the light of Brahama. The origin is the point between the eyebrows. Turn the eyes in and don’t fall asleep (subconsciousness), because the whole journey is superconsciousness or total awareness which is God. Vigilance is to watch, to listen, to feel. Now this is quite a challenge, it is not easy. “Meekly wait and murmur not.” Buddha says, “stays here at the door of inner light and murmur not at the dispensation of God, for His wisdom is unbounded and his power is unlimited.” Enlightened, the brain lights up wit the energy for the first time and you see consciousness: the electrical (astral - star like), causal (ideas of the archetype), then the 1,000 petal lotus of pure light, Om Mani Padme Om, the Jewel in the Center of the Lotus. John’s seven golden candlesticks, the seven chakras, each sealed by an angels, the seven siddhis, and each has a positive and negative pull. The endocrine system is the physical counterpart of this electrical principle which is an electrical counterpart of the idea principle behind it. But knowing this anatomy, they still emphasize one basic thing, love. Love will open this open. Yogananda chant, “Who is in this temple.” “All the door do open by themselves. All the lights go on by themselves. Darkness like a dark bird flies away.” Sensory pull to the emotional existence begins to diminish and for the first time you live in an extrasensory nature, but you don’t try to make God into a three ring circus. Master Jesus only did two miracles more than once, food for man to live and raising the dead (which everybody is afraid of). His intention was to teach you the 12 attitudes of behavior (beatitudes). One is the “pure in heart sees God.” If you take one verse out the bible and make it an exemplary life, you become a walking bible. 1:20 Build your spiritual life around one verse. For example, “meekly wait and murmur not.” The real courage is in that one because the courage to wait is the courage to admit you can make mistakes. Which no one wants to admit. It does not imply blind faith for the initiate or spiritual person, maybe for a churchianistic person. In meditation, to believe and not to know is superstition. “Be thou still and know that I AM is God consciousness.” The first experience of this is peace and it comes out of you. The mind’s tendency is to drift to other IDs (ideas) / impressions, the future, past, present. The Maharishi of Arunachala would say “Who am I, What am I, etc. If the mind would drift to the future, it is automatically going to generate anxiety. If the mind drift to the past it generates frustration. There is no present but the eternal now, which is I Am. Jesus said, “Love the Lord thy God with all they heart, mind, and soul.” He was not referring to a person, but a principle. The Lord is the positive principle of Life, it is a Lord unto itself. Love the authority of life over your own makeup with all your mind and heart and this authority is justice and in the positive aspect. The negative aspect is compassion / mercy, it is a polaristic function. Jesus says that if we can learn to love this supreme principle. These are conditions of your consciousness, to love is to feel. You will then experience a different relationship with yourself. It frees you from your complexes, but not your responsibilities. You have to find the portable heaven inside this mechanism while you are in the body. The goal of life is realization of this principle. The emphasis is still love, which is still tinged with ego until it breaks away. The love of God is much more tender, so far reaching, there is not one iota of violence in it. It is a feeling that is so involved with tenderness. 1:30 This is not weakness. Tenderness is a certain spiritual sensitivity that comes to you, that you perceive intuitively. The workings of truth around you. You can even generate love for a raving maniac. It comes from within and you can generate it. To allow it to flow. It is a flow from three levels, downwards into you… Story of Mataji and the disciple in India, after a couple days, she just says one word, “surrender.” He finally understood what she meant and the flood of consciousness came down on him. He now lives in the world, but he is not “of” the world. It is all intuitive, devotional love for him now. He came back to the US and resumed his business. 1:35 All truths are simple formulas, they sound simple when you read about them, attempt them. You know, “be thou still and know that I am God.” This is not so easy to do either. None of these things are easy to do. They sound so simple, but it is not easy to do. Because it is a struggle between the emotional pull of your five senses and the devotional pull of the intuition. The intuition, which is the Soul nature in you too, wants you to go in an unerring way and to experience divine law and the divine will of being in the right place, at the right time, for the right experience. But your emotional nature doesn’t want you to go that way. Your emotional nature wants you to establish the action by your ego and by your will, “I must do this. I got to to this. I want to do this.” and before you know it, you end up making a muddle of the whole thing. I only have one thought most of the time, “Divine Mother willing.” Creation is for the sport of consciousness. It is for the joy of consciousness. Saints successes come from the mistakes of sinners. What is a sinner? A man who is ignorant of himself. 1:40 Story about Marlo Dawson who made a wrong turn. Adano said it was no wrong turn because he was going to find something he couldn’t find anywhere else. Adano found a bronze object that usually sold for $5 that he got for $2. This is how Divine Law works. What one man things is a mistake turns out for the benefit of Divine Law. It was something we needed to get for meditational practice. We begin to see Divine Law happening in our lives. All the teachings of Jesus was only one week of activity, even though it took three years. Adano discusses the story of the brides and the virgins and their lamps. The ten wise and unwise virgins. Our body is known as the 10 door house, eyes, ears, etc. and the third eye. Each door is in a state of polarity, so those are the 10 wise and foolish virgins. There are pulls from the negative / emotional field. The foolishness is the emotional pull from these 10 doors. Intuition is the bridegroom who is going to come. It comes like a thief in the night. The somatic experience doesn’t tell you when you are going to get Cosmic Consciousness. It just comes in. If you are not observant by devotion, it flies right through your mechanism and you miss it. If you are observant, you experience it without damage to the physical frame. The foolish ones ask the wise ones for oil. The emotions are running to the devotional nature to experience intuition. They have nothing to work with. Omar Khayam “I have divorced barren reason and taken the daughter of wine to spouse.” 1:50 In intuition, you don’t have to talk, you can communicate through the eyes. Adano story about the engineer from Benares who was staying in the same place as Adano in Canada. He climbed a big mountain to get to the Yogi. He asks the Yogi to follow His path. The Yogi told His disciple through His eyes to tell the kid to study to be an engineer and come back when he was 40. They can just look at each other and communicate, the boy saw that. If you nurture the energy and not waste it, it becomes regenerative. Adano couldn’t accept Jesus. “The thing you cannot accept is the thing you come back and eat.” Who taught Jesus Christianity? What is Christianity? Jesus was a Master of the Science of the Soul. The thief on the cross addressed him as Master, which means Guru, “one who lifts up.” The Jews wanted a master to lift them up from the Roman yoke of occupation. Jesus came to lift them up from their five senses into intuitive living. Even today people just want a solution to Vietnam, not a Guru. Story about Bhagavad Gita and the battle of Arjuna. Pick up your bow and fire, pick up your cross and follow me. Do you allotted task, but at the same time find out that the inside here is the goal of life. Your outward life would illustrate / demonstrate an inner peace. The miracles were nothing. “What does it benefit you to gain the whole world, but lose your soul?” You haven’t found the inner synchronization of the three basic force, the physical body, the electrical body, and the idea body. Integral yoga or unity with your consciousness, then this peace comes and takes care of all the actions. That’s why it seems so difficult at times to do it. It is a slow process. This inner peace can only be accomplished through “meekly wait and murmur not,” love. 2:00 You can’t be a boss unless you can accept orders from somebody else. Master of your human nature is required to be a yogi. Saint Francis was a soldier as well as Saint Ignatius of Loyola. A Master would not kill, but a Master knows what it is to take life… and to restore life, but he would not kill. Intuition is the charioteer of the five senses, the horses, that pulls this chariot called body. The battle ground is the body. The struggle and the goal is self realization. Arjuna is a prince, the will, the princely power in this mechanism. The intuitive nature directs the will to act. Shoot your arrow away from emotion to the devotional world. Greed is a kinsman to will. You cannot move anything without will. Divine will is in man in two speeds, the lowest is ego, the highest is Divine Will. Will is kinsman to all the emotional things. Intuition is telling you to cut loose from the kinsman of greed, fear, anger, passion, lust are going to trip you up, tear you down and cause you to discharge your whole mechanism from the emotional exit. Learn to cut loose and understand them from a devotional nature. Do the same act without the emotional nature. Story about Yogananda and the boy who wanted to avoid being in the army. The Master said I can’t stop the US government, but I can tell you this much, present yourself and see what Cosmic Will will do for your life. He never left the US, he was stuck in San Francisco as a signal operator. He was trained how to kill, but he didn’t have to kill due to Divine intercession. Even if someone has to kill, the Master can intercede after the act. Story about two men, one was sent to the battlefield. He knew the Master. He dropped into a hole with other soldiers. When the sun came up, he saw that it was the enemy. This is the joke, kill or be kill. He said “God, Christ, Gurus.” The other guy got so scared, he ran away. He knew how to kill, but did not kill. 2:10 When you come into the life stream of a Master, he has to free you. Let’s meditate, we talk too much. That’s what we really want to do, meditate. (meditation and chanting of Om and Thou Art My Life). “Watch listen and feel and mentally broadcast So Hung.” 2:20 Chants “Thou Art My Life.” Mentally broadcasting, “So hung.” Adano chanting various chants.

Adano68_11_02_1Vol1SpiritQ1RRNW6 - Starts with a brief meditation. The mind has a tendency to drift to the past and future, which will generate anxiety. But if the mind stays on an ID (idea) concerning Now, the Present, the fact that you exist, by its own mechanics, you begin to feel peace. (more powerful meditation). 10 Meditation is actually a direct approach to your inner self, no one can do it for you and the results are self evident after practicing it: inner peace, inner knowledge, inner strength, and some unspoken powers that follow as a result of it. Adano explains the letters in the word MEDITATION acronym: Mental, Energy, Directing, Individual, Though, Activities, Toward, Intuitive, Extra Sensory Observation and Oneness with Noumenon (reality). The man who meditates eventually achieves extra sensory perception that transcends the five senses, right to the core of the atomic structure. He knows that he knows. Realization makes for the appreciation of the physical body and leads to devotion. It is important to be with other people who meditate. Jesus said: “when 2-3 are gathered in My name, there am I in their midst.” 20 The emphasis today is how to look inside. One of the first things to observe when looking inside is peace. 30 Searching for the Soul versus knowing that you are Soul. The living breath is the audible life stream which is the Consciousness. Colors and sounds of consciousness. Jesus said, “If the eyes are single, the body is full of light.” Some will hear sounds, some will see lights, some will see colors, some will hear specific sounds, the music of the spheres. God is reality already. He has become us. Matter, consciousness, energy, all locked up into one. 40 Three things happen when you begin to meditate: you will become the center of ridicule and aggravation. Next, your selection and association with IDs and behavior patterns starts to be very confusing. You don’t know which is the right one and which is the wrong one. You’ll get indigestion of the brain. You’ll need a mental laxative to clear the whole thing out of the consciousness and again you’ll find you’re more confused that when you started out. 50 Then your higher intelligence comes to the rescue. Your Guardian Angel, Guru, or God takes care. This is only the various cycles of natural resistance built into this mechanism in order to produce strength / volition. First you’ll get peace and a knowledge of yourself, then there’s a strength that comes, and finally, there is a extra sensory force that follows you. Don’t give up. Story of the two frogs in the bowl of cream, the little frog keeps breathing and swims long enough to make cream and gets out. You’re going to find yourself in a bowl of cream. If you keep going, eventually you’ll come out. This is one of the requirements of the strength of the Soul. It seems that you cannot stop thinking. Zen Masters say, “Zen begins when thinking stops.” Zen is a shortening of the word “Zenith.” You reach the Zenith when your thinking stops. 1:00 Moment of realization, Satori, etc is a moment of extra sensory awareness that stays with you if you are conscious. When the eyes are single, the body is full of light. When a car headlights merge together is the same principle. The human brain can light a 25 watt light bulb. It takes the extra sensory nature to be aware of the inner light: peace (the body shuts down), consciousness (it knows), and strength (you can face your responsibilities). The only hermitage is this (Adano slaps his body). Meditation has another subtle function, a switching over of the inner currents from the negative emotion nature to the positive portion which is the devotion nature. When Jesus rebuked Peter, he was referring to this principle. “You were with me in the regenerative life and knew me now.” The Master Jesus is fully aware of what is going on in His mechanism. He is not only seeing the Golden Light, which is the cause of creation. He’s seeing the pure Christ Consciousness, the intelligence aware of this function. It’s the intelligence within the Atomic Structure. 1:10 We cannot meditate by ourselves and achieve real success. We all need help, a Master. The keys are “When thine eyes are single, the whole body is full of light. The light is shining in the darkness and the darkness comprehends it not.” When we meditate there are three colors: Gold - which is the Holy Spirit or Holy Vibration. Story of Saint Paul and the reason for his blindness, to teach humility that another human being had to restore his sight by touching his eyes. The voice Paul heard comes from the blue light. There’s an opalescent blue light inside. That is the intuitive realm, the Christ realm. It’s blue. Master Yogananda used to teach people how to see Jesus. Look inside here until you see the blue light, then don’t stop meditating until Jesus speaks to you. Then don’t stop meditating until Jesus eats a piece of bread that you have taken and handed to Him to eat and have evidence that the bread wouldn’t rot 10-15 days later. The approach to them is via meditation. It’s a genuine science. 1:20 Love, above all things, was His First Commandment. Love was also His Last Commandment. Love is Devotion. It’s the turmoil in meditation that proves that you are getting results. The ability to fight back your emotional nature . The stronger nature you get above your emotional nature, the greater the Realization will become. Meditation is individualistic. It demands the strength come out in us. It opens up a consciousness that is dormant in us. The God you are seeing are the forces of nature congealed. The white light in your head looks like a dove and you cannot hide from your inner self once it is open to you. When the student is ready, the Master will come. The Master “picks up” His disciple. The Guru means, “He who lifts up.” It is the consciousness that lifts us up. We have to do it ourcells (ourselves) and worry about reaching the end of Realization. Realization is a moment to moment experience. From the French, “realizea” which means to make concrete. The white light is Pure Consciousness. The whole thing is sound also, from the Audible Life Stream flowing through you. 1:30 The author of the book of realization is John and he had the realization of the electric anatomy of his mechanism. Adano explains the story of revelation, which is the story of the anatomy of the body in his agricultural language. A throne would be a seat, a candlestick would be light, an Angel would represent intelligence. There are seven vortices of energy revolving in the Human Body. When you look inside from long practice of meditation, you begin not only to see, but to hear. The trumpet blowing is one of these vortices giving off a certain sound. One last aspect of meditation is called Moksha or Libration, “freed while living.” It’s easy to be freed when dead. To be freed while living in a mechanism gives us an idea of the responsibilities / involvement when we shed the frame.

Adano68_11_02_2Vol1SpiritQ1RRNW6 - Why do Masters die? Masters are only realized Souls who use the physical frame for exemplary service to other individuals who believe they have a Soul, until they have enough strength to shut off the concept and stand up on their their own two feet. Then they go on and leave them knowing they are now capable as living as Soul. The Master is tougher than anybody and more loving than anybody. He is the only true Godfather you ever had. He fathers you Godward in yourself because He is in that state of consciousness. He brings us to the point where we are free while living. He passes on the total awareness to at least a couple people. Jesus did not give consciousness to any of the 12 disciples. The only person who He gave Cosmic Consciousness to was the thief on the cross. The recognition comes from the words. The thief said “Master, remember me when thou comest into Thy kingdom.” It wasn’t a challenge or a demand, true disciples know this. A disciple once he sees the Master Consciousness and he recognizes it, he is recognizing something within himself. He knew that Jesus was his Master. What is this kingdom? Is there another level of existence that the thief is fully aware of? 10 In spite of ourcells, we will be forced to validate these truths about Divinity. It is the Law of Life. Meditation will follow us all the way. “On this day, thou shall be with Me in Paradise.” You and I are in total awareness now. Both of us are one in God. There’s no difference, there’s no death, only life. Don’t falter now because we are dying from the sensation of pain with the five senses pulling back. If we have no pain, we would be dead before medical attention arrives. Pain incites sensation in the cells. You can hold your consciousness in this frame via pain. The more you dull the senses, the more this Consciousness takes over and you become unaware. Everyone should learn the art of how to die into your five senses in order to be awake in your extrasensory nature. St. Paul said “I rebuke you in your rejoicing because I live and die daily in these senses.” Instantly. When I am done with helping lift up people with this mechanism, I will leave it. The “I” in me will never die because the I in me is eternal like the thief on the cross. The example of Lazarus who was one of Jesus’ sponsors. Jesus let Lazarus die to show that he couldn’t take his wealth to the grave. There are lots of disciples who have millions, but have absolutely no desire for their millions. The story of Lazarus, the rich man, being freed from attachment to physical objects by Jesus bringing him through death. But we don’t know what we are attached to. I fell 30 feet and had 54 compound fractures. My life went out of my body and he was in every planet in the universe. I didn’t want to come back, total freedom, but inner consciousness said I had to go back because I had unfinished things I was attached to. My body became numb, if it went to my eyes, I was done. The Consciousness began to permeate now. It was telling me “create pain or you will die.” The physical consciousness of the body. So I bit my thumb for nearly five minutes. The first sensation of pain causes the eyes to dilate. 20 People who pass out through psychic experience, go out through the solar plexus, otherwise people go out through the Medulla Oblongata because they go out through the light, the Light of God. If you are alive you are concentrating, focusing. The sensation of pain began to descend. Until I got to the hospital, my brain fluctuated to the thing I was thinking of was that I have three employees and I had to open the store at 7 AM, that was my attachment, not my body, not death, but those three people and the bills he had to pay. In the last state of my mind, which is what pulls you back into a body, I was thinking about my store. My conversation is betraying my attachment and fluctuation of mind. If someone dies, he wakes up in a body of 8-9 pounds with a doctor cutting the umbilical cord that is why he bawls. You have to learn to rid your consciousness by meditation daily of the attachment, the things, through meditation, like washing it out. In the devotional nature, if I had broken the attachment, I would not have had to go back into the body when I fell out the first time. The disciples of Jesus were helped more after Jesus left the body and returned. He emphasized that they meditate and reaffirmed their faith. Resurrection is higher than reincarnation. When all attachment are eliminated, then we achieve resurrection and this is a natural law. Trees reincarnate, but a butterfly resurrects. The same apple comes up every season, it is reincarnating. The caterpillar transforms to a butterfly by resurrection, spinning its own cocoon. There is no shortcut to the extrasensory realm, if it was so, it would have been found over the thousands of years. Thomas was a scientific man, is Jesus an apparition? No, there is certain evidence that separates the psychic from the Saint. Jesus made Thomas work for it, “come feel friend.” 30 Question: The realization of being one with God, does that destroy free choice, and destroy a human? Answer: You are never going to be free from anything, you are free FOR choice, FOR responsibilities to be put on you to choose unerringly. Adano gives Darshan while a man keeps talking and talking. The distinction you are making is only in relation to mind, there is no separation in no time, there never was. You are experiencing exactly what I am experiencing, but you are unaware, which doesn’t make you any less or being aware doesn’t make you any more important. Until you are aware of this true nature, you don’t know what a true human being is. You never lose your individuality, you regain what you don’t even begin to use yet. You are always going to BE, regardless of how many times you see yourself inside of yourself. Omnipresence. 40 When you are sound asleep, are you man or woman? What is the thing that occupies? Is there a start or end? So aren’t you it already? That doesn’t detract you from being a human being yet. There is no end to your Self, you are always there. Let me ask you one simple question. If you are going on a journey to a foreign country, you had no maps, no one to inform you when you got there, would you know you have got there? It would all be relative to what you carry with you. In Pure Energy, would be the same result. Pure Consciousness would be the same result. That’s why we never lose anything, we take ourcells into the Pure Consciousness and Pure Energy. Solve it? Good. This is what it is all about, we take ourcells to it. The Divinity is Pure Consciousness and Pure Energy. It is only modifying Itself to suit our relative frame. That’s why we can never lose our identities or humanistic qualities. In fact we are gaining the trueness of it. The preciousness of the humanistic function of our nature is based on the face that we can generate Love. It is a sense of establishing the quality of yourself, the humanness of yourself so it can demonstrate Divinity. God could do without us, but He became us. Pure Consciousness and Pure Energy slowed down and manifested itself as matter with the capacity to organize and it gave it choice to degenerate or regenerate. We first have to destroy ourselves before we build ourselves up. 50 God breathed into Man or Consciousness vibrated upon organisms and organisms became a living Soul, not a living mind or a living body. In the very structure of Man, he is Soul. Reincarnation is involved with his mind, if there is no attachment in that mind of yours, then the life energy has nothing to feed on. I had an attachment in my mind. I didn’t have an attachment in my life energy. I fell off the building in 1952, when I was 32. 54 Reincarnating occurs faster than the resurrecting principle. Masters resurrect and Masters reincarnate. Now, they are strictly a voluntarily principal that comes into a body by one of four methods: with total memory of all their past lives, by immaculate conception or extrasensory impregnation, by direct materialization, or by a normal birth in which they recalling one or two reincarnations and then open up after. They can pick any frame for a particular purpose. There is no desire on their part. Let’s say the level of intellect has reached such a condition among certain people where they’re so inhuman to each other where there is no hope among the crying sons or daughters then a Consciousness that will lift them up will decide now, the lowliest of all, and be born there. Just for the sake of giving them inspiration to pull them up. There might be a cataclysm coming in 20 years and the Consciousness will decide, because of the incurred hatred, the intense emotional pull, these people are setting up psychic waves that will trigger off, or fracture off, this cataclysm. Because Consciousness is involved and the Master Consciousness knows this: if they don’t help this level of evolution, it is going to destroy itself. If they do intercede, they will pick the lowliest of them. They never pick the highborn. They pick the lowliest because that the one that has the most pain and aggravation to fight with because through the meditative process they have achieved peace, consciousness, and strength. They are coming with an inner peace. This child is unusual, it doesn’t cry too much, it stands up for himself and the underdog. Doctors don’t need doctors. Masters help people who need help. He gravitates where He is needed to the people who are sick physically or psychically. 1:00 The Divine Principle is pure consciousness and pure energy at the same time, but when they react, they become matter. Man is the result of Image (the Atomic Principle) and Likeness (Consciousness). The physical self is the result of consciousness and energy coming together and ending up as the third part. Breaking down matter ends up as energy and consciousness. When don’t say “I am God” we say that I am the result of this force, this oneness. Most people think they are losing something. If I take a spoonful of water and throw it into the ocean, does it lose it water-ness? Which waves are more important, the big or the small ones? Those that are big have more wind in it, the ones that are closer to the surface are more closely identified with the water action, but they haven’t lost anything. The closer you are to the realization of God you are rippling, the further you are tidalizing. You don’t lose anything, you discover what you really have. You cannot live in that high state constantly. Do you try to swim across the ocean? What passes for meditation might not be what meditation really is yet. You cannot sit down and meditate all the time, you cannot be active all the time, it is part and parcel back and forth. Sitting constantly in meditation never happened, they would get up and do something else, like feed themselves. 1:08 We can get pretty hung up on this term meditation and not be meditating. Sitting down and closing your eyes is no proof that you are meditating. Your mind can be wandering. What you are trying to do in meditation is to experience that you are here and the first three things you want to experience: peace, consciousness, strength. The fourth thing is a bonus, the extrasensory forces come to you. You don’t have to look for them. The first three things are personal disciplines on one’s nature and that is what you are accomplishing in the meditation. You are actually sitting down and acquiring this inner consciousness, inner peace. We can sit down here tonight and meditate for 10-12 hours and many of us may not get anything, some of us will get something. Yet we can sit down and meditate for 15 minutes and everybody can get something, or none of us will get anything. So again, it is how we react inside. Conversation don’t help us to experience meditative, only by doing it. That’s why I would like us to really get some meditation now so we can really know what we are doing inside. Unless you go into it and start to feel it, you don’t know what to work for. No one can say what he is going to feel in it until he experiences it, then he knows what he is experiencing. That is what he is striving for. 1:11 Self hypnosis, nothing is wrong with it, people use it, suggestion, reinforce your confidence in yourself and many things. As a form of therapy, it is good. Extrasensory perception is good, but where is the Peace of Mind? Where is the Awareness? This is a level of consciousness in which the individual sees creation as it is for the first time, he actually perceives the Atomic Structure, from this very little brain of his. This is an unusual quality and that’s why the Masters say it has nothing to do with hypnosis, it has nothing to do with extrasensory perception or any attempt in the psychic world. That when the person reaches this level of awareness, everything he sees, he sees it as it is for the first time. He will see what the next man will make, but he will never interfere with that invention. He will see that man’s attempt to make mistakes, how many attempts that man will make before that particular law is revealed, but he cannot interfere. He is strictly an observer, a first witness for God. He is witnessing creation as it is going on, but his purpose is to identify, his purpose is to be at one. Now he knows he has a purpose of being alive too. He knows where his purpose comes in, he sees his purpose and he doesn’t fight his purpose because sometimes his purpose may not be to what he wants or what he needs. It might be something very disconcerting to him, something very aggravating and frustrating to him too. Something that will really tear up more people and not do any good as far as he is concerned. Many people may be hurt by what his role may bring. He has not lost his free will, he has it all with him. He is seeing the thing. Now, let us say we are going to meditate. The first thing you are trying to in meditation is keep the mind at the point between the eyebrows. 1:15 Adano does a Meditation. 1:20 Chanting “Door of My Heart,” then “Who is in My Temple,” “Om Rama, Om Vishnu, Oma Shiva, Om.” 1:30 (gap in tape) Extrasensory abilities come and go, you only develop one or two of them, very few people are born with them. Once inner consciousness begins to open, the other unfinished parts of your nature begin to open too. Shakespeare said, “Happiness is nowhere to be found, but in a contented mind.” You cannot make the mind contented, but what you place in that consciousness is what leads for happiness, for evaluation. The whole universe is sound, ultrasonics. There is no way to get out of sound frequencies. What is consciousness? It is sound. The sound is first before the lightening because the sound is there first, even though the light travels faster. Everything you see around you is crystalized sound and light. You first think of a sound or word in your mind, but that is not what it really is. That is just to focus the consciousness. It is like two batteries, one rundown, so you use a jumper cable to give the battery a boost. In meditation, this is what is occurring.

Adano68_11_02Vol3InnerUniverseQ1RRNW6 - Within the blueness is the white star like a descending dove. The descent of divinity into man, Avatar. What is inside is outside already. You have to keep knocking on this inner door with your consciousness, don’t stop. Story about Yogananda’s Christmas meditation and the woman who experimented with trying and trying to see Jesus. Eventually Jesus was standing right there in the room in front of her, radiating peace and love. She could see all the hair on the skin. He spent about 15 minutes with her. He has brown eyes and looks the color of Greeks, olive color, Syrian. She said He was a little under 6 ft tall. His hands were peculiar, so delicate, and gestures and His eyes. She spoke about the smell of perfume in the room. She kept meditating after that. Story about the man from Austin who visited Adano. The man was initiated by Master Charan Singh and was a nuclear physicist. He said that it took him 2-3 hours to get into meditation. It’s not how long, it’s how deep, and he meditated with the man, in 10 minutes the man didn’t want to come out of it. Then he left not telling Adano what he experienced. The man tells his friend of Adano’s that there is something weird about Adano because of the smell of honeysuckle perfume in the air when they were meditating. 10 Two months later, he and his wife visit Adano. Adano is sitting under a tree and they begin to meditate with 3-4 other people for about an hour. They smelled honeysuckle incense again. Adano said that this is the way God is showing you that meditation is not restricted to one individual. Wherever you are gathered, that presence can be experienced. A year after a magazine came out from SRF saying the same thing Yogananda said in 1923, that the love of God can be perceived as a perfume in the room like incense. Adano met Kirpal Singh’s leading disciple in the US. They meditated together and they wanted Adano to meet the leader of the group, but the leader wouldn’t travel. Later Adano is in Los Angeles meditating and sees a clear vision of the man. The man shows up later and they all meditate for 15 minutes and didn’t want to come out. The wife said that their Master was there with a company of Masters they didn’t recognize. The man finally said that this was and unusual experience. Adano said that the Love of God is the greatest experience. Your Master is trying to tell you that God is in everything so you should be universal minded in meditation. A year later the man went to India to visit his Guru. His philosophy now is to meditate anyplace with anybody you meet. He bought a church in Anaheim so they could give lectures twice a week. 20 Adano used to visit them and told them they didn’t know how to tune into their Guru in their inner consciousness. If they did, they would get more. They did it and the Guru really poured his love into them. God is always pouring his love out. When you are attuned to a Master, there is a particular feeling that comes over you and you can sense it very clearly and distinctly. You know that a Master is linked into you and He is giving you this vibration, this experience, this love. If you are in doubt of any spiritual experience in meditation, then repeat the holy names of So Hung or Radha Soami and if it is not a genuine experience, it will go away. If it is a mental experience, just a psychological experience, it will go away because it is not the real thing. But if it is a genuine experience, it will stay. Suppose you are seeing somebody on the inner plane in your meditation, you see me or someone, and you are in doubt, then repeat the holy name. If I remain, then it is a genuine thing. If I don’t remain, then it is a mental hallucination. You have proof of which you are experiencing. Story about Lomax on TV at the time who was given a reading by a woman that was accurate. This girl meditates, sees the Masters, and challenges them with the holy names. If they don’t go away, they are real. When Jesus came and she did this, the eyes were so intense that she wanted to crawl into a hole and die. He looked right through her. Masters are teaching one truth all the time, Love. Story about Adano’s flowers that crystalized / glazed by being in front of the picture of a Master. When Yogananda was alive, there was a boy and his friend who were interested in meditation. He was very evolved, but didn’t know it. He had a vision of Yogananda standing in front of a group of people giving them tangerines. In the boy’s dream, he got a tangerine too. The dream ended. He wakes up and there is a half a tangerine in his hand and the room smells like tangerines. The portion he didn’t eat, didn’t rot… 30 Adano tells the story of George, who had a link with Babaji. One day he had a bottle of rum that he brought from the islands and wanted to give his mother a drink, but he had no ice. He said “Babaji, I need some ice.” Jokingly. His mother finds a 50 pound of block of ice outside and nobody claims it so they take it. An hour passes and the block hasn’t melted much. The mother wants him to put it back because this is stealing. Adano asked George how the ice felt. George said “it lifted me up. Babaji gave me this ice.” After that George got scared and wouldn’t ask anymore. George visited SRF and the only picture he acquired was Babaji. He blew up the picture and painted it with oils the way he saw Babaji. George said “He is my friend” about Babaji, but wouldn’t meditate. Finally he would meditate, but he said it was really tough. Adano’s boss was nominated the head of the federal power commission on corrosion investigation. He called Adano Charlie Chan the hatchet man. 40 You see this is how it works actually. The Divine Will is in everything. You see years ago I used to force myself into what I want to do, when I want to do it, you know, and nothing stops me. I realized too many knock downs, you got to wake up one day change your whole attitude around. From that time on then I realized that God has a plan already setup like a big jigsaw puzzle and our lives, each one of us, fits into this plan. You see abundance, possessions, there was a time in each one of our lives when we had a surplus it, where we abused it, or where we hoarded it up, and never shared it. You understand? Or we didn’t know how to acquire it. So we are thrown back constantly into the world stream strictly to realize this, but we are realizing this from the ego standpoint wanting to do it ourselves, wanting to solve the problem ourselves. Now, when the principle has been setup that the Divine is taking care of that, that’s why Jesus says “Do not pray like the Gentiles do who want something, because the Father in heaven knows what you need already. The lily don’t plant or anything… these things go on. Rather seek the Kingdom of God which is in you.” Rather, go inside and all these things will be added to you. So, that is learning to fit yourself into Divine Will. Now, Master Yogananda clarified it by saying, “What you are trying to do daily is to be at the right place, at the right time, for the right experience and everything will take care of itself.” He says in the first part of it, it is difficult to adjust because you are bringing with it unfinished karma, but the moment it starts to make the adjustment, then the karma begins winding itself up. Then your whole life changes. Then you begin to see now what Jesus meant, “You have life abundant, flowing.” You see this is life flowing through your mechanism… We always want to take the bull by the horns, but we have the wrong understanding. Carl Jung spent his whole life investigating the religious experience, the superconscious / superego. He summarized this by saying, “Until we learn to turn over our basic self, our subconscious self to this higher self, we really don’t fit into the scheme of things. We are always going to be a misfit. This is a challenge to the Germanic and Anglo-Saxon minds. Successful living is not the acquirement of things, it is the art of how to adjust. This makes mental health better.” Many great works of art or inventive discoveries were not the result of methodic research, they were the result of accidents. With penicillin for example, Dr Flemming was looking for another substance, but later he noticed moldy cheese. He put other organisms in the dish and the penicillin ate them up. Columbus was the same thing, looking for India, but found the US, but still called the natives Indians. Also because he landed in the Southern US where they were darker. 50 French author who listed the 720 tribes of the savage nation. Savage in French means native. Pagan is Italian for country cousin or peasant. Barbarians come from Barbaria… Adano tells the story of reading a book on Googly Gook, where you make complicated words short: night = nite. The argument is to trying to communicate without a formal way of spelling for anyone who doesn’t want to understand too much. (background discussion, gap in tape). The body’s ability to utilize oxygen to regenerate itself. There is a connection between the oxygen, aging, and a certain amino acid in meats. This amino acid speeds up aging. The story about the chicken heart kept fresh for 28 years. The liquid did not have the amino acid tryptophan. 1:00 In the human being, it can keep the consciousness from deteriorating. Gravity is a pull on the mechanism but doesn’t cause aging. We age because of a certain inability to cope with the oxygen in the atmosphere and certain residues in our nutritional makeup. It gets back to meditation because they hinge on the sample principal, oxygenation. In Kriya yoga, the slow decarbonization of the blood helps you to utilize the added oxygen to reduce the decay of the mechanism. Adano reads the section of Autobiography of a Yogi on Kriya Yoga. (then background discussion). 1:12 Meditation is a constant self remember too, of yourself. You have to spend time with it to bring your consciousness to observe yourself. You discover what is happening inside of you. Each one of us carries his own set of experiences / exposures to IDs (ideas) / programming / imprinting on his mind in his mental makeup. The set of experiences prenatally is may have created this postnatal experience. Those experiences hold us together and move us toward an inner search. It is this self remembering principle that helps us to awaken our association we had prior to birth. It comes back to us. The thing is that it is making you remember a part of our nature is yet untapped by our five senses. That’s why Henry we try to remember or analyze ourselves, we are trying to gain a control over the flow of experiences from that part of our nature to this part of our nature. We are only accepting so much as we can handle. Meditation helps it not flow too fast. Certain things come from that realm that would destroy interest in this realm and some will come that will stimulate interest in this realm. It is to know how to apply the brakes, that it keeps an even keel. What is the attachment that pulls the life current back into the body. In my case, I had three people working for me and I had bills to pay. This can be so imbedded that no amount of detachment seems to break it. When I came back into the body, I had to sell the business to pay the bills. 1:20 The value I placed on the attachment was not even there. It became obvious to me, “Important things first. The more important things become important, the less important they seem to be.” Then I began to let go of the attachment of what really is important and do what I was supposed to do. The Masters responsibility is impersonal. They can give of their love and compassion to make us equal to themselves to make you a Master yourself. He wants to lift you up to face the reality of yourself. Story about the lion raised by sheep. “You are a lion like me to roar like a lion.” The Master doesn’t want us to be like the sheep groveling in the five senses. He wants us to awaken to our inner strength and the reality of ourselves. In Autobiography of a Yogi, the teacher said to the student, “I will give you my unconditional love, will you give me your unconditional love.” Ashrams were to train children in a way the parents could not. Sri Yukteswar did this with the training of young boys. Any responsibility that is not a Master / student relationship is personal. 1:30 Jesus said, “Do not grieve for me, grieve for yourself,” because they were attached, he wasn’t. He was not involved with personality, only the impersonal life. He couldn’t help them enough prior to his death. He began to help them more after he died. Real stigmatists are not in a state of hypnosis. The psychic can duplicate many things, but there is no permanency in it. When a Master transfer some identification of His presence, there is a certain degree of permanency in it. The early stages of meditation is a revision of our past lives. So you have to revise your consciousness to modify this principle so that this thing will have a chance not to work itself out. If you have water and freeze it, it will float. If you cook it, it will evaporate. We have many mistakes in our behavioral patterns, if we freeze up / shirk the responsibility, they will become heavy in us and we will drown in our psychological makeup. But if we apply the heat of meditation to cause it to evaporate out of us, sooner or later, there is no more. Meditation causes three fires: peace, consciousness (you have to fight for consciousness), and strength. These get rid of the accumulated patterns of our thinking so we rid ourselves from it. It is not more meditation, it is how deep we meditate. This is Satsanga, calling their consciousness into your life. Better to have 10 minutes of no wandering meditation, than 2 hours of wandering. The idea is to come into consciousness and to watch, to feel, and to identify. Aim for the internal peace, tranquility, serenity. Don’t let the body generate too much adrenaline, try to phosphorize. 1:40 Feel the bliss. Here is another experience. This is the time of year of Dawali in India. In the West, we have All Souls Day where the Church lights candles. The same in meditation, passing the light in consciousness to the next person. The Halloween is the overcoming of the five senses, the hallucination in us. We don’t keep customs unless they had an origin in truth. The kahunas in the islands had the same thing, carrying the light from one house to another, the Egyptians did it too, as did the Jews, starting with Prometheus. Adano tells the story about a joke from his childhood and thought nobody else would have it, but he had heard it all over the world. Adano reads from Autobiography of a Yogi on the purpose of meditation is to know God, to connect the little joy of the soul with the vast joy of the Spirit… removing the static from the mental radio… the aim is to attain a consciousness of spirit by calm, continuous, one pointed attention until the Soul is merged in everlasting bliss… The meditation is of three types, addressed to God, affirmations of about God, and those spoken to individual consciousness… What he is pointing out is when you come to meditate, there is no other object in your consciousness than the object of God. It is love. To fill this consciousness with Love because the whole ocean of Love is passing around us, but we can’t seem to connect. Love brings Joy. 1:50 We can have more tears from pain than from Joy, because everything turns us to pain, until we connect inside and realize there is a fountain of Joy. Then those are natural tears. Tears is one of the means by which the brain rids itself of unwanted ideas. In my experiences helping people through their problems, I always try to reach the point where they can cry, then I know a healing has occurred. There is a release of inner tension. The person that does not cry (or laugh) is mentally ill. All spiritual men have cried and laughed. The tears of Joy of seeing the evolution of the race, lifting themselves one step up. Coughing can be inner crying, a release. Story about the colored boy working in the rail yard across from Adano’s restaurant. He told Adano “I want to talk to you. You must know something, you own a restaurant.” Every I would see him talking to different people and he learned what they were doing. He was learning from people. I learned that he became an astute student of life. He could size up people so fast from the various people’s occupation. He could spot successful people. 2:00 Adano tells the story of the two brothers from South America, one had an Indian name, Running There, and one had a Christian name, John. John was sad and his brother was happy. The church says that when I die I have eternal life. My tradition says that if I kill my enemy, I eat them, they get everlasting life. When I die, the maggots eat me, I get everlasting life. As a Christian, they bury me away from the maggots and I get cheated and don’t get everlasting life. You see what a concept in a man’s mind can do? What is more important, the concept or the happiness of the individual. (gap in tape). We cannot think in meditation. When you begin to feel all over your mechanism in meditation then automatically the naturalness beings to flow, the consciousness begins to rise. You become aware of levels of consciousness and they are in the form of a mental image. It is true the mental images left in the brainwaves that we begin to perceive. The Master say to watch here at the point between the eyebrows then the images start moving in and we are like a receiver. You turn on a TV set and you pick up a program and you associate / identify with that program, but you can’t control the program. The Masters say that this is identically true with us, but we can go one step further and go into verification. We can mediate until this consciousness draws that person or being into manifestation. We have to meditate until we feel their presence and see them with your eyes wide open, until they talk to you, and eventually until they eat some food that you offer to them. In the book “The Master Said,” the Master would be talking to other Saints. It is like Lahiri Mahasaya summoning Babaji out of the cosmos to appear for him and he did. Story about the brother who would talk to Jesus. The bishop came to exorcize him and when he came, he found Jesus sitting there instead of the brother. That’s why meditation is so important so we get the experience of going inside. 2:10 When you get a letter from a Master, you can use the vibrations in the letter to help your meditation. Keep it on your person and you can put the signature on your third eye. They touch food (gap in tape). They paint Krishna in blue, the Navajo’s paint in blue… The spiritual eye has three colors: gold which is the Holy Spirit or Cosmic Vibration, blue of the Christ Consciousness, the intelligence in vibratory creation, then inside this blueness is a white star upside down descending like a star.

Adano68_11_03SMULecturePaulinesQ1RRNW6 - Meditation as a daily practice is form of spiritual immunization against the environmental pressures. So we can live in this world without being swamped by the tension generated from the occupation and the association with people. Gradual immersing yourself at the point between the eyes as a revitalizing process to cope with what you are doing objectively, this is the right attitude. Learning to feel your Consciousness there. The gland is a triggering agent. It switches the current downward that is required to be used. If you can also feel your Consciousness in the spinal column, then more and more the energy will permeate the mechanism and keep it in a state of relaxation. The more you feel, the more this energy will flow. You want to learn how not to have a wandering mind so you can meditate. Otherwise you are playing see-saw with your senses, but training yourself to prepare the mind so it don’t wander, drift as a preliminary warm-up to meditation, this is what you want to acquire. 10 The mantra is primarily to prevent the mind from wandering, but it is not an aid in bringing forth love. We have to generate love so we can be receptive to love flowing back to us from that realm. The presence of the Divinity can also be felt as a heaviness in the room, like the room is closing in on you. When the mechanism stops breathing, you will see the total force as yourself. The limited brain cells and five senses cannot envelope or contain it. The aching, the yearning, the sense of being complete are the highest forms of crying. We wonder why we are trapped in such a small organism trying to contain such a vast universe. This is the crying and can force liquid out of the eyes as tears. 20 It can also be a release of wanting to share, bursting to share, which can bring out a feeling of crying. In is between these function that you are discovering the realness of your nature. The human-ness of your makeup. Divinity is not what you think. It is already locked up as the highest form of human-ness, the tenderness of his emotions. Out of this emotion that is aching to contain and to give comes the devotion as a vitalizing principle. The Masters have always said that God is you at the tenderest part of you, the next suspended breath, which is ultra-tender. Question: What happens when we slip into unconsciousness. Adano: It goes down in the spinal column below the brain into the throat center which is the reason for the snore. You can program the mind not to drift down by So-Hong or watching the breath or through pain. 30 Pain maintains the state of staying awake. You need to breathe deep enough to stay awake. In meditation, you are not trying to alter the flow of breathing, you are trying to observe the flow of breathing. (Gap in tape) We feel peace when we think in the present because we live in the present, not the past or future. Meditation is how to calm the mind so when we put an ID (idea) inside, it will stay inside. 40 If you always think of the present, it is easy to memorize material. Meditation is how to stay in the present. Moses was told that the God who spoke to him only had one name, “I Am That I Am.” The people were always thinking of the past pain or their future escape from Egypt. You can overcome this particular pressure by centering your mind in the present and thinking of the Divinity in you and calling on the I Am. The people would say he was nuts. Eventually he was pretty disgusted with them. This word I Am does not refer to the body. It refers to everything in this universe. We are all parts of the I Am so we are all one. Most of us live in the past or the future. Meditation helps us to stay in the present, understand it, and cope with it. There is no vaccination for stress and anxiety from the environment so nature has built a natural tranquilizer, located in this mechanism. 50 Jesus said, “Seek ye first the kingdom of God which is within you.” We are trying to seek tranquility, but our minds slip back and forth to the past and future. “If thine eyes are single, then the whole body is full of light” and “Come unto me all that travail and are heavily laden and I will refresh you.” The eyes are single at the point in the middle of the forehead and that keeps their consciousness single and focused on the present. This returning here has been classified as meditation. The mind is generating certain amount of energy to direct our individual thought activities towards an intuitive observation and oneness with God or noumena. We have to go back in. Every time you say “I Am” you are saying something in the present tense, Now. The Present exposes the truth in us. The I Am principle is the principle of truth that holds us up. The only time when you are going to feel peace is when you feel yourself right now. The very next breath is life. Every instant we breathe, we are alive and this is something we are conscious of in the present. We are the result of a Divine Principle. We don’t understand what God is yet. We know God exists, but we don’t know how He exists. We have no way to experience how He exists in us. 1:00 If we did, we would automatically feel our true nature, peace, which brings strength. “The peace I give” is the peace that the “I” gives, not the “I” Jesus. “I” Jesus is saying that “the I Am principle in my mechanism” is deep down inside Himself. The people were not ready or looking for that kind of transformation. They were looking for a man to knock down the oppressors and reinstate them as a nation, but He was liberating them in a psychological / behavioral sense. Man is still fighting Man to enslave him, but if that man knew how to maintain his identity with God, how could his inner peace / awareness of himself be taken away? Meditation is to learn to help us adjust and to realize what we are, what our neighbor are, why they think a certain way, and why we think a certain way without imposing or trying to hurt you or you trying to hurt them. 1:10 This is why Jesus said “Love the Lord thy God with all thy mind and heart and love your neighbor as yourself.” To truly love ourselves we must understand that this Divine Presence is within us. The common experience of two things equal to one thing are equal to each other. By staying in the present, Now, you begin to experience peace. Your mind has changed from wandering to centering and before you know it, you are getting strength. The environment don’t make you afraid no more. You are capable of holding your own, within your legitimate right as a person, without being afraid. 1:20 The Teachers of Truth are not going to tell us anything new, but They will always come to help us experience the three fundamental principles of life. How to go inside. How to be aware of yourself. How to maintain the inner strength to cope with the environment. The Teachers of Truth point out that God exists, but the followers of Truth have made a mess of what God really is and how He exists. Each Teacher lives in a particular culture and need for those people and would have to present that one Truth according to how He finds His environment or customs He has to work with. We have not yet evolved into the psychological civilization. When we live in space. We are evolving from an agricultural civilization into an industrial civilization where our world around us is based on mechanical movement, machinery. We all have a yearning for the farm and feel out of place in the industrial society. There is no end to life and one body form of 60 years is not enough and exposure to the wholeness things of life. Jesus told His disciples that, “In my Father’s house there are many mansions. I go to prepare a place for you. If it were not so I would tell you.” 1:30 In other words if they are all going to be turned Saints over the short period of being exposed to him then what becomes of them when they give up their frame in the physical world and He’s telling them that there is no end to such a thing. In other words, they will go on to higher forms of existence, higher levels of behavior, and that this Universe is so large that it is preposterous to think we are the only creatures with knowledge. In the movie 2001, it was a psychological argument between machine and man. Eventually the machine gave way to the human power of will and the human performed a electronic lobotomy on the machine’s brain and cut out what was unnecessary. It shows how man is evolving from his agricultural environment to his industrial environment to the psychological environment. But we are still fighting and looking for peace inside of ourselves, but nobody seems to supply the answers. The Sages point out a way. From now on it is possible by experimental research to experience what these Sages spoke of. It also brings on the heightening of your character as a person. The emphasis today is how to experience it. How can we identify with an inner peace that will stay with us. This peace, this joy, this inner consciousness heightens all the qualities of a person. How can we identify with an inner peace that will stay with us? 1:40 Now modern science, doctors today, scientists can vouch beyond all reasonable doubt, by mechanical machinery that this brain of ours, everyone from the lowest Hottentot or primitive in Africa, there is enough electrical power in the brain to light up a 25 watt bulb when they hook it onto it. Now if the brain can send out that much electrical power to light a 25 watt bulb, and this is positive fact, and we don’t even use more than one tenth portion of it to perform our daily activities, nine tenths portion is inactive, do you see that the great men were talking of something deep down inside that they knew. They saw this inside of themselves, that there is a light that is burning from within because this body is all light. This body is energy. This body is the result of consciousness and energy. It’s a Divine Principle. Now, they said that this body is a Temple of God too. Now… and they also say that when God created the Universe, He made Man in His own image and likeness. He made him from an atomic principle and He endowed him with an omnipresent awareness. That’s His own likeness because if you’re going to go to God, you would say that God would be the only person who would know everything. So He’s everywhere, so if He’s everywhere, He’s omnipresent and if He’s omnipresent, He’s all powerful already and if He’s all powerful, He’s all knowing so this would be a state of awareness that would be in an individual who has realized himself that this goes on. 1:42 But that’s not what we want to find. What we want to establish is that we know where to go, now, we know what we are looking for. We now want to experience it. You see? If we didn’t know where to go and what we’re looking for then we would not be able to experience it. You see? Now you know… what’s that cafeteria not too far from here? Haliburton? You know where Haliburton Cafeteria is? Now you know what you want to eat when you get there, you see? Now, but if you don’t know, you wouldn’t go. Once you have established the destination, once you have established some facts about what you’re doing, then you go, you see? If you don’t have these things established, you could not partake, you could not eat at the cafeteria because you don’t know where it is. It’s the same thing here, you cannot experience the peace that you are looking for outside, but you are told now to look inside and what to look for inside? They say to look for a light that is shining in there.
